We're looking for a video editor/social media manager.

-strong Canva experience

-social media management









Details:

-$5/hour

-Mon-Fri flexible, but roughly a 2-hour block around 10am-5pm Eastern (a 2-hour block at some point in that timeframe)









HOW TO APPLY:

1. Please send an
 with your resume attached AND PORTFOLIO OF YOUR VIDEO EDITING and a brief overview of your relevant experience in the body of the
 to 
 with the subject line “Rachel's Video Editor VA”.

 (if you don’t, don’t write it).

, write the USD hourly rate (or salary, but specify hourly, monthly, etc and currency) of your last two roles listed on resume. For example:

, explaining your relevant experience. If you don't follow the above 3-step instructions in how to apply, your application will not be reviewed.

title: Brand & Creative Designer (In-House Marketing)
description:
** Please provide your portfolio with relevant work examples. If not we will not be contacting you **



Location: Remote (UK working hours)

Working Hours: 9:00am – 5:00pm GMT

Type: Full-Time (35 hours)

Start Date: ASAP



About Us



Prospa Media are a leading UK-based ecommerce agency helping ambitious DTC brands scale through high-performance marketing.



Website - 



We hold ourselves to the same standard internally as we do for our clients - our own marketing must reflect best-in-class creative, strategy, and execution. The quality of our brand output is a direct representation of our expertise.



The Role



We’re looking for a Brand & Creative Designer to take ownership of our agency’s visual output across our marketing channels.



This role sits at the heart of our marketing team. You’ll be responsible for turning strategy into standout creative, producing work that not only looks exceptional but performs and contributes to new business for the agency.



You’ll work closely with our Marketing Manager, who will lead strategy and direction. Your role is to bring that strategy to life visually, elevate the quality bar, and contribute creative ideas that push our brand forward.



This is a fast-paced environment, and we’re looking for someone who can operate at speed without compromising on quality.



Key Responsibilities:



Design high-quality creative across:



- Organic social (LinkedIn & Instagram)

- Paid ads (Meta, LinkedIn, etc.)

- Personal brand content (founder & team LinkedIn)

- Website and landing pages

-
 newsletters



- Own and maintain the visual consistency of our brand across all channels

- Translate marketing strategy into compelling, high-performing creative

- Contribute original ideas and concepts for campaigns and content

- Continuously improve and evolve our creative output based on performance and feedback

- Collaborate with copywriters, marketers, and leadership to execute campaigns

- Manage workload and deadlines using Notion and Asana



What We’re Looking For



Proven experience in a design role within:

- An agency environment or

- An eCommerce / DTC-focused business



A strong portfolio demonstrating:

- Brand-led work

- Social content (organic + paid)

- Performance-driven creative



Strong understanding of:

- Digital-first design

- Paid social creative and what drives engagement/conversion

- Platform-native design (LinkedIn, Instagram, etc.)



Hands-on experience with:

- Notion

- Asana

- Figma

- Adobe Creative Suite

- High attention to detail and strong visual taste

- Ability to work quickly and iterate based on feedback

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, evolving environment

- Strong communication skills and willingness to contribute ideas



Non-Negotiables

- Must be able to work UK hours (9am – 5pm GMT)

- Must have relevant experience in agency or eCommerce environments

- Must have experience with Notion, Asana, Figma, and Adobe Creative Suite

- Must submit a portfolio with application (applications without this will not be considered)



What Success Looks Like

- Our brand becomes visually best-in-class within the eCommerce agency space

- Creative consistently performs across organic and paid channels

- You proactively contribute ideas that elevate our marketing—not just execute tasks

title: Senior Performance Marketing Specialist
description:
(Technical, Multi-Channel | Audits-First | Reddit Required)



Location: Remote (Canada preferred)

Type: Full-Time or Contract-to-Hire

Reports to: Director of Performance / Managing Partner



Mandatory Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



Applicants must meet ALL of the following criteria. Applications that do not clearly demonstrate these requirements will not be reviewed.



10+ years of hands-on paid media experience



Experience must include direct ownership of accounts (not advisory-only or junior support roles).



Active management of multiple advertising platforms, including:



Google Ads



Meta Ads 
 / Instagram)



LinkedIn Ads



Microsoft Ads (Bing)



Reddit Ads (required)



Demonstrated management of ad spend totaling $100,000+ per month



Across one or multiple clients



Including responsibility for budget allocation and pacing



Advanced advertising analytics and optimization experience, including:



Deep performance diagnostics



Multi-channel attribution awareness



Conversion tracking validation



Identification and elimination of wasted spend



Proven ability to audit, rebuild, and scale underperforming accounts



Evidence-based decision making



Candidates must be able to clearly explain and prove performance improvements using data



Applicants must submit verifiable proof of success (see Proof of Success section below).



Role Summary



We are hiring a Senior Performance Marketing Specialist to own the technical auditing, setup, optimization, and scaling of paid media programs across multiple platforms, with Reddit Ads as a required channel.



This is a non-creative, performance-driven role.



You will not be responsible for:



Ad copywriting



Creative ideation



Brand storytelling



You will be responsible for:



Diagnosing paid media performance issues



Conducting audits for presales and existing clients



Rebuilding technically flawed account structures



Allocating and reallocating budget across platforms based on data



Proving results with measurable business outcomes



If you cannot clearly explain why performance changed and how you influenced it, this role is not a fit.



Channels You Will Manage (Must-Have Experience)



You must have hands-on, production-level experience with:



Google Ads (Search, Performance Max, YouTube – direct response)



Microsoft Ads (Bing)



Meta Ads 
 / Instagram)



LinkedIn Ads



Reddit Ads (required)



You must understand:



Intent-driven vs demand-generation traffic



Platform-specific attribution behavior



When Reddit is appropriate vs when it is not



How to control waste and volatility in high-variance channels



Core Responsibilities

1. Audits & Diagnostics (Presales + Existing Clients) — Primary Responsibility



This role begins with auditing.



You will conduct technical, performance-focused audits for:



Presales opportunities



New client onboarding



Existing clients with performance challenges



Audits must assess:



Account architecture and segmentation



Channel mix and budget allocation



Tracking integrity and conversion setup



Search term, audience, and placement waste



Funnel alignment and intent mapping



You must be able to:



Clearly articulate why an account is underperforming



Quantify inefficiencies and risks



Identify high-confidence opportunities



Support sales and strategy conversations with data-backed findings



Audit outputs must be clear, actionable, and defensible.



2. Account Setup & Architecture (Technical Foundation)



You will design and rebuild accounts with best-in-class technical structure.



Search Platforms (Google & Microsoft)



Campaign segmentation by intent, funnel stage, and business objective



Keyword architecture and match-type strategy



Search Term Optimization (search term mining, waste elimination, and intent alignment)



Impression share analysis (lost to rank vs budget)



Paid Social & Demand Generation (Meta, LinkedIn, Reddit)



Prospecting vs retargeting separation



Audience layering and exclusion logic



Frequency and saturation control



Reddit-specific:



Subreddit and interest targeting logic



Community vs interest testing



Engagement and comment signal awareness



You must be capable of correcting accounts impacted by:



Automation misuse



Over-segmentation



Weak intent control



Budget dilution



3. Tracking, Measurement & Attribution



You are accountable for measurement integrity.



Responsibilities include:



GA4 event validation



Platform conversion tracking



Offline conversion imports (where applicable)



CRM integration awareness (HubSpot, Salesforce)



Attribution model evaluation and limitations



You must clearly explain:



What the data represents



Where attribution breaks down



How blind spots are mitigated



4. Ongoing Analysis & Optimization



You will continuously analyze and improve performance across all channels.



This includes:



Search term waste identification



Audience fatigue and decay analysis



Funnel drop-off diagnostics



Budget pacing and forecast variance



You must be fluent in:



CPA, CPL, ROAS



Conversion rate by intent layer



Quality Score components



Assisted vs last-click conversions



Frequency and saturation metrics



You are expected to form hypotheses, test changes, and validate outcomes.



5. Scaling, Budget Allocation & Risk Management



You will:



Reallocate budget across platforms based on performance



Scale responsibly without degrading efficiency



Identify when not to scale



Protect profitability and lead quality



This includes:



Bid strategy selection and tuning



Controlled scaling plans



Early detection of diminishing returns



6. Reporting, Proof & Accountability



You will:



Tie optimizations directly to outcomes



Provide before/after comparisons



Avoid vanity metrics



Defend decisions with data



Develop clear performance insights for client meetings, including what worked, what didn’t, and data-backed recommendations



Clarity and accuracy matter more than optics.



Proof of Success (Mandatory)



All applications MUST include:



2–3 real case studies, including at least one involving Reddit Ads



For each case study:



Starting state



Audit findings



Actions taken



Results achieved



Timeframe



Clear written explanations addressing:



Why the account underperformed



What was changed



How success was measured



Case studies must be anonymized and focus on methodology, decision-making, and outcomes, not client-identifiable data.



Applications without verifiable proof will not be reviewed.

Lead generation campaigns (NOT e-commerce)

title: Payroll Specialist
description:
We are seeking an experienced Payroll Specialist with hands-on expertise in ADP platforms to support a fast-paced, multi-entity environment. This role will focus on end-to-end Canadian payroll processing.



This is an ideal opportunity for someone who understands both the technical and compliance sides of payroll, and can operate confidently across jurisdictions.



Key Responsibilities:



* Process full-cycle Canadian payroll using ADP Workforce Now, including earnings, deductions, benefits, and year-end activities

* Ensure compliance with Canadian federal and provincial payroll regulations (CRA, EI, CPP, income tax, ROEs, T4s)

* Perform payroll reconciliations, variance analysis, and resolve discrepancies across multiple entities

* Prepare payroll journals and collaborate with Finance on month-end close and reporting

* Generate and analyze payroll reports (headcount, labor costs, trends) for internal stakeholders

* Act as a subject matter resource for payroll inquiries, ensuring a high level of service and accuracy

* Maintain data integrity across payroll systems, including employee records, compensation changes, and benefits updates

* Support internal and external audits by preparing payroll documentation and ensuring compliance readiness

* Partner with HR and Finance on employee lifecycle events (hires, terminations, compensation changes)

* Assist with payroll system enhancements, implementations, and process improvements within ADP environments

* Coordinate payroll activities across time zones, ensuring deadlines are consistently met.



Qualifications:



* 2+ years of payroll experience, with strong Canadian payroll expertise

* Hands-on experience with ADP Workforce Now (required)

* Exposure to ADP GlobalView and/or ADP Celergo (strong asset)

* Solid understanding of Canadian payroll legislation and compliance requirements

* PCP (Payroll Compliance Practitioner) designation or equivalent is preferred

* Advanced Excel skills (reconciliations, data analysis, reporting)

* Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple payroll cycles

title: Atera RMM Specialist / MSP Monitoring Engineer (Proactive IT Operations)
description:
tera RMM Specialist / MSP Monitoring Engineer (Proactive IT Operations)



Job Overview



We are a growing Managed IT Services company based in the U.S., and we are looking for a highly skilled Atera RMM Specialist to manage and optimize our monitoring environment.



This is a part-time role (20–30 hours/week) with potential to grow into a long-term position.



This is not a basic helpdesk role. We are specifically looking for someone who has deep hands-on experience with Atera and understands how to use it to proactively manage client environments.



What This Role Is About



You will be responsible for managing, monitoring, and improving our Atera RMM platform across multiple clients.



This includes configuring alerts, managing patching policies, improving automation, and ensuring best practices are followed across all endpoints.



You should be comfortable identifying inefficiencies, reducing alert noise, and proactively improving how the system operates.



Key Responsibilities



Atera RMM Management (Primary Responsibility)



Configure and optimize Atera monitoring policies

Manage and improve alert thresholds and system health monitoring

Monitor and maintain patch management policies across endpoints

Identify and reduce false positives and alert noise

Create, modify, or run scripts for automation and deployments

Ensure all endpoints are properly monitored and compliant

Assist with onboarding new client environments into Atera



Proactive Monitoring



Perform daily and weekly system checks

Identify issues before users report them

Maintain visibility across all managed devices



Ticket and Support (Secondary Responsibility)



Assist with ticket management as needed

Document actions and maintain clear notes

Support basic troubleshooting when required



Documentation and Process



Maintain internal documentation and notes

Help improve SOPs and monitoring workflows

Provide recommendations to improve system performance and efficiency



Requirements (Important)



Must-Have:



Strong hands-on experience with Atera (not just basic usage)

Previous experience working in an MSP environment

Experience managing multiple client environments

Strong understanding of:

Windows systems

Microsoft 365

Basic networking

Experience with RMM tools, monitoring systems, and automation

Excellent written English

Strong attention to detail



Nice to Have:



Experience with scripting or automation

Experience with Active Directory and Azure / Entra ID

Experience with VoIP or networking systems



What We’re Looking For



We want someone who:



Has deep Atera experience and understands how to optimize it

Is proactive and thinks in terms of systems and processes

Can identify problems before they become issues

Takes ownership of their work

Is reliable and detail-oriented



Schedule



Part-time: 20–30 hours per week

Must overlap with U.S. Eastern Time



Compensation



Based on experience

Higher compensation available for candidates with strong Atera expertise

Opportunity for long-term growth



How to Apply



To apply, please include:



Your experience specifically with Atera (detailed)

Your experience working in an MSP environment

A real example of how you used Atera (or another RMM) to improve monitoring, patching, or automation

The word “PROACTIVE” at the top of your application



Important: We are specifically looking for candidates with deep Atera experience. General IT support experience without strong Atera knowledge will not be considered.

title: Cold Caller / Outbound Sales Representative
description:
Job description:

Cold Caller / Outbound Sales Representative

We are seeking energetic and goal-driven Cold Callers who thrive in outbound sales environments. In this role, you will proactively reach out to prospects, spark interest, qualify leads, handle objections, and book appointments or close opportunities.

Book appointments or schedule follow-up calls for the sales team

Maintain accurate records of calls, outcomes, and next steps in the CRM

Meet or exceed daily, weekly, and monthly call and booking targets

Requirements

at least 6 months of proven experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or outbound sales

Strong verbal English communication and persuasion skills

Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls for extended periods

Experience handling objections and closing or booking appointments

Goal-oriented and motivated by performance metrics

Strong data entry skills and attention to detail

Ability to work in a fast-paced, results-driven environment

Experience using CRM or dialer systems is a plus

Multilingual skills are an advantage but not required





Why Join Us

Performance-driven role with clear targets and growth opportunities

Supportive, energetic, and results-focused team culture

Develop elite sales, persuasion, and closing skills

Opportunity to grow into senior sales or account executive roles





IMPORTANT DETAILS

Fully remote - Independent Contractor status

Salary Budget: $450 to $550 per month

Shift Schedule: 8-hour shifts

title: AI Systems & Automation Specialist
description:
Role Summary

We are seeking an AI Implementation Specialist to help drive our internal APEX initiative, focused on bringing practical AI into the business to improve speed, accuracy, reporting, process consistency, and operational execution.

This is a full-time role for someone who is highly organized, resourceful, detail-oriented, and excited about using AI tools to solve real business problems. This person does not need to be a traditional software engineer, but they do need to be highly capable with modern AI tools and able to use them to build workflows, improve processes, create useful outputs, and move projects forward quickly.

You will start by supporting quality control and execution inside our APEX roadmap, helping validate outputs, improve workflows, organize information, and assist in implementation. Over time, this role will expand into building and improving AI-enabled systems across multiple departments.

This is a role for a builder. We are not looking for someone who only talks about AI. We are looking for someone who can use it to produce real results inside a real business.

What You Will Be Working On

Examples of projects in this role may include:

• AI-assisted SOP creation, refinement, and maintenance

• KPI dashboards, scorecards, and reporting support

• Workflow automations

• Process mapping and documentation

• Data cleanup and structuring for AI use

• Internal knowledge organization

• Quality control of AI-generated outputs

• Building practical tools and workflows that improve team performance

• Supporting implementation of our APEX roadmap across departments

Primary Duties

• Help execute and support our internal APEX initiative for AI adoption and business improvement

• Review, validate, and improve AI-generated work for accuracy, usefulness, and consistency

• Build and refine workflows using AI tools to improve business processes

• Assist in documenting SOPs, workflows, standards, and process maps

• Help create reporting tools, metrics tracking systems, and operational scorecards

• Organize business information so it can be used more effectively by AI systems

• Collaborate with leadership and internal tea
mbers to identify high-value opportunities for AI implementation

• Test ideas quickly, improve them, and turn them into repeatable systems

• Use good judgment to distinguish between useful output and low-quality AI-generated noise

• Support implementation projects across operations, admin, finance, customer service, and other business functions

• Maintain clear documentation of what is being built, why it matters, and how it should be used

• Continuously look for ways to improve efficiency, leverage, and execution

Tools and Systems You May Work With

Experience with all of these is not required, but comfort learning and working with tools like these is important:

• Claude Code

• Google Sheets / Excel

• ClickUp

• n8n

• Metabase

• SQL / Postgres / Supabase

• QuickBooks

• Other internal systems and operational tools

We will provide access to Claude Code for the person hired for this role.

Ideal Candidate Profile

We are looking for someone who is:

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Strong in written English

• Naturally proactive and resourceful

• Fast at learning new tools and systems

• Good at following structure while still thinking independently

• Comfortable working with ambiguity and figuring things out

• Process-minded and improvement-oriented

• Able to turn messy ideas into clean outputs

• Interested in business operations, not just technology

• Focused on usefulness, execution, and real-world results

• Curious, persistent, and capable of self-management

Essential Qualifications and Competencies

• Experience using AI tools in a practical business setting

• Ability to use AI to help create workflows, documentation, reports, or automations

• Strong written communication skills in English

• High attention to detail and strong quality-control instincts

• Ability to learn systems quickly and work across different business functions

• Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple tasks

• Good judgment and problem-solving ability

• Reliable follow-through and professional work habits

Preferred Qualifications

• Experience with workflow automation tools such as n8n 

• Experience with spreadsheets, reporting, and KPI tracking

• Experience supporting SOPs, QA, process improvement, or operations

• Basic familiarity with APIs, SQL, databases, or structured business data (nice to have)

• Experience using AI to support implementation rather than just content generation

• Experience working with U.S.-based companies or remote teams (nice to have)

This Role Is Not For You If

• You only have theoretical interest in AI and no real examples of using it to improve work

• You rely on AI outputs without checking them for quality or accuracy

• Your written English is weak

• You struggle to follow structure, naming conventions, or process discipline

• You are not comfortable learning new software and systems quickly

• You need constant direction for every task

• You cannot work the required schedule consistently

• You are looking for a side job rather than a serious full-time role

Employment Details

Position Type: Full-time

This role requires full availability during assigned hours and cannot be combined with other employment.

Schedule: Monday through Friday, U.S. Central Time, 7:00 AM - 5:00 PM with a 1-hour break

Philippines equivalent timing will vary seasonally.

Compensation: PHP 45,000 - 75,000 monthly, paid weekly

Paid leave provided for recognized U.S. holidays when operations are suspended.

About Our Organization

Join Tri-State Tree Service, an industry leader with three decades of exceptional service throughout Pensacola, Florida and surrounding areas. Our TCIA accreditation places us among an exclusive group, with fewer than 1% of tree care companies achieving this distinction.

We believe in operational excellence, continuous improvement, and using technology to create real competitive advantage. We invest heavily in systems, equipment, process improvement, and innovation. This role is part of a larger initiative to build practical AI into the business in a way that creates real leverage and long-term value.

If you want to help build something meaningful, improve the way a real business operates, and grow with a company that is serious about execution, this is an excellent opportunity.

Application Requirements

To be considered, please complete all of the following:

1. Use AI Implementer as the subject line of your application

2. Submit your current resume

3. Provide a link to a video introduction of no more than 3 minutes explaining:

o your experience using AI tools in real work

o the most useful thing you have built or improved using AI

o why you are a strong fit for this position

4. Complete the short screening task below

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

Candidates must have a reliable computer, stable internet connectivity.

Screening Task

Please complete the following short task as part of your application:

Choose one business process that could be improved using AI. Examples:

• SOP creation or maintenance

• Quality control of team outputs

• KPI reporting

• Workflow documentation

• Customer service responses

• Task follow-up or internal accountability

Submit a short response that includes:

1. A brief description of the business problem

2. How you would use AI to improve it

3. What tools you would use

4. A simple example of the workflow

5. One risk or limitation of your approach and how you would handle it

Keep your answer practical and concise. We are not looking for the most technical answer. We are looking for clear thinking, good judgment, and real business usefulness.

title: Warehouse Accountant
description:
Job Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented and tech-savvy Warehouse Accountant to manage the financial health of our inventory operations and also (perhaps) run the books for one of our property owning companies. This dual-focus role requires a professional who is comfortable reconciling data across multiple platforms (AppFolio, QuickBooks, and Inventory Software) via API integrations. You will be responsible for ensuring that every physical item in our warehouse and every dollar in our  is accounted for, budgeted, and reported accurately.



Key Responsibilities

1. Warehouse & Inventory Accounting



Oversee financial transactions related to warehouse operations and stock movement.



Perform regular API data reconciliations between our proprietary inventory software and QuickBooks to ensures data integrity.

Manage COGS (Cost of Goods Sold) calculations and inventory valuation adjustments.

Produce the monthly reporting pack, including reconciliations, and budget variance analysis.

Asseit in tracing and resolving physical stock discrepancies.



2. Property Accounting (AppFolio)   (NICE TO HAVE, not vital)



Perform General Ledger (GL) accounting for various property owners using AppFolio.

Process accounts payable/receivable related to property maintenance and tenant billing.

Manage security deposits, owner distributions, and management fees.



3. Financial Reporting & Analysis

Prepare Full Financial Packages, including Balance Sheets, P&L statements, and Cash Flow analysis.

Lead the Monthly Tie-out process to ensure all sub-ledgers match the General Ledger.



Develop and monitor annual Budgets and perform variance analysis to explain discrepancies.

Generate custom reports for stakeholders regarding warehouse efficiency and property performance.



Required Skills & Qualifications

An accounting degree, and relevant experience.  CPA not mandatory.

Software Proficiency: Advanced experience with inventory management software, QuickBooks Online and AppFolio.





Accounting Expertise: Strong grasp of GAAP, GL management, and multi-entity accounting.



Attention to Detail: Ability to spot discrepancies in large data sets and perfor
ticulous monthly tie-outs.



Communication: Excellent written and verbal English for reporting to US-based management.



Employment Details

Type: Full-Time



Why Join Us?

Stable, long-term remote opportunity.



Opportunity to work with modern FinTech integrations.



Professional growth in both the Logistics and Real Estate industries.

title: Customer Service Representative/Admin
description:
We are looking for a remote customer-oriented service representative. A customer service representative, or CSR, will act as a liaison, provide services information and resolve any emerging problems that our customer accounts might face with accuracy and efficiency. The best CSRs are genuinely excited to help customers. They’re patient, empathetic, and passionately communicative. They love to talk. Customer service representatives can put themselves in their customers’ shoes and advocate for them when necessary. Customer feedback is priceless, and these CSRs can gather that for you. Problem-solving comes naturally to customer care specialists. They are confident at troubleshooting and investigate if they don’t have enough information to resolve customer complaints. The target is to ensure excellent service standards, respond efficiently to customer inquiries and maintain high customer satisfaction.



Responsibilities

• Manage large amounts of incoming calls

• Identify and assess customers’ needs to achieve satisfaction

• Build sustainable relationships and trust with customer through open and interactive communication

• Provide accurate, valid and complete information by using the right methods/tools

• Meet personal/customer service team sales targets and call handling quotas

• Handle customer complaints, provide appropriate solutions and alternatives within the time limits; follow up to ensure resolution

• Keep records of customer interactions, process customer accounts and file documents

• Follow communication procedures, guidelines and policies

• Schedule customer Jobs

• Take the extra mile to engage customers



Skills

• EXCELLENT English communication and presentation skills

• Proven customer support experience or experience as a client service representative; use of proprietary software

• Track record of over-achieving quota

Welcome to Tri-State Tree Service, a beacon of excellence in the tree service industry for over 30 years. Based in the picturesque heart of Pensacola, FL, we've been nurturing roots of trust and quality in the communities we serve. As a TCIA (Tree Care Industry Association) accredited company, we're part of an elite group; less than 1% of Tree Service Companies attain this prestigious certification, setting us apart in our commitment to industry-leading standards and practices.



Our legacy is enriched by our unwavering dedication to technological innovation. At Tri-State Tree Service, you're not just finding a job – you're becoming part of a tradition rooted in excellence, innovation, and community growth. Embark on a journey with us and elevate your career as we continue to reach new heights in the tree care sector.



Application Process

 subject line.

Join us in delivering excellent customer service, fostering customer loyalty, and driving our team towards achieving remarkable success. We look forward to welcoming you aboard!

title: Senior Funding Closer (Full-Time | Remote | High-Ticket Deals)
description:

We are a fast-growing U.S.-based funding company helping business owners secure $50K–$250K+ in capital through credit-based funding strategies.



We are NOT a lender. We structure deals using:



Personal Loans

Credit Card Stacking

Business & Personal Lines of Credit

No-Doc / Low-Doc Funding



???? We do NOT focus on MCA (merchant cash advances)

What You’ll Be Doing

Take inbound + scheduled calls with pre-qualified U.S. clients

Review and analyze credit profiles (score, utilization, inquiries, tradelines)

Guide clients through approvals step-by-step

Hit weekly funding and revenue KPIs

Credit reports and how to read them

Credit utilization and inquiry impact

Credit card stacking strategy

Business and personal lines of credit

No-doc / low-doc funding approvals

How to qualify vs disqualify clients

How to position funding without overpromising

Requirements

1–2+ years in funding, credit repair, or lending (REQUIRED)

Proven ability to close high-ticket deals over the phone

Fluent English (clear, confident communication)

Experience with CRM systems (GoHighLevel preferred)

Ability to work full-time (40+ hours/week, U.S. hours)

Reliable internet and professional setup

Compensation

Base Pay: Starting at $900/month

Commission per funded client

Performance-based growth opportunities



Top performers can earn significantly more based on production.



What We Offer

Pre-qualified leads (no cold calling)

Proven system + support team (processors, SOPs, CRM)

Fast-paced, performance-driven environment

Opportunity to grow into leadership roles

Important



This is a performance-based role.

If you do not understand credit, funding structure, or closing — this is NOT for you.



To Apply



Send:



Your experience with credit card stacking, LOCs, or personal funding

Your experience reviewing credit reports

Types of funding products you’ve worked with

Your experience closing U.S. clients

A short voice or video explaining how you would approach a $100K funding deal

title: Executive Assistant & Project Manager Needed
description:
I am the Managing Partner of Cire Homes, a high-growth Property Management firm. We are currently scaling operations for the 2026 World Cup and need two (2) elite Executive Assistants to join our core team.



Your primary mission is to be the "Guardian of my Time." You will not just manage my calendar; you will manage me. I need a partner who ensures that my professional goals and my personal obligations (family coordination and household projects) are executed with zero friction.



Key Responsibilities

1. Strategic Accountability & Task Management



The "Today List" Ownership: You will own our task management system (Notion/Todoist). You will synthesize a "Today List" every morning and check in throughout the day to ensure focus remains on the Top 3 priorities.



The "No-Crack" Policy: You will proactively follow up on every outstanding item—vendor quotes, guest rebates, or personal errands—until marked "Complete."



Goal Tracking: We will set weekly and monthly "Rocks" (Goals). You will track progress and alert me immediately if we are falling behind.



2. Proactive Calendar & Productivity Guarding



Defensive Scheduling: You don't just book meetings; you protect my energy. This includes time-blocking for deep work and ensuring buffers between property visits.



Meeting Execution: Ensure I have full context/briefings before every call and capture/execute all "Action Items" immediately afterward.



3. Research, Coordination & Logistics



Project Management: Act as the PM for all contractors (Maintenance, Soft-washing, Networking). You handle "The Chase"—scheduling, follow-ups, and confirmation of completion.



Lifestyle Orchestration: Manage recovery support schedules for my father and coordinate with household help (Chefs, Assistants) to ensure my personal life runs on autopilot.



Recruitment Hub: Manage the hiring pipeline for other roles. You will screen portfolios and manage "paid test" tasks so I only see the top 1% of talent.



4. Organization & Digital Systems



Zero-Knowledge Security: Maintain our filing system within encrypted storage, ensuring all records are filed correctly and backup protocols are executed perfectly.



Inbox Zero: Filter communications into "Action Required," "Handled," and "Reference." Draft responses to routine inquiries so the inbox never becomes a bottleneck.



Requirements

The "Type A" Personality: You are naturally obsessed with order, lists, and completion.



Experience: 3+ years as an Executive VA or Ops Assistant. You must have experience managing the life and business of a high-level executive.



Tech Stack: High proficiency in Task Management software (Notion/ClickUp), AI Productivity tools (Lindy, Zapier), and Google Workspace.



Reliability: Rock-solid internet and a "can-do" attitude toward complex problem-solving.





Compensation & Benefits

Salary: $
USD per month (Negotiable based on experience).



13th Month Pay: Standard annual bonus included.



Growth: This is a long-term role with a stable company and potential for performance-based bonuses tied to World Cup project milestones.



How to Apply (The Attention Test)

I only hire people with extreme attention to detail. If you miss any of these steps, your application will be ignored.



Subject Line: Must be "Executive Assistant - [Your Full Name]"





The Interview Questions: Please answer the following:



What is your preferred system for keeping a busy client accountable to their goals?



Give me an example of a time you caught something "falling through the cracks" and fixed it before the client noticed.



Tell me an example of a project artifact, process, or document that you had to create. 



What is your specific availability to work in the EST timezone?

title: Bookkeeper
description:
We're a growing high-end bicycle retailer in the US (The Bicycle Station, based in Indiana) looking for a reliable, detail-oriented bookkeeper to take ownership of our monthly books. This is a long-term, part-time role (~20 hrs/week) working fully async with our CEO and operations team. Solid QuickBooks experience required.



About Us

The Bicycle Station (TBS) is a specialty cycling retail and e-commerce business in Columbus, Indiana. We sell custom bike builds, parts, accessories, and apparel through our retail store, Shopify storefront, and online marketplaces. We're in active growth mode and need a sharp bookkeeper to keep our financial backbone clean and reliable.



What You'll Do

You will own the monthly close and day-to-day bookkeeping for the business. Specifically:

- Record and categorize daily transactions in QuickBooks Online

- Reconcile bank, credit card, merchant processor (Shopify Payments, etc.), and loan accounts monthly

- Manage AP — enter bills, track vendor payments, follow up on outstanding invoices

- Maintain accurate COGS and inventory adjustments in coordination with our operations team (we use Lightspeed POS, with a planned migration to Shopify POS)

- Close the books monthly and deliver clean financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow) by the 10th of the following month

- Maintain our custom GL chart of accounts and ensure consistent categorization

- Flag anomalies, miscategorizations, or cash flow concerns proactively

- Coordinate with our outside CPA at year-end for tax prep

- Support ad-hoc financial requests (vendor reconciliations, expense audits, etc.)



How We Work

This is a fully async role. You'll communicate with us via
 and Slack — no daily check-ins, no Zoom calls required outside of an occasional monthly review if needed. We value clear written communication, proactive flagging of issues, and people who can run their own playbook without constant supervision. You set your own hours within the week as long as the work gets done and monthly close is on time.



Required Skills & Experience

3+ years of bookkeeping experience for US-based businesses

Strong working knowledge of QuickBooks Online (no certification required, but you should be confident in it)

Experience with retail and/or e-commerce bookkeeping (inventory, COGS, merchant processor reconciliation)

Excellent written English

Detail-oriented, organized, and able to meet monthly close deadlines reliably

Comfortable working independently with minimal supervision

Experience with Excel/Google Sheets for ad-hoc analysis



Nice to Have



Experience with Shopify, Lightspeed, or other retail POS systems

Familiarity with US sales tax filings (multi-state a plus)

Background working with small businesses ($1M–$5M revenue range)



Hours

~20 hrs/week, long-term role



How to Apply

Please include in your application:



A short note about your bookkeeping experience, especially with US retail or e-commerce clients

Years of QuickBooks Online experience

Your current availability (hours/week, time zone overlap with US Eastern Time, if any)

Your expected monthly rate



Bonus: Tell us about a time you caught a bookkeeping error or process improvement that saved a client money or time.



Skills Required (tags for the form):

Bookkeeping, QuickBooks, Accounting, Financial Reporting, Excel, English Speaking, Attention to Detail

title: Executive Assistant & Chief of Staff
description:
How to Apply



•Your resume

•A short paragraph (under 150 words) describing the most complex multi-stakeholder project you've supported and what specifically made it work

•A link to or example of a report, document, or deck you've prepared

•One sentence on what you'd most want to learn or improve in this role



About the Role



We're looking for a sharp, fast-moving Executive Assistant and Chief of Staff to support the CEO of a multi-brand e-commerce company. He also sits on public and private boards and hosts a growing AI-focused podcast.



This is a high-ownership role, not traditional admin support. You'll work directly with leadership on strategic priorities, own initiatives end-to-end, and use AI tools to move faster and produce better work.



You'll cover a wide range of work including business operations, content projects, research, recruiting, travel, and personal logistics.



Key Responsibilities

Business Support

• Research competitors, tools, markets, and pricing

• Build comparison tables, operating plans, project trackers, and launch checklists

• Manage task lists across multiple active projects

• Prepare briefing docs before calls or meetings

• Synthesize research into short, decision-ready summaries



Research

• Ingredient and category research for new product development

• Competitor analysis across products, pricing, positioning, ad creative, and listings

• AI market research covering news, tools, trends, and companies

• Compile source material for briefs, decks, and write-ups



AI-Enabled Work

You don't need to be a technical AI expert, but you must be curious, willing to experiment, and comfortable picking up new tools quickly.



• Use tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Canva, and Google Sheets

• Turn rough ideas into organized documents, outlines, and briefs

• Prepare podcast notes, episode prep, and summaries

• Draft presentations, memos, and research docs

• Support internal AI training materials and help roll out workflows to the team



Executive & Personal Support

• Calendar management and scheduling across time zones

• Meeting notes and action item follow-up with internal and external stakeholders

• Travel coordination including flights, hotels, ground transport, and full itineraries

• Personal admin including appointments, bills, online research, and household errands handled remotely

• Family, school, sports, and personal scheduling

• Clean trackers for reservations, applications, tasks, and deadlines



What Success Looks Like

• Projects move forward without reminders

• You anticipate what needs to happen next

• Vague ideas become clear task lists and documents

• You follow up consistently and communicate quickly

• You use AI to increase both speed and quality

• You're equally comfortable with business and personal tasks



Requirements

• 3+ years as an EA, Chief of Staff, or operations support to a US-based executive or founder

• Excellent written and spoken English with the ability to draft polished
s, briefs, and documents with minimal editing

• Strong analytical and research skills with the ability to summarize clearly and concisely

• High attention to detail and strong project management instincts

• Comfortable working US business hours or a significant overlap with US Pacific time

• Discretion and comfort handling sensitive corporate and personal information

• Stable, high-speed internet and a dedicated, quiet workspace

• Ability to work remotely and independently

title: Google Ads & Bing Ads Specialist — $10/Hour — Multi-Account Portfolio (Lead Gen + E-commerce)
description:
Google Ads & Bing Ads Specialist — Multi-Account Portfolio (Lead Gen + E-commerce)



Rate: $10/hour

Hours: 1 hour/day, Monday–Friday (5 hours/week)

Schedule: Morning CST shift preferred (between 6:30 AM – 9:00 AM CST)

Payment: Weekly via PayPal

Location: Remote, contractor role



About the Work



We manage paid search across a portfolio of B2B and e-commerce businesses. We need a specialist who can run multiple accounts efficiently, prioritize by business need each day, and execute consistent week-over-week optimization without hand-holding.



Accounts you'll manage:



Plastic Fusion — Industrial/environmental B2B (geomembrane liners, HDPE, biogas covers). Established account, 11 campaigns, lead-gen focused.

TriHaz Solutions — Medical waste compliance B2B. Established account, lead-gen focused, multi-state targeting.

The Trade Table — E-commerce (high-ticket fireplaces, saunas, outdoor goods). Shopping and Performance Max campaigns.

Sharps Disposal Containers — E-commerce (medical sharps containers). Shopping and search campaigns.



You'll manage both Google Ads and Bing Ads for each account. Bing campaigns mirror Google, so most days you'll be importing Google-side adjustments rather than running them independently.



What We Need You to Own



Daily search terms review and negative keyword additions

Bid optimization on Manual CPC (we don't run smart bidding without proven conversion density)

Ad copy testing and refinement

Conversion tracking integrity — flag anything broken immediately

Quality Score and impression share monitoring

Weekly performance summary with CPL, lead quality observations, and recommended next moves

For e-commerce accounts: Shopping feed health, Performance Max campaign optimization, ROAS targeting



What We're Looking For



3+ years managing Google Ads accounts at the strategic level (not just tactical button-pushing)

Hands-on experience with both lead-gen B2B and e-commerce/Shopping campaigns — not just one

Comfort with Manual CPC bidding and a clear philosophy on when smart bidding is and isn't appropriate

Bing Ads experience required

Strong written communication for daily Slack updates

Self-directed — you'll be working asynchronously with minimal oversight



How to Apply



 
 with subject line "Google Ads Specialist — [Your Name]"



Include:



1. A brief overview of your relevant Google Ads experience (specific account types and measurable results)

One specific example of a campaign optimization you executed that materially moved CPL or ROAS — include the before/after numbers

2. Your philosophy on Manual CPC vs smart bidding — when does each make sense?

3. IQ test result from 
/take-the-test/ (free,
ed to you — paste the score in your application)



Shortlisted applicants will be assigned a paid trial audit on one of our live accounts. The trial is how we evaluate fit — we pay for your time, no free labor.

title: Social Media Lead Generation Specialist
description:
NOTE! Please review the entire post and ensure all application instructions are followed. Applications that do not follow these steps may not be considered.



About MadeEA.ai

MadeEA is a UK based AI consultancy. We build AI agents and sales infrastructure for coaches and service businesses. We are scaling our own brand, the founder's personal brand, and our client brands across social media.



The Role

You will run lead generation across Instagram, LinkedIn, and TikTok for MadeEA and our clients. Your job is to bring qualified inbound leads into our calendar through organic content, outbound DMs, and engagement strategy. This is a full time, long term seat. We want someone who treats this as a career, not a contract.



What You Will Do

-Build and execute a content calendar across Instagram, LinkedIn, and TikTok.

-Run outbound and engagement strategy on each platform every working day.

-Track the pipeline from impression to booked call. Report weekly with platform breakdowns.

-Test and iterate on hooks, formats, and calls to action every week.

-Coordinate with our video editors and copywriters on what assets you need.

-Stay on top of platform algorithm changes and adjust playbooks accordingly.



You Are A Fit If

-You have run lead generation on Instagram, LinkedIn, and TikTok for at least two years.

-You can show booked calls or qualified leads you generated. Follower counts alone are not enough.

-You understand the difference between vanity metrics and revenue metrics.

-You write English copy that converts.

-You work UK or Manila hours and are reachable on Slack and WhatsApp during the workday.



Bonus Points

-Experience in the coaching, AI, or B2B services niches.

description:
Graphic Designer (Paid Ads Creative Specialist)



We’re looking for a highly skilled Graphic Designer who understands how to create high-converting ad creatives — not just good-looking designs. The ideal candidate has hands-on experience designing both static and video ads specifically for Meta 
/Instagram) and Google Ads campaigns.



This role requires someone who understands performance marketing, direct-response principles, and how creative impacts ad results. You should be confident in producing scroll-stopping visuals, editing engaging short-form videos, and designing static graphics that are optimized for paid traffic — not just organic social.



You’ll work closely with our marketing team to develop creatives that drive leads and sales across multiple client accounts.



Key Qualifications:



Strong experience creating static and video ad creatives



Proven work on Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns



Understanding of ad formats, placements, and platform best practices



Ability to edit short-form videos (Reels, Shorts, UGC-style ads, etc.)



Knowledge of performance-driven design (hooks, CTAs, thumb-stopping visuals)



Portfolio demonstrating ad creatives with measurable results



If you understand that design in paid ads is about performance first and aesthetics second — we’d love to hear from you.

title: SEO Specialist
description:
We are a results-driven marketing agency that helps trade and service-based businesses — including plumbers, roofers, HVAC, and electrical companies — generate more leads and grow their visibility online. We focus on performance marketing, SEO, PPC, and web design tailored for local businesses.



We’re looking for a strategic, analytical, and creative SEO Specialist to join our team full-time and help us scale the organic visibility of our clients through data-driven strategies.



As an SEO Specialist at Viva Digital, you’ll be responsible for developing, implementing, and optimizing SEO strategies across multiple client websites. You’ll manage everything from keyword research and technical audits to on-page optimization, link-building, and reporting — ensuring measurable growth in traffic, rankings, and conversions.



You’ll collaborate closely with our content creators, PPC managers, and web developers to ensure cohesive marketing strategies that deliver results.



???? Key Responsibilities



Conduct comprehensive keyword research and competitor analysis for local and national clients.



Develop and implement on-page SEO strategies (meta tags, headers, schema markup, internal linking, etc.).



Perform technical SEO audits using tools like Screaming Frog, Ahrefs, and Google Search Console.



Oversee off-page optimization including link-building, citations, and reputation management.



Collaborate with content writers to ensure content is optimized for both users and search engines.



Monitor, analyze, and report SEO performance using Google Analytics, Search Console, Ahrefs, and SEMrush.



Manage local SEO for service-based businesses (Google Business Profiles, map rankings, and local citations).



Identify opportunities for content marketing and SEO-driven growth.



Stay up to date with the latest SEO trends, algorithm updates, and best practices.



Communicate SEO performance and deliverables clearly to clients or internal account managers.



???? Requirements



2+ years of proven experience in SEO (agency experience preferred).



Strong understanding of Google Search algorithms, ranking factors, and technical SEO.



Experience with tools such as:



Google Analytics & Search Console



Ahrefs / SEMrush / Moz



Screaming Frog / Sitebulb



Google Business Profile Manager



Excellent written and verbal communication skills.



Strong analytical mindset and attention to detail.



Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines independently.



Understanding of WordPress, Shopify, and Webflow platforms a plus.



Familiarity with Google Tag Manager, GA4, and conversion tracking setups preferred.



???? Nice-to-Have Skills



Experience creating or optimizing SEO-focused content.



Knowledge of schema markup (JSON-LD) and technical implementations.



Familiarity with CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization).



Understanding of basic HTML/CSS for SEO fixes.



Experience in service-based industries or local business SEO campaigns.

title: Real Estate Cold Caller
description:
OUR COMPANY:

We’re a high-performing U.S.-based real estate investment company that closes 100+ deals per year. We’re looking for a Real Estate Disposition Sales Specialist to help match our investment property inventory with active buyers. You’ll join a remote-first team that moves fast, celebrates wins, and offers long-term growth for the right individual.

This is a great fit for remote professionals or U.S. expats living abroad who want a full-time role with consistent deals, structured sales training, and a career pathway in the real estate industry.



We’re a real estate wholesaling company with main markets in GA & SC with a focus on acquiring deals from Real Estate Agents. We transact about 80-100 deals a year with gross revenue of $1.8M+/year. You can learn more about us and our model through these two podcast videos on Youtube:







Responsibilities

• Market off-market and exclusive investment properties to a curated list of investor-buyers

• Build and maintain strong relationships with new and existing buyers

• Negotiate sale prices, contract terms, and closing timelines with buyers

• Manage leads and daily outreach using CRM tools (40–50 contacts per day expected)

• Track activity, buyer feedback, and pipeline updates consistently

• Coordinate with internal teams to ensure clean and fast closings



Minimum Qualifications

• Fluent in English with minimal accent, capable of clear and effective communication.

• Must be able to work minimum 8-hour shift on US Eastern time zone (8-10 AM EST to 5-7 PM EST).

• 6+ months of experience in real estate sales (ideally with wholesaling companies)

• At least 2 monitors and modern computer (less than 5 years old)

• High-speed internet (20 mb/s upload & download speed minimum) 

• Proven experience with outbound communication (calls, texts,
s) at high volume

• Comfortable negotiating and closing deals over the phone

• Self-motivated and able to thrive in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment

• Strong communication, organizational, and follow-up skills

• Ability to work independently and efficiently in a remote environment.



Preferred Skills

• Familiarity with platforms like GoHighLevel, Investorbase, or InvestorLift

• Experience working with real estate investors and understanding investment buying criteria

• Experience in high ticket sales or negotiation against other parties to maximize profit

• Basic understanding of real estate contracts and deal structures



What We Offer

• Full-time, remote role with consistent deal flow

• Very competitive base pay + commission structure

• Structured training and mentorship to help you level up

• Work with an established real estate company doing 100+ deals per year with over $1.8M+ in annual revenue

• High-energy culture and room for advancement

• Room for career growth and higher earnings



TO APPLY:

1. Fill in an application:

title: Financial Operations Expert VA - Accounts Receivable, Accounts Payable, Reconciliation
description:
The Work

We need a financial operations expert, not a data entry person. You will own our accounts receivable, accounts payable, bank reconciliation, and financial reporting. You will build systems using AI tools. You will work independently.



YOU ARE THE RIGHT FIT IF:

• You have 2+ years of bookkeeping or financial VA experience

• You handle AR, AP, and reconciliation — and you are good at it

• You use AI tools every day and can show us exactly how

• You have used helloFrank AI or are ready to learn it fast

• You build dashboards and reports — not just fill in spreadsheets

• You write SOPs and document your workflows without being asked

• You catch errors before anyone tells you to look

• You work independently and do not need daily direction



Your Main Jobs

• Track money coming in (accounts receivable). Follow up on late invoices.

• Track money going out (accounts payable). Flag upcoming due dates.

• Reconcile bank and credit card accounts weekly using AI tools.

• Set up Hellofrank AI and create workflows and SOPs

• Build and maintain financial dashboards

• Generate weekly and monthly financial reports.

• Set up AI-assisted workflows. Document each one in a written SOP.

• Flag financial discrepancies and risks before they grow.





Who We Are Looking For

• Detail-focused and catches errors before anyone asks.

• Comfortable working independently.

• Uses AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) every day.

• Has built financial systems before.

• Writes clear, short English.

• Thinks ahead. Flags problems before they become crises.

• Treats every task as something that can be documented and handed off.



Required Tools and Experience

• Experience with accounting software: QuickBooks, Xero, Wave, or similar.

• Strong skills in Google Sheets or Excel.

• Experience with bank reconciliation and AR/AP.

• Familiar with AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, or helloFrank.

• Fluent in English (conversational minimum).



What You Get

• Bi-Weekly pay via Wise

• PTO, Sick Leave, Paid Holidays

• HMO or Health Allowance

• Performance raise  if you exceed expectations.





How to Apply

Use your subject line as: FINANCIAL OPERATOR

Send it to: 

Include a 2-to-3 minute Loom video as your application. Answer these two questions:

1. Tell us one thing you learned about our company or industry.

2. Show us one AI tool you use in your financial work. What is the result?





LOOM VIDEO: Need to make a Loom video? Go to 
. Record your screen and face. Keep it to 2 to 3 minutes. Click Share and copy the link. Paste it in your application.

title: Senior Video Editor (AI Tools Fluent)
description:
NOTE! Please review the entire post and ensure all application instructions are followed. Applications that do not follow these steps may not be considered.



About MadeEA.ai

MadeEA is a UK based AI consultancy. Our content engine produces short form and long form video for our AI agents, our coaches, our clients, and our founder's personal brand. We need a video editor who moves fast, tells stories with the edit, and uses AI tools to multiply output.



The Role

You will edit short form and long form video for MadeEA, the founder's personal brand, and MadeEA clients. You own the edit from raw footage to publish ready file. You ship multiple cuts a day, not one a week. This is a full time, long term seat.



What You Will Do

-Edit short form vertical video for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and LinkedIn.

-Edit long form podcasts, VSLs, and case study videos.

-Use AI video tools (HeyGen, Runway, ElevenLabs, Descript, Captions, and similar) to scale output.

-Build and reuse template projects in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut Pro.

-Cut for retention. Hook in the first three seconds. No dead frames.

-Coordinate with the social media lead on what gets cut, when, and for which platform.



You Are A Fit If

-You have at least three years of paid video editing experience.

-You have a portfolio of short form work that performed (views, retention, or attributed sales).

-You are fluent in at least one AI video tool (HeyGen, Runway, or Descript) and willing to learn more.

-You can tell a story with a cut. Syncing clips to music is not enough.

-You hand off finished video without revisions on the basics (audio levels, captions, color, framing).

-You work UK or Manila hours.



Bonus Points

-You have edited for a coach, course creator, or AI brand.

-You have used hyperframes or AI generated b roll in a paid project.

-You can write or rewrite hook copy for a video, not just place it.



What We Are NOT Looking For

X Editors who need a creative brief to do anything.

X Editors who need to be taught how to use AI tools.

X Wedding, event, or corporate explainer specialists. We need short form social and VSL.



How To Apply

title: Influencer Manager
description:
About the role

We help business owners build their online reputation and get more customers through word-of-mouth — at scale. Our products are used by hundreds of local businesses across the US, and we're growing fast.



We're hiring an Influencer Manager to own our entire creator and affiliate ecosystem — from finding the right people, to building the relationship, to making sure content gets made and partners get paid on time. You'll be building this function largely from scratch, so you need to be the kind of person who figures things out and builds systems, not just follows them.



What you'll own



— Seeding Project—

- Identify and reach out to influencers and business owners we can send free products to in exchange for a short review video or post

- Manage the full seeding flow — outreach, shipping coordination, follow-ups, and tracking whether content goes live



— UGC talent —

- Post job listings and source actors/creators for UGC projects when needed

- Manage the project end-to-end — briefing talent, tracking deliverables, and making sure everything is completed on time

- Handle talent payments accurately and on schedule



— Affiliate management — 

- Find and onboard new affiliates

- Maintain ongoing relationships and keep affiliates active and engaged

- Track performance and ensure commissions are paid correctly and on time



— Operations —

- Track seeding shipments and confirm delivery

- Manage content calendars and creator deliverable timelines

- Build and document repeatable processes for outreach, onboarding, and management so nothing falls through the cracks



We're looking for someone who

- Has 2+ years of experience in influencer marketing, creator management, or a similar role

- Has actually done outreach — not just managed a list someone else built

- Is a strong written communicator in English — your outreach needs to get replies

- Is highly organized and can juggle multiple creators, campaigns, and timelines at once

- Follows through without being chased — if you own something, it gets done

- Builds systems instead of just completing tasks

- Is comfortable using AI tools to research, draft outreach, and work more efficiently

- E-commerce or DTC experience is a strong plus



This is NOT a good fit if you

- Need constant direction or hand-holding before taking action

- Have only managed content — not relationships and outreach

- Move slowly or are hard to reach

- You'll be talking to real people and managing real money. Reliability and follow-through are non-negotiable here.



Why this role

- Full ownership — you build and run the creator and affiliate function, not just execute tasks

- High-growth environment — we're scaling fast and the role grows with the company

- Direct impact — what you build directly affects how much content we produce and how fast we grow

- Performance recognized — strong output gets rewarded, not just acknowledged



How to apply?



To apply, record a short Loom video walking us through your influencer marketing experience — specific projects you've worked on and how you'd approach this role. That's it. No long cover letters or formatted applications.



One thing: include the word orange somewhere in your submission. Applications without it won't be reviewed.

 marketing agency helping DTC eCommerce brands turn their
 lists into consistent revenue machines. We build, manage, and optimize
 strategies that increase customer retention and conversions through well-crafted campaigns, flows, and A/B testing. Our work is data-driven, creative, and always aligned with each brand's voice and vision.



We've partnered with 280+ brands across a variety of industries, and we're growing fast. We're looking for an Account Executive who's ready to own client relationships, drive strategy, and deliver results from day one.



The Role

As an Account Executive at Social Scout, you'll be the main point of contact for 5–8 clients and oversee the full execution of
 marketing strategy across campaigns, flows, and pop-ups. You'll own the relationship, the strategy, and the results. You'll work alongside our designers, Klaviyo technicians, and co-founders to ensure every brand you manage is performing at its best.



This is not a "set it and forget it" role. You'll be actively testing, optimizing, and pushing for better results across every account you touch.



What You'll Be Doing

Client Communication. You'll serve as the primary point of contact for your accounts, communicating daily through Slack, Outlook, Loom, and Zoom. This includes approving designs, providing progress updates, and fielding questions. Your clients should always feel informed, supported, and confident in the work being done.



 Strategy & Planning. You'll build and execute
 strategy inside Klaviyo. This includes delivering 30-day campaign calendars each month, developing flow strategies, running ongoing A/B tests, and optimizing pop-up forms. Testing is a critical part of this role. We are always looking for ways to improve performance.



Design Coordination. You'll work closely with our graphic designers to brief, coordinate, and review
 campaign and flow designs, ensuring every send is on-brand and conversion-ready.



Klaviyo Implementation. You'll quality check and schedule campaigns, and collaborate with our Klaviyo technicians to build out
s accurately and on time.



Copywriting. You'll write high-converting
 copy using AI tools, adapting tone and messaging to suit each brand's audience and voice.



Reporting & KPIs. You'll track performance at every level. This includes near-daily updates to clients, monthly account reports, and quarterly performance reviews.



What You Bring

2+ years of hands-on Klaviyo experience building flows, campaigns, and segments across multiple eCommerce brands.



Direct experience managing 5+ client accounts, ideally in an agency or freelance setting.



Strong
 copywriting skills with the ability to write and edit short-form copy that converts across both text and image based formats.



Deep knowledge of core
 flows including Welcome, Cart Abandon, Browse Abandon, Post-Purchase, and Winback.



Confidence in A/B testing, running strategic tests on subject lines, send times, content, and creative.



Solid grasp of segmentation and deliverability. You know how to keep open rates high and
s out of spam.



Comfortable reviewing designs in Figma and giving clear, constructive feedback to designers.



Organized and reliable. You can juggle multiple deadlines across multiple brands without dropping the ball.



Who You Are

A communicator first. This is a client-facing role, and communication is the single most important thing to the brands we work with. You are personable, friendly, responsive, and on top of every message across Slack and Outlook. Clients never have to chase you. Fluent in English. 



A creative problem solver. You don't just follow instructions. You think critically about what will drive results and you're constantly testing new angles, new approaches, and new ideas to impress clients and push performance forward.



Detail-obsessed. You will be sending campaigns to 100K+ recipients at a time. Every link, every subject line, every piece of copy must be flawless. Proofreading and quality control are non-negotiable. We cannot afford errors.



Marketing-intuitive. You understand the ideal customer behind each brand and can make smart decisions around
 frequency, pop-up strategy, design direction, and messaging based on that understanding.



Why Social Scout?

Ongoing training and education in
 marketing strategy and execution.



Mentorship from proven marketers who have generated over $20M in
 revenue.



Opportunities to grow into senior strategist or team lead roles.



Internal access to
 templates, A/B testing frameworks, and optimization SOPs.



A fast-moving, supportive team with regular wins to celebrate.



If you're a strategic, detail-driven
 marketer who thrives on client relationships and wants to do career-defining work inside a team that actually values it, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Social Media & Growth Manager (Kids Music Brand)
description:
Company Overview:

We have recently launched a fast-growing, values-driven children’s music brand focused on producing high-quality songs, videos, and content for kids and families. Our goal is to build a globally recognized brand that entertains, inspires, and connects with children in a meaningful way.



We are looking for a creative, data-driven Social Media & Growth Manager to take full ownership of our online presence and help scale our audience across platforms.





Role Overview:

This is not a basic posting role. We are looking for someone who can own and drive growth across all social platforms, combining content strategy, paid advertising, analytics, and platform optimization.



You will be responsible for turning our content into real traction—views, followers, subscribers, and listeners.





Key Responsibilities:



Content Strategy & Execution

 • Plan and execute a consistent posting schedule across YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and other platforms

 • Collaborate with our production team to turn songs into high-performing social content (clips, reels, shorts, etc.)

 • Identify trends and adapt them into our brand voice (kids/family-friendly)



Growth & Audience Development

 • Build and grow followers, subscribers, and engagement across all platforms

 • Develop strategies to increase YouTube subscribers and Spotify listeners

 • Create and manage playlist strategies and content funnels



Paid Ads Management

 • Plan, launch, and optimize ad campaigns (Meta, YouTube, TikTok)

 • Run targeted campaigns to drive traffic to songs, playlists, and videos

 • Continuously test creatives, audiences, and messaging to improve ROI



Analytics & Optimization

 • Track performance across platforms (views, retention, CTR, conversions)

 • Use data to refine strategy and double down on what’s working

 • Provide regular reports with clear insights and next steps



Platform Optimization

 • Optimize titles, thumbnails, captions, and hashtags

 • Improve discoverability through SEO and algorithm strategies

 • Stay up to date with platform changes and best practices





Qualifications:

 • Proven experience growing social media accounts (especially YouTube, Instagram, or TikTok)

 • Strong understanding of content that performs (short-form + long-form)

 • Experience running and optimizing paid social campaigns

 • Data-driven mindset with ability to analyze and act on metrics

 • Creative thinker with strong instincts for viral / engaging content

 • Bonus: Experience in music, kids content, or family brands





What We’re Looking For:

 • Someone who takes ownership, not just executes tasks

 • Someone who understands that growth = content + distribution

 • Someone who is hungry to build something big from the ground up

 • Someone aligned with positive, family-friendly values

title: Full-Stack Developer (API Integrations & Automation Specialist)
description:
Availability: Must be available between 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM EST



About Us:

1st Optimal is a cutting-edge functional medicine and health optimization company that specializes in hormone health, weight loss, energy, and longevity. We leverage advanced lab testing, medical oversight, and personalized wellness protocols to help high-achieving adults take control of their health. We are expanding our technical team and looking for an experienced Full-Stack Developer to join our dynamic team and work on innovative projects.



Job Description:

We are seeking a talented and driven Full-Stack Developer to enhance our tech stack and drive automation initiatives. The ideal candidate will have experience with API integrations, Zoho One apps, Zapier, AI tools like ChatGPT, WordPress, Shopify, and more. This is an exciting opportunity to work in a fast-paced, collaborative environment where your skills will directly impact the business.



Key Responsibilities May Include:

- API Integrations: Integrate various systems and third-party tools to improve operational efficiency and user experience.

- Python & Reporting: Use Python, including the Streamlit library, to build internal dashboards and lightweight reporting tools that surface operational, marketing, and performance insights.

- Zoho One Apps: Manage and enhance workflows, functions, automations, and integrations across Zoho CRM, Booking, Flow, Campaigns, SalesIQ, and more.

- Zapier: Build and maintain Zapier workflows to automate internal processes and improve business functionality.

- AI Tools & ChatGPT: Create custom GPTs and integrate AI-powered tools to enhance our website, marketing, and operations.

- WordPress Development: Manage and customize our WordPress site, especially using Divi builder, ensuring responsiveness and performance.

- Shopify Development: Implement and maintain custom themes, flows, app integrations, and troubleshooting in Shopify.

- Google Workspace: Oversee integrations with Google Workspace to enhance communication and collaboration across the team.

- Project Management: Manage technical projects using tools like Asana and collaborate with teams through Slack.

- Continuous Improvement: Identify new opportunities for automation and optimization to streamline workflows across platforms.





Required Skills & Experience:

- Proven experience in API Integrations and automations (e.g., Zoho One, Zapier, etc.).

- Zoho One Apps: Expertise with Zoho CRM, Zoho Booking, Zoho Flow, Zoho Campaigns, Zoho SalesIQ, and third-party integrations.

- Solid experience with Zapier to automate business processes.

- Experience creating and integrating AI tools like ChatGPT, including developing custom GPTs.

- Strong knowledge of WordPress, particularly with the Divi builder.

- Expertise in Shopify Theme Development, including app integrations, custom flows, and troubleshooting.

- Google Workspace integration experience (Drive, Docs, Sheets, Gmail, etc.).

- Familiarity with Asana for project management and Slack for team collaboration.

- Proficient in JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and PHP for full-stack development.

- Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work under pressure.

- Strong communication and collaboration skills, working remotely with a diverse team.





Nice-to-Have:

- Experience with advanced data analytics and using AI tools for optimization.

- Familiarity with RESTful APIs and other web services.

- Previous work in health, wellness, or medical-related fields.





Why 1st Optimal?

- Opportunity to work on innovative, high-impact projects in a rapidly growing company.

- Work with cutting-edge technologies and improve workflows across multiple platforms.

- A collaborative, supportive, and dynamic team environment.

- Flexible work schedule and remote work.

description:

We are an embroidery and custom apparel shop in the U.S. We have a team already, and you'd be the newest addition. Your job is to service inbound warm leads looking for apparel that we will design for them (think hats, shirts, etc.).



You get to know the needs of the customer, get their requirements, and work with our design team to make mockups and make the sale. You then follow up and nurture leads effectively until you make the sale.



Basic understanding and experience working in the print/embroidery industry is needed.
