This is not a strategy only role.

This is an execution role.



We need someone who moves fast, stays organized, follows through, and communicates clearly without being chased down.



If you need repeated reminders, miss deadlines, or wait around for heavy hand holding, this is not the role for you.



What You’ll Be Working On



Most of our content is built around credit repair, business funding, personal brand content, and financial transformation.



Our audience is mostly entrepreneurs, business owners, and aspiring business owners who want access to capital and stronger approvals, but their personal credit profile is holding them back. That means the content needs to feel credible, sharp, personal, and attention grabbing. Not generic. Not overly polished with no substance. Not template driven.



Primary Objective



Keep content from going silent by making sure video and photo assets are consistently edited, organized, and prepared for posting across platforms.



Key Responsibilities



Edit raw video into short form content built for retention and engagement



Repurpose one piece of content into multiple usable assets



Edit and format photos for posts, covers, thumbnails, carousels, and promo content



Add captions, text overlays, simple branding, and clean formatting



Organize raw footage, finished assets, folders, and content libraries properly



Follow a content calendar and prepare content on time



Prepare content for posting and scheduling across platforms



Communicate clearly when something is missing, delayed, or unclear



Deliver work without needing repeated follow up



What We Need From You



Strong video editing ability



Basic photo editing and content design ability



A clean eye for formatting and presentation



Strong organization and file management



Ability to follow direction and still make smart execution decisions



Reliable communication



Respect for deadlines



Speed and consistency



Ability to create content that grabs attention without looking overly flashy or templated



Preferred Experience



Experience editing short form content for social media



Experience with CapCut, Premiere, Canva, Photoshop, or similar tools



Experience supporting a brand or business with ongoing content production



Experience preparing or scheduling content for posting



Experience creating content for personal brands, service businesses, or offer based businesses



Who This Role Is Best For



This role is best for someone who enjoys production and execution more than brainstorming and talking.



You do not need to be the mastermind behind the brand.

You do need to be someone who can take direction, move fast, stay organized, and help content get out consistently.



Creativity matters.

Execution, speed, and follow through matter more.



Performance Expectations



Content is delivered on time



Edits are clean and need minimal revisions



Files stay organized



Communication is clear and timely



Content stays moving instead of going quiet



Assets feel on brand and built for attention, not just edited



Work Details



Remote



Part time



Around 25 hours per week to start



Flexible schedule, but deadlines must be respected



Starting at $5 per hour



Room to grow for the right person



Application Instructions



To apply, send:



A short message introducing yourself



Links to your best 3 to 5 relevant samples



The tools you use for video editing and photo editing



Any experience you have with scheduling or posting content



In the first line of your application, write the word consistent, name your main editing software, and tell me your internet speed



In the last line, answer this in one sentence:



What do you do first when files are messy and instructions are incomplete?



After you apply, text me on WhatsApp at
with:



Your full name + OLJ Applicant



Example:

Jane Smith | OLJ Applicant



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.



Skills Requirement



Video Editing

Content Creation

Social Media

title: Content & Community Specialist
description:
---



## Primary Responsibilities



### DM and Community Management



- Manage inbound DMs across multiple creator personas (Ellie Whitmore, Sophia Voss, Patricia Simmons) through ManyChat

- Respond in the distinct voice of each creator - not as a brand account

- Build and optimize ManyChat automation flows to convert viewers into signups

- Flag patterns in DMs and comments that inform content direction



### Creative Research and Support (Ongoing)



- Research hooks, trending topics, and competitor content to feed into our video pipeline

- Surface viral travel content, industry news, and platform trends weekly

- Support AI content production at scale across our creator personas and creating new personas - working within an established pipeline using Higgsfield, HeyGen, and Buffer under direction



### Main Repriced Channel Support (Weekly)



- Assist with content for the main [Repriced.ai](
) brand accounts

- Help format and prepare posts following brand guidelines



---



## What We're Looking For



- Strong English writing - you can match a tone and voice, not just summarize

- Genuinely passionate about social media and how content performs

- Comfortable working in terminal / command line

- Hands-on experience with Claude Code or similar agentic AI tools

- Experience working within automated workflows and understanding how they are structured

- Comfortable using Claude or ChatGPT as a core writing and research tool

- Experience with ManyChat

- Familiarity with AI production tools (HeyGen, Higgsfield, Buffer) as daily working tools

- Obsessive attention to detail - wrong voice, wrong prop, wrong caption gets caught before it goes out

- Available for check-in calls



Please send in application here to be considered:

title: Creative Specialist – Video Editor
description:
BENEFITS

• Paid 13th Month

• Pag-IBIG Contribution

• SSS Contribution

• Flexible Schedule

• Paid Time Off

• Work Anniversary PTO Bonus

• Philippine Holiday Time Off

• Paid Birthdays Off

• Paid Every Friday via Wise. WE COVER THE FEES!

• Bonuses Paid

• Software Provided



JOB OVERVIEW



Murray Marketing Services is looking for a Creative Specialist to join our team and support client campaigns and internal projects. This new role is ideal for someone who loves video editing, creating ad concepts, and building digital marketing assets. You’ll work directly with the owner (Nathan) as his creative right-hand, helping bring marketing ideas to life.



Bonuses will be paid on top of wages as we grow and win. I want to share our success with you!



COMPANY



Murray Marketing Services LLC

(USA | Remote)



About Us



Launched in 2021 and based in Knoxville, Tennessee, Murray Marketing Services is a growing digital marketing agency that partners with service-based businesses. We specialize in Google Ads, paid social, website design (Duda, WordPress, Shopify, GoHighLevel), AI system integrations,
 marketing, and SEO. Currently run by the founder, Nathan (26), we’re expanding with a Creative Specialist to help us deliver next-level results.



Why Join Us?



Creative Focus: Work on exciting projects that include ad design, editing, and digital campaign support. Being a small team of the founder, Executive Assistant, and a Digital Marketing Support Specialist, you'll have a great mix of clients and creative work that keeps your days interesting and hopefully fun.



Ground-Floor Opportunity: Collaborate directly with the founder and be part of a fast-growing agency.



Skill Growth: Gain real-world experience with tools like Eleven Labs, Canva, CapCut, and AI platforms like Ideogram and Arcads.



Flexible & Remote: Work from anywhere, flexibility to your preferred shift time, with consistent communication via Google Chat,
, and Google Meet.



Room to Grow: Opportunity to expand hours, pay, and responsibilities as the agency continues to scale.





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES:



Video & Audio Production



• Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) using CapCut Pro, Canva Pro, Premiere Pro, or similar tools.

• Add captions, music, transitions, and branding to optimize for social platforms.

• Use AI voiceover tools (Eleven Labs or similar) to create high-quality audio for ads.



Creative Strategy Support



• Brainstorm ad angles, creative hooks, and campaign themes.

• Assist in testing new creative formats and tracking what works.

• Brainstorm social media content and captions for both Murray Marketing Services LLC and our clients.

• Guidance and training provided where necessary.



Key Qualifications



• English Proficiency: Strong written/spoken communication skills.

• Video Editing: Strong experience with CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or similar.

• AI Tools: Willingness to learn AI tools like ChatGPT, Ideogram, and Arcads.

• Reliability: Must be proactive and dependable.

• Creativity: Willing to come up with ideas on your own at times.



Compensation & Hours



• Rate: $1000 - $1200+ USD/month (depending on skills & experience).

• Hours: 30-40 hours per week (6-8 hours/day depending on skills & experience). If you are very skilled, this will grow quickly.

• Contract Basis: Independent Contractor.



How to Apply



Please send:

1. Your resume.

2. Portfolio samples (video ads, organic social media content).

3. A short introduction explaining why this role excites you.





If it’s a fit, we’ll set up a video introduction call!

title: Power BI Developer
description:
Business Intelligence Developer (Remote – Philippines)

Sola Kids Dental & Orthodontics | Full-Time, 40 hrs/week | $8–$12/hour USD (based on experience)



About Us

Sola Kids Dental & Orthodontics is a growing multi-location pediatric dental and orthodontics group based in Los Angeles. We're expanding into new markets and building out the data infrastructure to support that growth.



The Role

We're hiring a Business Intelligence Developer to build and maintain Power BI dashboards that help our leadership team, office managers, and clinical staff make better decisions. You'll work directly with our CEO and BI lead, take ownership of dashboard development end-to-end, and have a real seat at the table in shaping how we measure performance across the company.



What You'll Do

- Build new Power BI dashboards from scratch based on business requirements

- Maintain, improve, and troubleshoot existing dashboards

- Write and optimize SQL queries against our Open Dental (MariaDB) database and other data sources

- Build and maintain data models, DAX measures, and Power Query (M) transformations

- Document data sources, definitions, and dashboard logic

- Collaborate with stakeholders to translate business questions into clear visualizations



Required Qualifications

- 2+ years of hands-on Power BI development experience

- Strong SQL skills (joins, CTEs, subqueries, aggregations)

- Solid understanding of DAX and Power Query (M)

- Experience with data modeling (star schema, relationships, measures vs. calculated columns)

- Excellent written English and ability to communicate clearly with non-technical stakeholders

- Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace

- Ability to work consistent overlapping hours with U.S. Pacific Time (see below)



Nice to Have

- Experience with healthcare, dental, or multi-location retail/service business data

- Experience with BigQuery, Looker Studio, or other BI tools

- Familiarity with Open Dental or similar practice management systems

- Power BI certification (PL-300 or similar)



Schedule & Commitment

40 hours per week, Monday–Friday

Must commit to regular, consistent working hours

Must be available for 3 recurring meetings per week with the U.S. team (times TBD, but will require some overlap with Pacific Time afternoon hours)



Compensation

$8–$12 USD per hour, based on experience, paid via Wise



Apply here with the following: 

- Your resume

- A short note (3–5 sentences) on why you're interested

- A short video introducing yourself and overviewing one dashboard you've created.

- Links or screenshots of 2–3 Power BI dashboards you've built (please describe your specific role and contribution)

title: Recruiter – Temporary Construction Staffing (Zoho + Direct Hire Experience Required)
description:
We are a U.S.-based staffing company specializing in data center and mission-critical construction projects, and we’re looking to bring on an experienced recruiter to support our growing company.



This is not an entry-level role. We are specifically looking for someone who has worked in temporary staffing, construction recruiting, and direct hire placements, and is already familiar with Zoho CRM/Recruit.



You will play a key role in sourcing, screening, and coordinating candidates for skilled trades and construction-related roles across the United States.



We operate in a fast-paced, high-growth environment, so we’re looking for someone who can stay organized, adapt quickly, and think outside the box when sourcing candidates for hard-to-fill roles.



Responsibilities

• Source candidates using LinkedIn, job boards, and databases

• Perform initial candidate screenings and qualification calls

• Manage and update candidates inside Zoho Recruit / CRM

• Conduct outreach 
, LinkedIn, SMS) to passive candidates

• Submit qualified candidates for both temporary and direct hire roles

• Coordinate interviews between candidates and clients

• Maintain organized pipelines and accurate notes in the system

• Follow up with candidates consistently to keep them engaged



Requirements (Mandatory)

• Proven experience in U.S. temporary staffing (construction preferred)

• Experience with direct hire / permanent placement recruiting

• Hands-on experience using Zoho Recruit and/or Zoho CRM

• Strong experience sourcing candidates on LinkedIn (Boolean search)

• Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and adapt quickly

• Ability to think creatively and outside the box when sourcing candidates

• Excellent English communication (written and verbal)

• Ability to work independently and hit daily activity targets

• Reliable internet and work setup



Nice to Have (Not Required)

• Experience recruiting for electricians, HVAC, low voltage, or skilled trades

• Experience working with U.S.-based staffing agencies

• Familiarity with data center or mission-critical construction



How to Apply

• Brief summary of your experience in temporary construction staffing and direct hire recruiting 

• Your experience using Zoho (Recruit or CRM)

• Examples of roles you have recruited for

• Include the word “Lonewolf” at the top of your application to confirm attention to detail

title: Full-Time Recruiter – Skilled Trades & Temporary Staffing (U.S. Market)
description:
Lonewolf Workforce is a U.S.-based staffing agency specializing in temporary and direct-hire placements for construction skilled trades. We staff mission-critical projects like data centers, as well as electrical, mechanical, and low-voltage contractors nationwide.



We’re looking for a full-time recruiter who can think creatively and source high-quality candidates using multiple tools and platforms. This is not a role for someone who only waits for resumes to come in — we need someone resourceful, proactive, and confident working in the U.S. skilled trades market.



What You’ll Be Doing



Source, screen, and build pipelines of skilled trades candidates (electricians, mechanical trades, low-voltage installers, etc.) for U.S. construction projects.



Manage both high-volume hiring needs (50–100+ workers) and ongoing direct-hire roles.



Use Zoho Recruit/Zoho One to track candidates and manage pipelines (experience preferred but not required).



Apply creative sourcing strategies: Boolean search, LinkedIn outreach,
 campaigns, social media groups, referrals, and other platforms.



Pre-screen candidates to ensure only qualified matches are submitted.



Collaborate with the U.S. team daily, working full-time hours in alignment with U.S. business needs.



What We’re Looking For



3+ years recruiting experience in temporary staffing or agency recruiting.



Strong sourcing skills with a proven track record of filling roles using multiple channels.



Experience with U.S. construction/skilled trades staffing is a plus.



Comfortable working in a fast-paced, high-volume environment.



Strong English communication skills, both written and spoken.



Creative, self-motivated, and able to work independently without micromanagement.



Compensation



Full-time, hourly paid position.



Long-term role with growth opportunities.



Performance incentives for meeting placement goals.



Why Work With Us



Be part of a growing U.S. staffing agency in a booming industry.



Autonomy and flexibility — we focus on results, not micromanagement.



Long-term opportunity with direct collaboration with leadership.

title: Industrial Designer / Product Sourcing to support R&D
description:
THE JOB:



This is not an entry-level position. You will be responsible for executing the entire end-to-end product innovation pipeline with minimal oversight. From product ideation to sourcing and supplier coordination, your work will directly determine whether a product succeeds or fails in a competitive market. You will take our product strategy and independently carry it through design, material selection, prototyping, supplier vetting, and quality assurance. Every detail matters. Precision, speed, and reliability are non-negotiable. If you're not already proficient in the full lifecycle of product development and sourcing, this role is not for you.



MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES:



- Develop and refine product concepts with attention to function, aesthetics, and user experience (both pet and human).

- Identify and select appropriate materials, components, or ingredients based on performance, cost, and sustainability.

- Research, evaluate, and compare manufacturers or suppliers to ensure quality and cost-effectiveness.

- Create and manage prototypes and samples to validate design intent and manufacturability.

- Coordinate product testing and quality control to meet regulatory standards and ensure product reliability.



This role offers growth opportunities. If the selected candidate is a good fit, we will include additional responsibilities. These responsibilities will come with a salary increase:

- Conduct and support market research to identify trends, consumer needs, and competitive products.

- Assist in finding new sourcing for existing products and materials.

- Provide support in coordinating logistics, including shipping and inventory management.



REQUIREMENTS:



- Self-starter

- Proactive and persistent

- Quick learner with a positive attitude

- Strong attention to detail

- Proficient in spoken and written English

- Previous experience with product development is MANDATORY



PAY:



- $5-8/hour depending on your skill set.



PERKS:



- Ideally, you will work 4 hours per day, 5 days a week.

- If we work well together, we can ramp up the amount of work to an 8-hour workday, 5 days a week.

- Flexible working hours.

- Flexible vacation policy (just let us know in advance and take the day off).

- Opportunities for advancement based on performance, fostering a long-term, mutually beneficial relationship.



ABOUT US:



Outdoorbengal was founded by me, together with my cat Mia. We help cat parents improve the bond with their cats by driving mental stimulation, physical activity, and proper nutrition. We are located in Pennsylvania, USA. We primarily sell online across the US, but we also sell through our website to markets all around the world. I am looking for someone who can help us drive traffic to our website by creating great content that´s entertaining and helps cat parents do more and better with their cats.



TO APPLY FOR THE POSITION:



Begin your message with 2-3 sentences explaining why you're interested in the position and why you believe you're a suitable candidate. Do not exceed this limit, or your application will be disregarded.



Provide concise responses to the following questions, using numbered points for clarity: 1. Change the subject line to "I Want to Work for Your Cat [Insert the name of my cat] – I+D" 2. Describe any experience you have in Product Sourcing & I+D (from product conception to market launch). 3. Tell me something you loved and hated about the previous company you worked for. 4. Specify which aspect of this job aligns most with your experience. 5. Highlight any additional experience you possess that would make you an ideal candidate for this role.



Please adhere strictly to the guidelines outlined above. Applications not meeting the specified requirements will not be considered.



Thank you,

Albert Colominas

title: Graphic Designer
description:
We are looking for a skilled Graphic Designer to help translate complex industrial engineering into compelling visual assets across the full marketing funnel. The role focuses on building strong visual systems, creating branded technical and marketing collateral, designing large-scale and digital assets, and developing scalable design templates that strengthen brand authority with engineers, municipal stakeholders, and industrial buyers.



This is a remote role that may require some overlap with US Eastern Time hours for occasional meetings.



Must skill: Brand & Visual Identity Design, Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign), Figma



Nice to have: Industrial/B2B Design Experience, Technical Visualization (engineering schematics, process diagrams), Large-Format & Industrial Print, Motion Graphics, Using LLMs and AI Image Tools for Design



Your application
 subject line MUST read:



"I actually read the design instructions"



Applications with any other subject line will not be reviewed.



Who We Are



BuzzInsider is a boutique marketing and intelligence firm operating at the intersection of content, data, and AI — helping brands and investors unlock faster, more predictable growth. We combine advanced analytics, emerging technology, and audience-first thinking to turn attention into measurable business impact.



We work with B2B companies across multiple industries, with a particular focus on industrial, manufacturing, and water/wastewater utilities. We help these companies transform complex engineering and technical content into structured authority brands through strong visual systems, technical sales collateral, and high-quality marketing assets.



Our leadership team has very high expectations and values people who go the extra mile with creative problem-solving approaches.



www.buzzinsider.co



Salary & Hours



Starting at $4–10/hour depending on experience, with increases based on performance.



Initial work will likely be a part time as needed basis.



Project Scope



We are looking for a creative partner to help us translate complex industrial engineering into compelling visual assets. The work covers the full marketing funnel, including:



Paid Advertising (Print & Digital):

Trade journal ads (e.g., WaterWorld, WEFTEC publications), LinkedIn lead-gen ads, and Google Display banners for industrial buyers.



Technical Sales Collateral:

High-end line cards, technical data sheets (TDS), and capability statements that simplify complex flowcharts and systems.



Large-Scale Graphics:

Booth designs for industry trade shows, vehicle wraps for service fleets, and environmental signage for treatment plants.



Packaging & Labeling:

Industrial-grade labeling for chemicals or components, including ISO compliance and safety iconography.



Digital/Social:

Branded content for LinkedIn and YouTube highlighting "on-site" projects and case studies.



Core Responsibilities



Translate complex industrial engineering and technical content into clean, branded visual assets.



Build branded design templates and visual frameworks that scale across hundreds of pieces of technical and marketing content.



Design trade journal ads, LinkedIn lead-gen campaigns, and Google Display banners targeted at industrial buyers.



Produce high-end line cards, technical data sheets (TDS), and capability statements that simplify complex flowcharts and systems.



Develop large-scale graphics including trade show booth designs, vehicle wraps, and environmental signage for treatment plants.



Create industrial-grade packaging and labeling for chemicals and components, including ISO-compliant layouts and safety iconography.



Design branded social and video content for LinkedIn and YouTube highlighting on-site projects and case studies.



Identify visual opportunities for engagement and set up AI image systems to produce assets at scale.



Maintain a "rugged yet innovative" aesthetic that appeals to engineers and municipal stakeholders.



Document brand guidelines and maintain clear records of design assets and changes.



Key Requirements



Design Experience:

Proven track record in graphic design with strong portfolio work. Experience in B2B, industrial, manufacturing, or utilities sectors is a plus.



Technical Visualization:

Ability to work with engineering schematics, process flows, or complex technical content and turn it into clean, branded diagrams.



Print Mastery:

Experience with large-format printing (trade show banners, vehicle wraps) and durable industrial labeling is a plus.



Brand Authority:

Ability to maintain a "rugged yet innovative" aesthetic that appeals to engineers and municipal stakeholders.



Deep understanding of:



brand identity



typography and color theory



layout and composition



design systems and component libraries



technical and process visualization



Experience using design tools such as:



Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign)



Figma



Canva



AI image generation tools (Midjourney, DALL·E, etc.)



Strong creative and problem-solving skills.



Candidate Profile



You are methodical, creative, and detail-driven. You enjoy organizing complex visual ecosystems and turning unglamorous industrial subject matter into polished, professional design.



Traits we value:



Creative thinker

Detail-oriented

Self-driven

Strong problem solver

Focused on long-term brand growth



What energizes you:



Building cohesive industrial brand identities

Turning complex engineering into clear visual stories

Growing engagement through design and storytelling

Creating design systems that scale



Design Case Study Request



Please include one real design project you worked on and explain:



The website or brand URL



The main design problem



The actions you implemented



The result (engagement, conversions, brand consistency, or visual impact)



Example format:



Website:





Problem:

Industrial manufacturer with inconsistent branding and outdated technical collateral.



Actions Taken:

Built a unified brand system, redesigned line cards and technical data sheets, created an icon and schematic library, and rolled out updated trade show and LinkedIn ad templates.



Result:

LinkedIn lead-gen CTR improved 70% and trade show booth engagement increased meaningfully over 6 months.



If possible, include screenshots, before/after comparisons, or a portfolio link showing the improvement.



Submission Requirements



Please share your portfolio with a focus on:



Industrial Case Studies:

Show us how you've handled "unglamorous" products and made them look professional and cutting-edge. (If you don't have industrial work, share your strongest B2B or technical projects.)



Infographics / Diagrams:

Examples of complex processes (e.g., a treatment cycle or a mechanical assembly) turned into a clear visual.



Paid Ads:

Examples of B2B trade publication ads or LinkedIn campaigns.



To Apply



Send your application to:







Only
s sent to this address will be considered, responses in onlinejobs platform will not be monitored



Your submission must include:



Resume (PDF link, format: 
sign.pdf)



Design Case Study



Portfolio link with 2–3 projects you worked on and what design work you performed. Include the impact on engagement, conversions, or brand consistency.



How would you build a scalable visual system and design templates that maintain a "rugged yet innovative" brand across technical collateral, paid ads, large-format graphics, and social content.



Animal Question:

"If you were an animal, what would you be and why?"



Experience:

"For how many years have you worked in graphic design?"

"How many years of work experience do you have in total?"

"How much of your experience has been in industrial, manufacturing, or utilities sectors (if any)?"

What was the largest company you worked for, how long?

Do you also have video editing experience, if yes, pls share some work





Your available hours in US Eastern Time.

"Which US Eastern Time hours could you be available for meetings and overlap?"



Format your submission professionally – attention to detail will be evaluated.



Most applicants will miss these instructions and be disqualified. Those who follow them will be shortlisted.



Thank you,

Matt

title: Social Content Designer | Carousels, Thumbnails, Video Graphics
description:
We are building out our content team and need a Social Content Designer who can create sharp, premium looking assets that actually grab attention.



This role is focused on static and support design, not full video editing.



You will be responsible for creating short form video graphics, carousel posts, thumbnails, post covers, and other social content assets that match our brand standards and help content perform.



You will work alongside our Video Editor and report directly to the founder.



This is a long term role for someone who wants to grow with the company. We are not looking for one off freelance help.



What You’ll Be Working On



You’ll be designing content for a US based credit repair, lender readiness, and business funding brand.



Our audience is made up of entrepreneurs, business owners, and aspiring business owners who want access to capital, better approvals, and stronger financial leverage, but whose personal credit profile is currently too weak or too underbuilt to support that.



That means the content needs to feel credible, sharp, premium, and attention grabbing without feeling flashy, gimmicky, or cheap.



If your design style leans generic, over templated, or looks like standard Canva content, this is probably not the right fit.



What You Will Be Doing



Designing short form video graphics that overlay onto edited videos



Creating Instagram carousel posts, usually 5 to 8 slides, that teach, build trust, and convert



Building thumbnails and post covers for our trust page and personal brand page



Creating static social content that stops attention quickly and still feels premium



Maintaining brand consistency across every asset using our brand SOP



Turning rough content ideas or briefs into clean, finished design assets



Working with the founder and editor to keep content output sharp and consistent



What We Need From You



At least 2 years of graphic design experience, preferably in social media, branding, education, finance, or offer based businesses



A strong portfolio that shows clean, modern, premium design work

No portfolio = no review



Proficiency in Canva, Figma, Adobe Photoshop, or Adobe Suite



Strong typography, layout, spacing, and visual hierarchy



Ability to create content that feels designed for retention, not just decoration



Ability to follow detailed brand guidelines without drifting



Strong written English communication



Reliable internet and equipment



Availability for 23 to 30 hours per week



Bonus Points



Experience designing for credit, finance, business coaching, or personal brand businesses



Experience working with US based founders or teams



Experience creating educational carousel content



Experience creating thumbnails, trust building content, and attention grabbing post covers



Who This Role Is Best For



This role is best for a designer who understands how to make static content feel intentional, premium, and built to perform.



You are probably a fit if:



You know how to make someone stop scrolling in one slide



You understand the difference between clean design and high performing design



You can work within a brand without making every post look the same



You do not need constant hand holding once direction is clear



You care about details like spacing, hierarchy, readability, and pacing across slides



This role is probably not for you if:



You rely heavily on templates



You struggle to follow brand direction



You need repeated reminders to finish work



Your work looks decent but does not grab attention



About the Company



Plan B Solutions is a US based credit repair, lender readiness, and business funding company.



We help clients understand what lenders actually look at, fix what hurts their profile, and build credit that produces real approvals.



Our brand is calm authority, not hype.



Black, white, and gold. Premium feel. Clean. Modern. Credible. Professional.



How to Apply



Text me directly on WhatsApp at

Your full name

OLJ Designer Applicant

title: Recruiting Assistant
description:
**Recruiting Assistant — Viral Growth**



We are hiring a Recruiting Assistant to build and manage our hiring pipeline across editors, strategists, operations, and creative roles.



This is a high-volume, fast-paced role. You are responsible for sourcing, screening, and pushing top candidates through the pipeline quickly and cleanly.



---



## Role



You own candidate flow.



Your job is to ensure we always have strong candidates in process for every open role, without delays, gaps, or low-quality applicants.



---



## What You’ll Do



* Source candidates daily from platforms (Upwork, OnlineJobs.ph, LinkedIn, etc.)

* Post and manage job listings across multiple roles

* Filter and shortlist applicants based on strict criteria

* Enforce application instructions (e.g. keyword filters like “BLUE”)

* Request and review Loom videos from candidates

* Conduct initial screening (written + video)

* Schedule interviews and manage pipeline stages

* Track all candidates in a clean, organized system

* Follow up with candidates to keep 
ntum high

* Maintain a constant pipeline for key roles (editors, strategists, ops)



---



## What This Is Not



* Not an HR admin role

* Not passive or reactive

* Not just posting jobs and waiting



If you wait for candidates instead of finding them, this will not work.



---



## Requirements



* Experience sourcing and screening candidates (agency or remote teams preferred)

* Strong attention to detail

* Ability to quickly identify high vs low quality candidates

* Comfortable reviewing video submissions (Looms, portfolios, edits)

* Organized and process-driven

* Strong written English

* Able to handle multiple roles at once without dropping quality

* Excellent verbal English (C1 or C2 level only)



---



## Bonus



* Experience hiring for creative roles (video editors, content strategists)

* Familiarity with short-form content industry

* Experience using tools like Notion, Airtable, Slack, Google Sheets



---



## Performance Expectations



* Consistent flow of qualified candidates for every role

* Fast turnaround from application ? shortlist ? interview

* Low number of unqualified candidates reaching interview stage

* Clean, up-to-date pipeline tracking



---



## Compensation



* $800–$1,500/month depending on experience

* Performance-based bonuses tied to successful hires



---



## How to Apply



1. Write **BLUE** at the top of your application

2. Send a short Loom (max 3 minutes) explaining:



   * Roles you’ve hired for

   * How you find high-quality candidates

   * How you filter out weak applicants

3. Include examples of candidates you’ve successfully sourced or hired



---



If you cannot show a clear process for finding and filtering candidates, do not apply.

title: PowerBI Developer
description:
Business Intelligence Developer (Remote – Philippines)

Sola Kids Dental & Orthodontics | Full-Time, 40 hrs/week | $8–$12/hour USD (based on experience)



About Us: Sola Kids Dental & Orthodontics is a growing multi-location pediatric dental and orthodontics group based in Los Angeles. We're expanding into new markets and building out the data infrastructure to support that growth.



The Role: We're hiring a Business Intelligence Developer to build and maintain Power BI dashboards that help our leadership team, office managers, and clinical staff make better decisions. You'll work directly with our CEO and BI lead, take ownership of dashboard development end-to-end, and have a real seat at the table in shaping how we measure performance across the company.



What You'll Do

- Build new Power BI dashboards from scratch based on business requirements

- Maintain, improve, and troubleshoot existing dashboards

- Write and optimize SQL queries against our Open Dental (MariaDB) database and other data sources

- Build and maintain data models, DAX measures, and Power Query (M) transformations

- Document data sources, definitions, and dashboard logic

- Collaborate with stakeholders to translate business questions into clear visualizations



Required Qualifications

- 2+ years of hands-on Power BI development experience

- Strong SQL skills (joins, CTEs, subqueries, aggregations)

- Solid understanding of DAX and Power Query (M)

- Experience with data modeling (star schema, relationships, measures vs. calculated columns)

- Excellent written English and ability to communicate clearly with non-technical stakeholders

- Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace

- Ability to work consistent overlapping hours with U.S. Pacific Time (see below)



Nice to Have

- Experience with healthcare, dental, or multi-location retail/service business data

- Experience with BigQuery, Looker Studio, or other BI tools

- Familiarity with Open Dental or similar practice management systems

- Power BI certification (PL-300 or similar)



Schedule & Commitment

- 40 hours per week, Monday–Friday

- Must commit to regular, consistent working hours

- Must be available for 3 recurring meetings per week with the U.S. team (times TBD, but will require some overlap with Pacific Time afternoon hours)



Compensation: $8–$12 USD per hour, based on experience, aid via Wise



Apply at this link: 



Include:

1. Your resume

2. A short note (3–5 sentences) on why you're interested

3. A short video introducing yourself and overviewing one dashboard you've created.

4. Links or screenshots of 2–3 Power BI dashboards you've built (please describe your specific role and contribution)

title: Operations Coordinator (Life Insurance Agency | Right-Hand to Owner | Growth to Full-Time |)
description:
*ABOUT US*

We are a fast-growing life insurance agency focused on helping families and developing agents into leaders. We are looking for someone who can become a true RIGHT HAND to the agency owner. This is not a basic VA role. This is an operations role for someone who wants to grow with a business and eventually move into a full-time position.





*ROLE OVERVIEW*

Your job is to keep the business organized, accurate, and moving forward.



That means:

-> Nothing falls through the cracks

-> Systems stay clean and updated

-> Problems are caught early and handled



If you prefer waiting to be told what to do, this role is not a fit.







*WHAT YOU’LL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR*



FINANCIAL / COMMISSION TRACKING

-> Reconcile business written vs commissions received

-> Track discrepancies and chargebacks

-> Monitor overrides and production

-> Flag issues proactively



POLICY & CLIENT OPERATIONS

-> Track all submitted applications

-> Check carrier portals for updates

-> Follow up with clients for missing requirements

-> Ensure policies move from submission to issue



AGENT SUPPORT

-> Track agents through recruiting and onboarding

-> Follow up on contracting, licensing, and production

-> Help maintain accountability systems



SYSTEMS & PROCESS MANAGEMENT

-> Maintain Notion (clients, agents, tasks)

-> Improve workflows and systems

-> Build and refine SOPs



COMMUNICATION & FOLLOW-UP

-> Support inbox management

-> Follow up with clients and agents

-> Keep communication clear and timely





*WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR*

-> Extremely detail-oriented (with real examples)

-> Highly proactive (you take action without being told)

-> Strong organizational and systems thinking

-> Comfortable working with numbers

-> Strong written communication

-> Able to manage multiple priorities without losing track





*STRONG PLUS (NOT REQUIRED)*

-> Accounting or bookkeeping experience

-> Insurance or financial services experience

-> Experience building SOPs or workflows

-> Experience with Notion or CRMs





*WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE (FIRST 90 DAYS)*

-> Inbox is handled without constant direction

-> Policies are tracked with no missed follow-ups

-> Notion is accurate and up to date

-> Commission tracking is clean and reliable

-> You identify and fix inefficiencies proactively





*WORK DETAILS*

-> Remote

-> Starting at least 15–20 hours per week

-> Hours will increase as the business grows

-> Opportunity to quickly move into a full-time role

-> Must have overlap with Eastern Standard Time (EST)

-> Daily communication via WhatsApp

-> Daily end-of-day updates required





*COMPENSATION*

-> Starting at $6/hour

-> Increase to $7/hour after 90 days (based on performance)

-> Generous quarterly performance bonuses based on hitting KPIs

-> Opportunity for increased pay and responsibility over time





*VIDEO APPLICATION REQUIRED (2–4 MINUTES)*

Please submit a video answering:



-> Your background and experience

-> How you stay organized managing multiple tasks

-> Why this role specifically interests you



Upload via Loom or Google Drive and include the link. Applications without a video will not be considered.





*SCENARIO TASK (REQUIRED)*

Question: if you log into our system and see:



-> 8 client applications submitted

-> 3 missing requirements

-> 2 clients not responding for 5 days

-> 1 policy issued but not logged



What would you do first, second, and third?

(Keep your answer concise and include in your cover letter. Bullet points are acceptable as well)





*WHO THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR*

-> Needs step-by-step instructions for most tasks

-> Prefers being told what to do

-> Struggles with multiple priorities

-> Avoids ownership





*WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR*

-> Someone who wants to grow into a full-time role

-> Someone who takes pride in organization and accuracy

-> Someone who enjoys improving systems

-> Someone who wants increasing responsibility







*FINAL NOTE*

We are a company who puts God first and we want to be a blessing to both the clients and agents we bring aboard. We are looking for someone long-term who wants to grow with the business.  If you enjoy ownership, structure, and improving systems, this could be a great fit.

description:
About Us



Corporate Finance Hub (
) is the leading global learning platform for finance professionals who want to master AI, financial modeling, and modern FP&A. Founded by Bojan Radoji?i? we serve a community of 1,000+ members and 500,000+ followers across social media worldwide.

We run a Circle-based learning platform with hundreds of paying members, deliver live masterclasses, and organize online events, conferences, and expos for CFOs and senior finance leaders. We showcase the newest AI technologies transforming the finance function, 

We're growing fast — and we need someone to own the heart of what we do: the member experience.



The Role



We're hiring our first dedicated Customer Success & Community Manager to take full ownership of our learning platform and member community. You'll be the person members talk to every day, the architect of how they experience the Hub, and the engine behind member engagement, retention, and growth.

This isn't a passive moderation role. You'll design onboarding flows, automate the boring stuff, run live events, build content, surface insights, and shape what the community feels like. If you love the intersection of education, community, and operations — and you geek out about engagement metrics — this is for you.

You'll work directly with the founder and have real influence over the product and the member journey from day one.



What You'll Do



Onboarding & Member Activation

• Design and continuously improve an effective onboarding process for new members

• Build and maintain automated onboarding flows for new sign-ups

• Help members troubleshoot technical issues and remove friction from their first 30 days

Community Engagement (Circle Platform)

• Drive engagement metrics across our Circle community

• Send messages, run chats, animate discussions, and respond to member questions

• Build and run challenges, quizzes, polls, and contests inside the community

• Create ideas and content for members: discussion prompts, expert exchanges, weekly themes, and engagement campaigns

• Track engagement levels and proactively raise them with concrete plans of action

Platform Management & Automation

• Manage the day-to-day operation of the learning platform

• Integrate the platform with our website and other applications in our stack

• Automate chat and member communication where possible

• Automate certificate issuance for course completions

Content & Materials

• Create platform materials: lessons, tutorials, posts, and supporting resources

• Add new materials and update existing resources as the curriculum evolves

Events & Live Sessions

• Organize webinars, live Q&As, AMAs, and live learning sessions

• Source, vet, and communicate with guest instructors and expert speakers

• Run logistics end-to-end: scheduling, promotion, hosting, and follow-up

Customer Support & Operations

• Respond to member inquiries across
, chat, and social media

• Manage refunds, cancellations, and complaints with care and professionalism

• Collect, organize, and analyze feedback and suggestions from the community

Analytics & Strategy

• Track and report on engagement, retention, and success KPIs

• Analyze the value members are getting from the product and propose improvements

• Turn data into action plans the team can execute

?

Who You Are



Must-haves

• 3+ years of experience in customer success, community management, or online education operations

• Hands-on experience with Circle, Skool, or a similar community or learging membership platform

• Excellent written English 

• Strong analytical mindset — you actually look at the numbers and act on them

• Self-starter who can run projects end-to-end without being micromanaged

• Available to overlap with European working hours for at least 4 hours per day (out of 8 working hours per day)

Nice-to-haves

• Background or genuine interest in finance or business

• Experience with learning managment platforms 

• Experience hosting or producing live online events

• Familiarity with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) for content and operations



What We Offer



• 100% remote work — work from anywhere, forever. No "remote-friendly" tricks.

• Competitive salary — paid in EUR or USD, benchmarked to your experience inlcuding variable bonuses

• Flexible hours — we care about output, not whether you're online at 9am.

• Real ownership — you'll be the first hire in this role, shaping it from scratch.

• Direct access to the founder — no corporate layers, fast decisions, real influence.

• Learning budget — full access to all our courses, plus a yearly budget for external courses, books, and tools.

• Conference & event access — attend (and help run) the conferences we organize for CFOs and finance leaders.

• Modern tool stack — we use the best AI tools available and pay for them so you can do your best work.

• Generous time off — paid vacation, sick days, and local holidays.

• Performance bonuses — tied to clear engagement and retention KPIs you'll help define.

• Grow with us — we're scaling fast, and the right person will grow into a Head of Community / Head of Customer Success role within 18–24 months.



How to Apply

1. A short intro (no formal cover letter needed) — tell us why this role and why now.

2. Your CV or LinkedIn profile.

3. Examples of communities, onboarding flows, or content programs you've built or managed.

4. A 2-minute Loom video answering: "If you joined the Corporate Finance Hub tomorrow, what's the first thing you'd change in our member onboarding — and why?"



We read every application. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a paid trial project before final interviews.



Corporate Finance Hub is an equal opportunity employer. We hire for talent, drive, and fit — nothing else matters.

title: Admin Executive
description:
About Us

Event Strategies produces and owns a portfolio of B2B event properties across multiple industry sectors in Ireland and the UK. From flagship corporate conferences to curated industry gatherings, we deliver events that matter to the communities they serve. As we scale, we're looking for a sharp, organised Event Admin Executive who strives for the best to keep our event engine running smoothly behind the scenes.



The Role

You'll be the operational backbone of our event delivery team — managing the details that make the difference between a good event and a great one. Working closely with our Event Leads, you'll handle everything from entry processing and attendee coordination to post-event reporting, ensuring every programme runs without a hitch.

This is a remote role suited to someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, takes ownership of their work, and genuinely cares about getting things right.

Post-Event

- Assist in compiling post-event reports and performance analysis





What We're Looking For

- Experience in event coordination, administration, or a similar support role (a plus, not a must)

- Highly organised with strong multitasking ability

- Clear, confident communicator — written and verbal

- Comfortable with Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and event management tools

- Calm under pressure with a sharp eye for detail

- A self-starter who can manage their workload independently in a remote setting





What's on Offer

- Fully remote, full-time position

Our market is competitive and high-CPC — we want a true specialist who can drive qualified, high-intent roofing leads at a healthy CPL.

WHAT YOU'LL OWN:

- Google Search, Performance Max, and Display campaigns end-to-end (strategy, build, optimization, scaling)

- Landing page creation and CRO — design, build, and continuously optimize dedicated landing pages that turn paid clicks into booked roofing inspections (this is a major part of the role)

- Meta 
/Instagram) lead-gen campaigns as a secondary channel

NOTE: Local Service Ads (LSA) is handled by an outside agency — you will NOT manage LSA.



MUST-HAVES:

- 5+ years hands-on Google Ads management

- Strong landing page creation & CRO experience (please share live examples)

- Hands-on GoHighLevel (GHL) experience — funnels, automations, workflows

- Proven results with home services, contractors, or roofing companies (be ready to show examples)

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Self-directed — we don't want to micromanage; we want a specialist who tells us what to do

- Comfortable with at least some overlap with US Central Time hours

- Familiarity with CallRail, GA4, GTM, and a CRM (HubSpot, JobNimbus, AccuLynx, or similar)



NICE-TO-HAVES:

- Experience with storm-driven seasonal demand

- Conversion copywriting for landing pages

- Additional landing page builder experience (Unbounce, Instapage, WordPress, Webflow)



COMPENSATION: $700–$1,200/month USD depending on experience.



HOW TO APPLY (please follow exactly — applications missing any of these will be ignored):

1. Put ROOFING-GADS-2026 in the subject line of your

Send applications to:

About Our Clinic

A women’s health physiotherapy clinic supporting women through pre-conception, pregnancy, postpartum, perimenopause, menopause and musculoskeletal health.

Long-term position

Resume

Short intro video of what you think about the role (No Script Reading)

OnlineJobs link

Portfolio (optional)

title: Real Estate VA Admin (Transaction Coordinator/Listing Coordinator) (2)
description:
+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

Listing Coordinator /  Transaction Coordinator Application

+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++





We’re hiring a highly organized, systems-minded Real Estate Transaction Coordinator.

This role is for someone who lives in the details, obsesses over contract deadlines, and can manage a complex transaction pipeline without a single ball being dropped. You aren't just "checking boxes"—you proactively identifies gaps in the contract-to-close process, automates repetitive tasks, and ensures our clients and partners experience a seamless, "magic 
nt" closing every single time.



IMPORTANT: Please read the entire job listing carefully. 

The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. 

These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



==============

ABOUT THE TEAM

==============





Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? 

Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? 

Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and are dedicated to getting results? 

Then we might be a fit!  



Why should you partner with us? WE ARE NOT YOUR ORDINARY CLIENT! 
 



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM! 







=============

Our Core Values:

=============



DELIGHT THE CLIENT: 

We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.



MASTER YOUR CRAFT: 

We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.



FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS: 

When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.

We are building an exceptional place to work with strong systems and high standards, not just managing tasks for a real estate business.



-----------------------

    ABOUT YOU

-----------------------



Do you think in priorities, timelines, and dependencies? 

Do you enjoy turning a ratified purchase contract or listing agreements into a structured project plan with clear deadlines? Are you the type of person who catches a missing signature or a math error on a Closing Disclosure (CD) before anyone else sees it? 

Do you take pride in building clean systems, documenting SOPs, and keeping a team aligned without needing constant supervision? 

Do you love to communicate quickly and help keep the project on track?

If you are a high-level operator who wants to own the "engine room" of a high-volume real estate team, keep reading.







----------------------------

RESPONSIBILITIES

----------------------------





Transaction & Listing Management

-------------------------------------------------

Contract-to-Close Ownership: 

Manage every aspect of buyer and seller transactions from signed purchase agreement to closing using Skyslope and GoHighLevel.



Strategic Preparation:

 Execute comprehensive pre-listing and pre-offer checklists to ensure every property and offer is positioned for success.



Technical Research Briefs: 

Develop detailed research briefs including property mechanicals and a verified timeline of large home system replacement dates



Market Intelligence: 

Prepare listing agent comps and pricing directives to support senior brokers in high-level strategic positioning.



Offer Packet Coordination: 

Prepare an offer packet draft with precise signature blocks and routing, and submit to the broker for review. 



Compliance & Auditing: 

Submit all required documentation to the office broker; ensure 100% file compliance at direction of the responsible broker by monitoring for no missing disclosures.



Closing Logistics: 

Coordinate with Attorneys, Lenders, Title officers and brokers; collect CD/ALTA statements for broker accuracy review against the commission agreement.







Project & Operations Management

-------------------------------------------------



 & Communication Prep: 

Draft
 prep templates for senior brokers to streamline high-level communication with clients and high-stakes partners



System Building: 

Spot inefficiencies in the workflow and design/implement improvements or automations to reduce manual effort.



SOP Documentation: 

Document workflows and create step-by-step guides so the process is repeatable and scalable.



KPI Reporting: 

Maintain and update the "Deal Tracker" G-Sheet and GHL Opportunity values to ensure leadership has accurate data at all times.



The "Connective Tissue": Act as the bridge between leadership, agents, and clients to ensure no ball is ever dropped.







---------------------------------

      REQUIREMENTS

---------------------------------









Experience & Capability

---------------------------------



Must have extensive experience in real estate transaction coordination, transaction management, or as a high-level operations associat



Preferred BPO Experience: 

Previous background in BPO Customer Service is highly preferred.



Project Management Experience: 

Comfortable managing 20+ active files simultaneously with varying deadlines.



Automation Mindset: 

Experience automating workflows (or a deep understanding of how to design them) is highly preferred.



Technical Proficiency: 

Working knowledge of Skyslope and GoHighLevel (GHL) is strongly preferred but not required.

 Fluent in AI tools (Gemini/Claude/OpenClaw) to improve output speed.





Work Style & Standards

---------------------------------



Extremely Detail-Oriented: 

You find the needle in the haystack every time.



Near-Native English: 

Exceptional written and spoken communication skills.



Proactive Ownership: 

You don’t wait to be told something is broken; you anticipate it and fix it before it breaks.



Speed & Urgency: 

You move with a sense of purpose and meet every deadline, no excuses





Technical Requirements

---------------------------------

A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION is required (at least 150mbps).



Must be available to respond to messages within a 12-hour daily window

 (standard core hours 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST).



Must be flexible to work 2–4 hours on weekends as needed for urgent business requirements







APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS

STEP 1: Application

Please submit your application 

To ensure you have read through the requirements, please write the phrase "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field of the application.



STEP 2: Initial Interview



If your application indicates you might be a great fit, you will be invited to participate in a quick, 10- to 15-minute initial screening interview.



STEP 3: Case Interview



Candidates who pass the initial screening will be invited to a 1-hour case interview. A case interview is an interactive session where we present you with a real-world scenario or business challenge relevant to the role. Rather than just talking about your past experience, this allows us to see your problem-solving process, technical logic, and how you tackle practical situations in real-time.



STEP 4: Reference Check



This is the final step before an official offer is extended. The final candidate(s) must provide one former employer/lead reference and one character reference.



STEP 5: The 90-Day Trial Period



If an offer is made and accepted, your employment will begin with a 90-day PAID trial period. This period is dedicated to ensuring a strong mutual fit—both for the responsibilities of the role and alignment with our core values. 



During these 90 days, we will provide you with all the necessary training, onboarding, and support you need to succeed and thrive on our team. 

You will be expected to master the Skyslope/GHL workflow, meet all transaction deadlines, and begin documenting/improving our internal systems. A successful trial results in a permanent invitation to the team.

Competitive pay

Rewarding work environment



Benefits

Flexible schedule

Health insurance

Paid time off

Pay based on experience

title: IT Technical Support Engineer - Permanent WFH Remote, Flexible Hours (+10 GMT)
description:
*** DO NOT APPLY UNTIL YOU HAVE READ THIS AD IN FULL ***



Amigo Technology is an IT service business and Managed Service Provider (MSP), located on the Sunshine Coast, Australia. We have been operating for 16 years, with the goal of making computers and technology friendlier to our awesome small business clients. We are seeking a Technical IT service officer to join our friendly team via a permanent, work-from-home arrangement.



By joining the Amigo team, you will enjoy:



- A flexible work from home position, up to 40 hours per week, on a schedule that works for you

- Unlimited access to our internal virtual lab, mentoring and training programs, where you will get to experience the latest and greatest technologies with a strong emphasis on open source systems

- Plenty of hands-on time with workstations, servers, networking and cybersecurity projects

- A friendly team atmosphere where you’ll need a good sense of humour!

- Daily opportunities to help ordinary people with technology challenges in a team environment, with the goal of making technology friendly

- Competitive earnings, typically between 370php and 475php per hour, depending on ability and experience, plus bonuses



Ready to join? Here’s what you’ll need:



- A keen interest in working with and growing your skill sets through a wide variety of modern computing technologies (both Windows and Linux - bonus points if you have a home lab!)

- A high level of attention to detail (you must put the word "AMIGO" in the “Additional Comments” section of our application form to be considered)

- At least two years of experience working in an IT service position, ideally in an MSP that works with Windows 11, Microsoft 365 OR Google Workspace environments



This position will have many opportunities for growth, and over time you will have to encourage you to work with a wider range of technologies and platforms. Prior experience with the following would be greatly appreciated and will lead to greater earnings, although this is not a requirement:



- Debian-based Linux (eg. Linux Mint 22 / Ubuntu 24.04 or newer)

- Apple MacOS 13+

- Proxmox 8+ & Docker (or other hypervisor / virtualisation platforms)

- Small business networking and storage systems (eg. Opnsense, OpenWrt, Cockpit), including configuring Wi-Fi, DHCP, QOS, VLANs, VPNs, Samba, ZFS RAID, etc

- FreePBX 16+ / Asterisk, IP Phones & SIP



Your duties will include the following:



- Processing technical support requests, enquiries and system alerts

- Providing remote IT services via RMM & IP KVMs

- Assisting with new and existing IT systems, including setting up, migrating, monitoring, documenting and securing technical systems, such as workstations, servers and cloud-based infrastructure



If you have made it this far, great! Before you apply:



- You will be expected to learn quickly and contribute as part of a team. The workload will be both challenging and rewarding.

- We conduct background checks and our team is required to use managed remote workstations. Dishonest conduct will be quickly caught. If you’re thinking of using a mouse jiggler or being OE, please don’t apply.

- Applicants MUST submit their application via our application form, which can be found on the Amigo Technology Sunshine Coast website via the Careers section in the top menu. All other application methods will be IGNORED. 
/form-technical-officer-application



Please double check the responses to your resume to ensure they are correct - over 90% of applicants fail to submit their application with correct answers. We will only contact valid submissions. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: UK Amazon Arbitrage VA – Product Research & Listing Specialist
description:
THIS IS NOT A BEGINNER ROLE. Please do not apply if you do not have at least 3 years of proven experience in Amazon arbitrage specifically for the UK marketplace.



---



ABOUT THE ROLE



I am a UK-based Amazon seller starting an online and retail arbitrage FBA business. I am looking for a highly experienced, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support my store on a part-time basis, with the potential to grow into a full-time role for the right person.



This is a long-term position for someone who takes pride in their work, communicates clearly, and consistently delivers profitable, well-researched leads.



---



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING



• Sourcing profitable online arbitrage leads from UK retail websites (e.g. Argos, B&Q, John Lewis, Tesco, Boots, etc.)

• Validating leads using Keepa — including Buy Box analysis, sales rank history, and price trend evaluation

• Checking profitability and ROI using SellerAmp SAS, accounting for FBA fees, VAT, and competition

• Flagging gating, IP complaints, and hazmat issues before submitting leads

• Creating and optimising Amazon product listings — titles, bullet points, descriptions, and backend keywords

• Submitting leads via a structured Google Sheet with all required data clearly filled in



---



REQUIREMENTS



 Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience in Amazon arbitrage (online and/or retail)

 UK marketplace experience is ESSENTIAL — US-only experience will not be considered

 Daily working knowledge of Keepa and SellerAmp SAS — you must be able to demonstrate this

 Strong understanding of Buy Box behaviour, FBA fee structures, and UK VAT implications

 Experience creating and optimising Amazon listings for the UK marketplace

 Excellent written English

 Reliable internet connection and your own equipment

 Available for consistent part-time hours each week



---



NICE TO HAVE



• Experience with Tactical Arbitrage or OAXray

• Familiarity with Helium 10 for keyword research

• Experience with retail arbitrage scanning tools (e.g. Scan Unlimited)



---



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, your application MUST include the following — incomplete applications will not be reviewed:



1. A brief summary of your Amazon UK arbitrage experience (not a generic cover letter)

2. The tools you use daily and your honest proficiency level with each

3. A short Loom video (3–5 minutes) walking through how you would analyse a product using Keepa — this does not need to be polished, just real

4. Your expected hourly or monthly rate for part-time work



Applications that do not include the Loom video will not be shortlisted.



---



Shorty-listed candidates will be given a paid trial task before any offer is made.



I am looking to build a long-term working relationship, not a quick hire. If that sounds like you, I look forward to hearing from you.

title: Funnel Builder (Credits & Tax Industry)
description:
Job Overview:

We are seeking a results-driven Funnel Builder to create, optimize, and manage high-converting sales funnels for tax credit and financial service offers. The ideal candidate understands both the technical and strategic side of funnel building.



Key Responsibilities:



Build and optimize sales funnels (landing pages, opt-ins,
 flows)

Integrate funnels with CRM systems and automation tools

Collaborate with marketing team to improve conversion rates

Set up tracking, analytics, and performance monitoring

 marketing, SMS marketing, CRM cleanup, and basic reporting.

 and SMS marketing campaigns in Salesforce

s, documents, and internal communications

mbers to make sure deadlines are met

 campaigns, or SMS campaigns

title: Product & Ad Researcher — Meta Ads Library / Trendtrack (Dropshipiping Company)
description:
We run two beauty and health e-commerce brands targeting a 40+ audience. We're looking for a researcher who can consistently find ads for products that are already proven and actively scaling — meaning campaigns with significant spend behind them, multiple creatives running, and clear traction in the market right now.



This is not a product discovery role. We are not looking for untested products or early signals. We want ads for products that are already winning — your job is to find them, document them, and deliver structured swipe files we can build our own creatives from.



What you'll do:

Search Meta Ads Library and Trendtrack for products with active, scaled campaigns — high spend signals, multiple ad variants, long run times

Identify advertisers who are clearly investing heavily in a product right now, not just testing

Deliver structured swipe reports per ad: product, hook summary, angle, format, estimated spend signal, and why it's working

Flag recurring hooks and angles across multiple advertisers in the same niche — patterns matter

Submit research on a consistent daily/weekly schedule with clean, organised output





What we're looking for:

Hands-on experience with Meta Ads Library and Trendtrack — you know how to read spend signals, creative volume, and ad longevity

Ability to tell the difference between a product being tested and a product being scaled — this is the core skill

Basic understanding of direct-response hooks and angles (you don't need to write them, but you need to recognise them)

Experience in beauty, health, or supplement e-commerce is a strong plus

Reliable and self-managed — delivers clean output without follow-up needed



What to include in your application:

Brief overview of your experience with Meta Ads Library and Trendtrack specifically

A sample swipe file or research output — show us how you identify a scaled winner, not just any ad you found

The niches you've researched most

Your availability and preferred rate

Research the Meta Ad Library and competitor creatives for inspiration — identify winning angles, hooks, and formats worth adapting.

Edit AI VSLs using tools like ElevenLabs, HeyGen, Higgsfield, Runway, Pika, and Midjourney (prompts and SOPs provided).

Edit short-form video ads in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or After Effects — strong hooks, tight pacing, captions, sound design.

Produce static image ads for Meta — before/afters, comparison ads, infographic-style creatives — using Photoshop, Canva, or AI image tools.

Source and edit UGC, B-roll, stock footage, and product clips into cohesive ad creatives.

Produce platform-native variations (Meta feed, Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) and translated versions using AI tools.



EXPECTED RESULTS



Deliver a daily batch of creatives (videos and statics) based on the day's brief.

Hit targeted KPIs such as 3%+ CTR and 3%+ conversion rate on tested creatives.

Fast turnaround on revisions.



REQUIREMENTS



At least 2 years of hands-on experience editing video creatives for the dropshipping/e-commerce space.

Health & beauty experience is a strong plus.

Solid understanding of online buyer psychology, scroll-stopping hooks, and what makes ads convert on Meta.

Strong grasp of hooks, pacing, retention curves, and direct-response principles.

Fluent in English, both spoken and written.

Strong internet connection and a fast computer capable of handling video editing.



TECHNICAL SKILLS NEEDED



Proficient in CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, or After Effects.

Working knowledge of AI creative tools (ElevenLabs, HeyGen, Higgsfield, Runway, Pika, Midjourney, ChatGPT).

Photo editing skills (Photoshop or Canva).

Bonus: experience producing ads end-to-end with AI (AI avatars, AI voiceovers, AI-generated B-roll, AI image ads).



PERKS



Work from home.

Bonuses for each winning creative produced.

Long-term, stable role with consistent workload and room to grow.



HOURS

Full-time position (8h/day). Flexible schedule as long as you deliver creatives before deadline.

RATE

$5–8/hour depending on experience + bonuses.

HOW TO APPLY



Double-check that you meet the requirements and technical skills for the position.

Change the subject line to "I Want to Work for You M."

At the top of your message, write 4–5 sentences to introduce yourself and tell us why you'd like this position and why you're a good fit (please don't write more than that).

Add a link to your portfolio or reel showing examples of e-commerce ads, AI ads, VSLs, or short-form creatives you've edited before.

Include the word "mangga" at the very end of your response. Why? This lets us see who's actually paying attention.
