title: Intermediate Australian Tax Accountant
description:
About the Role



We are seeking an experienced tax accountant with a strong background in Australian taxation and proficiency in Xero. The ideal candidate will have at least four years of experience in Australian tax and accounting and will be responsible for preparing financial statements and tax returns for various entity types, including companies, trusts, partnerships, and individuals.



Key Responsibilities



• Prepare financial statements and tax returns for companies, trusts, partnerships, individuals and SMSFs.

• Ensure compliance with Australian tax laws, including income tax, GST, and BAS reporting.

• Reconcile accounts and manage general ledger entries.

• Work with Xero & BGLSF360 (optional) to process transactions, maintain records, and generate reports.

• Assist in tax planning strategies and provide general tax advice as required.

• Communicate with the team to ensure deadlines and client expectations are met.

• Looking at implementing and providing Advisory information to the Director

• Assist the Director with initial reviews of financial statements, tax returns, and supporting workpapers.

• Identify basic errors, inconsistencies, and missing information prior to final review.

• Support the team by helping improve accuracy and completeness of work before submission to the Director.



Key Requirements



• Minimum 4 years of experience in Australian tax and accounting.

• Strong English literacy and speaking skills

• Proficiency in Xero & BGLSF360 (negotiable) and cloud-based accounting software.

• Strong knowledge of Australian taxation, including company tax, trust distributions, BAS, IAS, and GST.

• Experience preparing tax returns and financial statements for various entity structures.

• Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and manage workloads efficiently.

• Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

• Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.





What We Offer



• Competitive salary based on experience.

• Flexible remote working environment.

• Opportunity to work with a growing Australian accounting firm.

• Ongoing training and development to enhance your skills.

• Long-term career growth potential.



If you meet the qualifications and are looking for a long-term opportunity in an Australian accounting firm, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Posting Site Service Operations (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
Company: 
 — International social media marketing platform

Schedule: Full-time, fully flexible — no fixed 8-hour shift. As long as services are healthy and tickets are monitored throughout the day, you manage your own time.

Location: Remote





ABOUT 



FlowFame (
) is a growing SMM store selling Instagram, TikTok, YouTube,
, Snapchat, Spotify, and other social media services to international customers.



Our store is connected to a panel (
) which pulls services from multiple wholesale providers. You can visit 
 and create a free account to browse the services — these are the same services our customers buy on 
. Your job is to keep these services running smoothly on our store and handle customer issues when they come up.





WHAT YOU WILL DO



Service Operations :

- Monitor service health daily — check completion rates, spot stuck or failing services, and take action

- Find and test replacement services on provider panels when current ones break or underperform

- Import new services into our connected panel, update the service registry on 
.

- Open refill and support tickets with providers when services underdeliver

- Communicate with providers via their ticket systems and
 groups

- Compare rates, refill policies, speed, and max quantities across providers to find the best options

- Proactively look for better or cheaper services — not just fix what breaks



Customer Support ( 10% of your time):

- Handle customer tickets from WhatsApp,
, and website live chat, All channels feed into one dashboard on 
 — you reply from there and messages go back to the customer on their channel

- Most tickets are simple: check the live order status, reprocess if stuck, or send a canned response

- Messages are auto-translated between English and Arabic — you work in English

- Typical issues: order not started, slow delivery, results dropped, general questions

- One-click reprocess, one-click refund, one-click close with auto-notification





WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- Someone who has worked with SMM panels before — you know what services, providers, rates per 1K, refill, min/max, and order statuses mean

- You can navigate provider panels, find services, compare options, and make decisions without being told exactly what to do

- You understand that services break, providers change things, and platforms (Instagram, TikTok, etc.) affect delivery — and you know how to respond

- Reliable, checks in multiple times throughout the day, and communicates clearly in English

- Laptop/PC with stable internet and Chrome







WHAT WE PROVIDE



- Full training on our specific systems (custom dashboard, service registry, panel admin)

- Custom-built support dashboard that handles translations, order status, reprocessing, and notifications automatically

- Direct communication with the founder — small team, fast decisions

- Performance bonus up to PHP 5,000/month based on service health and ticket resolution

- Long-term role with growth as the company scales

- Truly flexible schedule — we care about results, not hours logged





A TYPICAL DAY



There is no fixed shift. You check in multiple times throughout the day at times that work for you.



First check-in — Look at service health. Any services stuck or failing? If yes, start working on replacements.

Throughout the day — Monitor incoming tickets. Most take under a minute to handle. Check back every few hours.

When a service breaks — Find a replacement on provider panels, test it, import it, swap it in. This is the real work.

Follow-ups — Check on pending provider refill requests. Browse for better-rate services when things are quiet.



On quiet days (services running well), the work is light — just monitoring and handling a few tickets. On busy days (a provider breaks something), you will spend more time finding and switching services. The better you are at operations, the more quiet days you get.





HOW TO APPLY



Have you ever used an SMM panel or web admin dashboard for work? Describe briefly what you did with it.



You can also visit 
 to explore the services we sell on 
. It will give you a sense of the type of work involved.





We are a small, growing team looking for someone who already understands this industry and wants to grow with a startup. If you know SMM panels and want a stable long-term role with real flexibility, we would love to hear from you.

title: email dropshipping shopify customer support
description:
Customer Support & Refund Reduction Specialist – Fashion Dropshipping (Start: ~1 hr/day, Grow to Full-Time)



We are Lilly Mae London, a UK-based women's fashion brand targeting women aged 40 to 65. We operate a dropshipping model and are growing across multiple markets. We are looking for someone who has been here before — someone who understands fashion dropshipping from the inside and knows how to keep customers happy while protecting the business from unnecessary refunds and cashbacks.



This role starts at approximately 1 hour per day and will grow into a full-time position as the business scales. We are not looking for someone to just answer
s. We are looking for someone who genuinely understands our industry and wants to help us build something long-term.



---



ABOUT THE ROLE



You will be responsible for two things: handling customer
s professionally, and actively helping us reduce refund and cashback rates over time.



On the support side, you will work with our ready-made
 templates and SOPs. Everything is documented — you follow the process, fill in the details, and respond within 24 hours.



On the refund side, you will track every case in Google Sheets, spot patterns, and communicate your findings to the store owner on a weekly basis. If the same complaint keeps coming up — wrong sizing, product expectations, delivery delays — you flag it so we can fix it at the source.



This is a role for someone who thinks like an owner, not just an employee.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Customer support:

- Check the inbox daily and respond to all customer
s within 24 hours

- Use our provided templates and refund resolution framework (step-by-step process provided)

- Handle complaints about sizing, delivery, refund requests, and general questions

- De-escalate unhappy customers professionally and keep them loyal where possible

- Know when to escalate to the store owner — and do it quickly



Refund & cashback reduction:

- Log every refund and complaint case in Google Sheets with full details

- Track refund reasons, patterns, and outcomes weekly

- Prepare a short weekly report in Google Sheets: number of cases, reasons, resolution per step, total refund cost

- Proactively flag recurring issues to the store owner (e.g. sizing complaints on specific products, packaging issues, supplier problems)

- Suggest improvements to templates, product descriptions, or size guides based on what you see in the inbox



---



TOOLS WE USE



- Titan

- Shopify (order lookup and tracking)

- Google Sheets (case logging and weekly reporting)





---



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



This role is not for a general VA. We need someone who specifically understands fashion dropshipping. That means you already know:



- Why customers complain about sizing in fashion dropshipping and how to handle it

- How to communicate with a customer who received a product that looks different from the photos

- The difference between a customer who genuinely has a complaint and one who is trying to get a free refund

- How to protect a store from PayPal chargebacks through good communication

- How product descriptions and size guides directly impact refund rates



In addition, you must have:

- Fluent written English — warm, professional, and accurate

- At least 1 to 2 years of experience in fashion or general e-commerce customer support

- Strong Google Sheets skills — you will be building and maintaining our tracking sheet

- A genuine interest in reducing refund rates, not just closing tickets

- The ability to spot patterns and communicate them clearly in a weekly report

- Reliability — you must be available every day, even for a short window



---



WHAT WE OFFER



- Freelance, paid per hour

- Start with approximately 1 hour per day — easy to fit alongside other work

- Full SOPs,
 templates, and refund framework provided from day one

- Direct communication with the store owner — fast decisions, no bureaucracy

- Weekly check-ins via Slack to review the report together

- Real growth opportunity — this role expands as the business grows

- Long-term position for the right person



---



HOW TO APPLY



Please send a short message that includes:



1. Your specific experience with fashion dropshipping customer support

2. An example of how you have helped reduce refunds or resolve complaints in a previous role

3. Your Google Sheets experience — what kind of trackers or reports have you built?

4. Why you are interested in a role that starts small and grows over time



One last thing: we will ask you to complete a very short test task before we make a decision. It takes about 15 minutes and involves responding to two sample customer
s. This helps us see how you write and how you follow instructions.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Process Support Specialist
description:
We are seeking candidates with a background in HVAC or other service-trade industries. If you have relevant experience in this field, we encourage you to apply.



To be considered for this role, applicants should have a background in at least one of the following industries: HVAC, Plumbing, Roofing, Construction, Property Management, or Facilities Management.



ABOUT

We are looking for a detail-oriented Process Support Specialist to assist with day-to-day administrative tasks, documentation, and internal coordination. This role is well-suited for someone who is organized, proactive, and has experience supporting service-based or field operations businesses. 



What You’ll Be Doing

- Provide administrative and operational support to managers and tea
mbers

- Prepare invoices, estimates, and quotations

- Handle documentation, filing, and record maintenance

- Assist in creating basic social media content when needed



Qualifications

- Proven experience in HVAC or service-trade industries (HVAC, Plumbing, Roofing, Construction, Property Management, or Facilities Management) - MUST

- Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

- Experience as a Virtual Assistant, Administrative Assistant, or similar role- 

- Highly organized with excellent attention to detail

- Able to work independently with minimal supervision

- Experience handling permits and rebate processing

- Familiarity with CRM platforms or AI-powered tools



WORK SCHEDULE

This is a full-time remote role requiring 8 hours per day, 5 days per week, following a US timezone schedule (night shift in the Philippines).



As a reminder, please ensure your CV is accessible and that any links you provide are working properly.

title: Landing page, Funnel
description:
PROJECT OBJECTIVE



The objective of this project is to build the core revenue and infrastructure system for the business from the ground up.



The system must:

• Clearly guide visitors to the correct starting point

• Sell a digital bundle as the primary entry offer

• Present a structured mentorship funnel

• Allow visitors to request a consultation call (not instant booking)

• Collect payments and customer information

• Clearly direct buyers into the Skool ecosystem

• Maintain authority, scarcity, and time control



This is a clarity and execution project, not experimentation or overengineering.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



A visitor should be able to:

• Land on the website

• Immediately understand where to start

• Purchase the digital bundle

• Clearly understand how to join the Skool community

• Understand that consultation calls are available by request

• Apply for mentorship if they want higher-level access

• Be captured in the
 system for future follow-up



Everything should feel intentional, premium, and structured.



SCOPE OF WORK



PHASE 1: WEBSITE CREATION



Build a brand-new website (no store, no catalog)



Public paths only:

• Start Here – Digital Bundle

• Mentorship

• Brotherhood

• Request a Consultation Call



Homepage requirements:

• Direct most visitors to the bundle

• No clutter, browsing, or competing CTAs



Required pages:

• Privacy Policy

• Terms of Service

• Contact information



PHASE 2: FINAL OFFER STRUCTURE



DIGITAL BUNDLE

• One-time purchase

• Positioned as the foundation

• Messaging emphasizes “Start Here”



BROTHERHOOD

• Paid community

• Ongoing guidance and accountability

• Clearly explained on the site

• Visible link explaining how to join



MENTORSHIP

• Higher-ticket

• Selective and not for everyone

• Sold through a dedicated mentorship funnel

• Positioned as speed and access



CONSULTATION CALL

• Request-based only

• No funnel

• No instant booking

• Limited availability windows

• Clear explanation of approval-based scheduling



PHASE 3: PAYMENTS



• Stripe setup

• One-time payment for the digital bundle

• Invoice or payment option for mentorship

• No payment required to request a consultation

• Collect name,
, and payment details

• Test successful and failed payments



PHASE 4:
 COLLECTION AND BASIC AUTOMATION



• Connect
 platform

• Collect
s from:

  - Bundle purchases

  - Mentorship applications

  - Consultation requests



• Apply tags:

  - Bundle Buyer

  - Brotherhood Interest

  - Mentorship Lead

  - Consultation Request



• Automated
s:

  - Purchase confirmation

  - Next-step instructions

  - Consultation request confirmation



PHASE 5: FUNNELS



DIGITAL BUNDLE FUNNEL

• Landing page

• Short video or structured explanation

• Checkout page

• Thank-you page

• One primary CTA

• Clear explanation of Skool-based access



MENTORSHIP FUNNEL

• Authority or overview page

• Selective positioning

• Application or request step

• Disqualify casual prospects



PHASE 6: CONSULTATION REQUEST PAGE



• Standalone request page

• Explains purpose of consultation

• Emphasizes limited availability

• Short request form:

  - Name

  -

  - What help is needed

• No open calendar

• No instant scheduling



PHASE 7: SKOOL AND BROTHERHOOD DIRECTION



• Clear explanation of the Skool community

• Why bundle buyers must join

• Use the same
 as purchase

• Visible link to Skool

• Brotherhood explained as part of the ecosystem

• No access automation required



DELIVERABLES



• Fully built website

• Digital bundle funnel

• Mentorship funnel

• Consultation request page

• Stripe payments live

•
 system connected

• Skool and Brotherhood direction live

• Clean handoff documentation



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



• Website creation (Webflow, Framer, or GoHighLevel preferred)

• Funnel building

• Stripe payments

•
 capture and automation

• Request-based booking systems



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS



Applicants must:

1. Confirm this is a build-from-scratch infrastructure project

2. List tools used for websites, funnels, payments, and

3. Provide at least one relevant example

4. Confirm ability to deliver end-to-end

title: HIRING: DM + TEXT REVENUE OPERATOR
description:
HIRING: DM + TEXT REVENUE OPERATOR  

READ CAREFULLY. MOST APPLICATIONS WILL BE IGNORED.



This is NOT a general VA role.  

This is NOT a multi-job position.



We are hiring 1 disciplined operator to handle warm outreach, buyer follow-ups, upsells, and SKOOL engagement for a US-based personal brand.



If you are working other jobs, move slowly, or dislike structure, do not apply.



——————————————————

REQUIRED HEADLINE TEST (DO THIS FIRST)

——————————————————



Your application headline MUST start with the word:



IPHONE



It must be the FIRST word in the headline.



Example:

IPHONE – DM Revenue Operator Application



If IPHONE is not the first word, your application will NOT be opened.



——————————————————

ROLE SUMMARY

——————————————————



Your job is simple:



Turn existing attention into daily revenue.



Speed matters more than anything.  

The faster buyers and engaged followers hear from us, the more they buy.



All work is scripted, tracked, and measured.



——————————————————

WHAT YOU WILL DO DAILY

——————————————————



1. Warm Outreach Messaging  

Daily DM outreach to:

• Instagram followers  

• People who like or comment  

• Story voters and viewers  

• People who previously DMed  

• Anyone showing interest  



Exact scripts will be provided.



2. IMMEDIATE BUYER TEXTING (CRITICAL)  

Whenever someone buys ANY product, you must text them within minutes using iMessage.



You will:

• Welcome them  

• Apply the correct upsell based on what they purchased  

• Offer relevant upgrades immediately  

• Log every buyer and upsell attempt  



Speed here directly affects revenue.



3. Upsells & Revenue Routing  

You will push approved offers only:

• Signed physical book upgrades  

• Game God Bundle  

• Brotherhood  

• One on one calls  

• Mentorship (ONLY if qualified)



You do NOT invent pricing or offers.  

You follow clear upsell rules and decision paths.



4. Instagram DM Management  

You will:

• Reply to all DMs quickly  

• Turn comments into DMs  

• DM story engagers  

• Follow up warm leads  

• Revive old conversations  

• Push leads toward the correct offer  



Tone must match Goldie’s brand exactly.



5. Past Buyer & Lead Follow Ups (HIGH PRIORITY)  

You will consistently message:

• Anyone who asked about mentorship  

• Anyone who asked about pricing  

• Anyone who engaged heavily  

• Anyone who disappeared  

• Anyone who has EVER bought anything



Buyers convert the fastest.  

This is a daily priority.



6. SKOOL Group Posting & Engagement (DAILY)  

Every day you will:

• Post in the free SKOOL group  

• Reuse Goldie’s past content (quotes, lessons, captions)  

• Add simple CTAs  

• Reply to comments  

• Welcome new members  

• Encourage upgrades when appropriate  



You do NOT create original content.  

You reuse Goldie’s words.



7. Daily Reporting (NON NEGOTIABLE)  

Your end-of-day report must include:

• Outreach messages  

• Replies  

• Upsell attempts  

• Upsells closed or strong interest  

• Buyers contacted  

• SKOOL post completed  

• SKOOL engagement completed  

• Screenshots  

• Hot leads  

• Issues or blockers  



No report = no work.



——————————————————

COMMUNICATION & JUDGMENT RULES

——————————————————



This role requires structured judgment, not freestyle selling.



• Scripts must be followed for openers  

• Approved responses must be used for questions  

• Judgment is allowed ONLY to:

  – Choose the correct upgrade path  

  – D
 Bundle vs Brotherhood vs one on one  

  – Escalate qualified leads  



You do NOT:

• Invent messaging  

• Change pricing  

• Use foreign phrases  

• Sound formal  



Tone must be:

simple  

clean  

direct  

masculine  



——————————————————

REQUIRED SCHEDULE + SPEED EXPECTATION

——————————————————



This is a 7 day role.



You will work 3 hours per day during BOTH shifts:



• 11:00 am–12:30 pm EST  

• 6:00 pm–7:30 pm EST  



You MUST be fully active during these hours.



Speed matters most when:

• someone purchases  

• someone comments with emotion  

• someone asks a question

title: Financial Reporting & Dashboard Specialist (Accounting / ERP Data Mapping)
description:
We are looking for a full-time Financial Reporting & Dashboard Specialist to help create financial reports and dashboards for our clients using our software platform.



Our system connects with many of the main ERP and accounting systems used in the Nordics and internationally, including Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, Fortnox, QuickBooks, Xero, and others.



The main responsibility of this role is to review accounting keys / chart of accounts data from our clients, understand what the accounts represent, organize them into the correct financial categories, and use that structure to create clear and accurate financial reports.



You will help build reports such as:



Income statements / profit and loss reports

- Balance sheets

- Cash flow reports

- Management reports

- Financial dashboards

- Client-specific reporting templates



This role is ideal for someone with a strong accounting background who understands financial statements and enjoys working with financial data, reporting tools, and ERP/accounting system data.



Key Responsibilities

- Review client accounting keys / chart of accounts from different ERP and accounting systems

- Categorize accounts into correct financial reporting groups

- Create income statements, balance sheets, cash flow reports, and dashboards using our software

- Understand the meaning of accounting accounts from systems such as Business Central, Fortnox, QuickBooks, Xero, and - similar platforms

- Identify where accounts should belong in financial reports

- Help ensure financial reports are accurate, logical, and easy to understand

- Work with client data from companies in the Nordic region

- Follow internal reporting structures and templates

- Communicate clearly with the team when account classifications are unclear

- Support ongoing improvements to report templates and dashboards



Required Skills and Experience

- Strong understanding of accounting and financial reporting

- Experience creating or working with income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow reports

- Ability to read and understand chart of accounts / accounting keys

- Experience with ERP or accounting systems such as: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, Fortnox, QuickBooks, Xero or similar accounting platforms

- Good understanding of how accounts are grouped into revenue, cost of goods sold, operating expenses, assets, liabilities, and equity

- Strong attention to detail

- Comfortable working with financial data

- Good English communication skills

- Able to work independently and follow structured processes

- Reliable, organized, and willing to learn our software platform



Nice to Have

- Experience with financial dashboards or business intelligence tools

- Experience with management reporting

- Experience working with Nordic or European accounting data

- Bookkeeping or accounting certification

- Experience supporting multiple clients or working in an accounting/reporting service role



What We Offer

- Full-time remote work

- Long-term role with a growing software company

- Training on our software platform

- Opportunity to work with international clients and ERP systems

- Stable, structured work focused on accounting, reporting, and financial data

- A supportive team environment



Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is someone who understands accounting well and can look at a list of accounts from a client’s ERP system and quickly understand where each account should belong in a financial report.



You do not need to be a programmer. The most important skills are accounting knowledge, financial reporting experience, attention to detail, and the ability to learn how to use our software to build reports and dashboards.

title: Remote Appointment Setter – Aesthetic/Med Spa Industry
description:
We help med spas consistently book out their calendars with Botox and lip filler appointments.



As an Appointment Setter, you are the first point of contact—and your role goes beyond dialing. You move leads closer to saying yes.



We keep the environment fun, but we compete to win.



Goal: Be elite at what you do. Enjoy the process while getting paid for performance.



This is not a role for people who want to “try sales.”

This is for individuals who want to master it.



Schedule



Rotating schedule (weekdays + weekends)



Shifts:



Morning: 8:00 AM – 3:00 PM EST

Evening: 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM EST



You must be flexible and available for either shift when needed.



Your Role: Two Core Modes



1. Hunting (Speed + Volume)



Call new leads within 60 seconds — no exceptions

Prioritize leads across multiple clients

Use GoHighLevel (GHL), Slack, and internal systems to ensure no lead is missed



2. Closing (Precision + Influence)



Follow the C.L.O.S.E.R. script exactly (while sounding natural)

Identify goals, understand pain points, and position the right offer

Handle objections confidently and reinforce commitment so leads actually show up

What Success Looks Like



You’re performing at a high level when:



Every new lead is contacted in under 60 seconds

The script becomes second nature

You follow up consistently and personalize conversations based on each lead

Compensation

Base: $500 USD/month

Performance Pay: +$1,000 USD/month (based on completing daily standards — 100% of current setters hit this)



Bonuses:



Monthly performance challenges: up to +$500 USD

+$5 USD for every low-ticket booking (uncapped)



Expected Earnings: ~$1,500 USD/month for solid performers



We reward consistency and execution. The more you perform, the more you earn.



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



Availability for EST shifts + weekends

Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral accent (US-friendly)

Stable internet (minimum 100 Mbps) + backup power

Quiet workspace + quality headset

Laptop + large monitor

Preferred Background

Appointment setting, call center, sales, or high-volume support experience

However, coachability and work ethic matter more than experience



Tools You’ll Use Daily



GoHighLevel (GHL)

Slack

Training & Support



You’ll be equipped with:



A complete playbook and training system

Daily script practice, roleplays, and call reviews (Week 1)

A detailed Appointment Setter Handbook

Ongoing coaching to improve your skills and income

Who Succeeds Here

Shows up daily and executes consistently

Takes feedback seriously and improves fast

Treats this as a long-term career, not a side hustle



How to Apply



Send a voice recording via 
 answering:



Why you’re a strong fit for this role

Any relevant experience (optional)

A personal goal you’re working toward



If your recording stands out, we’ll reach out with next steps.

title: Video Editor (PHP 370/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 370 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: GoHighLevel Expert
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a dedicated GoHighLevel Expert to become the operational backbone of our marketing agency. You will be responsible for building, managing, and optimizing our clients' GHL accounts, ensuring everything runs smoothly from lead capture to client retention. If you live and breathe GoHighLevel and want to take ownership of agency fulfillment, this role is for you.

You will be responsible for a wide range of technical and operational tasks within GoHighLevel and related platforms. This includes building workflows and automations for SMS and

You will manage basic CRM setups and sales pipelines, handle integrations for LC Phone, Twilio, and WhatsApp, and connect domains through providers like GoDaddy. Additionally, you will independently follow Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), embed GHL forms into clients' external websites, and create draft Google Ad campaigns to support client acquisition.

Requirement

title: Amazon Listing optimization Specialist
description:
We are seeking an experienced Amazon Listing Optimization Specialist to develop a fully optimized product listing from the ground up. This is a project-based role ideal for someone with strong research, copywriting, and conversion optimization skills within the Amazon ecosystem.

The ideal candidate understands how to combine data, psychology, and compelling storytelling to create listings that rank well and convert effectively.

________________________________________

Responsibilities

• Conduct competitive research to identify top-performing listings and market positioning

• Perform in-depth keyword research to identify high-value search terms and ranking opportunities

• Research the product and/or its ingredients, including benefits, use cases, and differentiators

• Analyze existing listings and customer reviews to uncover gaps, buyer pain points, and sentiment trends

• Identify and define unique value propositions (UVPs) that differentiate the product in the marketplace

• Develop a fully optimized Amazon listing, including:

o Product title

o Bullet points

o Product description / A+ content guidance

o Backend keywords (if applicable)

• Write clear, compelling, and conversion-focused copy that aligns with Amazon best practices

• Ensure all content is written in perfect English with strong attention to tone, clarity, and persuasion

________________________________________

Requirements

• Proven experience creating and optimizing Amazon product listings

• Strong understanding of Amazon SEO, keyword indexing, and ranking factors

• Excellent copywriting skills with a focus on conversion

• Ability to interpret customer sentiment and review data

• Experience with tools such as Helium 10, Data Dive, or similar (preferred)

• Detail-oriented with the ability to work independently and meet deadlines

• Native or near-native English proficiency

________________________________________

Deliverables

• Fully optimized Amazon listing (ready to publish)

• Keyword research summary

• Competitor analysis overview

• Clear articulation of product positioning and unique selling points

________________________________________

To Apply

Please include:

• Examples of Amazon listings you have created or optimized

• Brief description of your process

• Estimated turnaround time for a project of this scope

title: PHOTO EDITOR JOB AD
description:
Job Description:

We are a creative production brand looking for a highly skilled photo editor/retoucher to help bring our images to a clean, high-end editorial and magazine-ready look.

This is NOT basic editing. We need someone who understands lighting, skin retouching, and visual storytelling.



What You’ll Be Editing:

Portraits & creative shoots

Fashion / lifestyle photography

Studio and on-location images



What We Need (IMPORTANT):

High-end skin retouching (natural, not over-smoothed)

Lighting corrections & color grading to match editorial standards

Photoshop work (object removal, background cleanup, compositing)

Ability to add or remove elements when needed

Clean, polished, magazine-quality results



Style Requirements:

Editorial / magazine-ready finish

Clean, sharp, professional look

Ability to be creative when needed (not just follow presets)

Requirements:

Strong experience in Adobe Photoshop & Lightroom

Advanced retouching skills (frequency separation, dodge & burn, etc.)

Portfolio showing before & after edits

Ability to match a specific style consistently

Strong attention to detail



Turnaround Time:

FAST turnaround required

Must be able to deliver edits within 24–48 hours (or faster depending on project)



Compensation:

Paid per batch or weekly (based on workload)

Opportunity for long-term work and consistent projects

Pay increases based on quality and speed



Immediate Work Available:

We have photos ready for editing immediately.





How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY):

To be considered, you MUST:

Applications without strong samples will NOT be considered.

title: CUSTOMER SERVICE VA (PHONE SUPPORT + REVIEW WORK) – Gym
description:
Compensation

• $2.67 per hour base pay 

• $275 biweekly base pay 

• $50 biweekly reliability/compliance bonus 

• $325 total possible biweekly 

Reliability / Compliance Bonus

You receive the full $50 biweekly bonus only if all of the following are true for that pay period:

• no unapproved absences 

• no missed scheduled shift 

• no disappearing during shift 

• no major SOP violation 

• all assigned tasks completed by deadline 

• no repeated lateness 

• no missed phone calls 

Schedule

Full-time — 51.5 hours per week

• Monday to Friday: 10:00 AM to 7:15 PM EST 

• Saturday: 10:00 AM to 3:15 PM EST 

Please apply only if you can work this exact schedule consistently.

About the Role

We are hiring a full-time Customer Service VA for Arsen’s Gym.

This role starts with inbound phone support and customer service. If you perform well, you will later be trained on tailgating camera footage review and other detail-heavy admin tasks.

This is not a general VA role.

This is a role for someone who is:

• easy to understand on the phone 

• calm and professional with callers 

• strong at following exact process 

• detail-oriented with review work 

• reliable and consistent 

Phase 1 of the Role: Phone Support

At first, your main responsibilities will be:

• answering inbound calls for all gym locations 

• helping prospects who are interested in joining 

• guiding callers toward booking a tour 

• explaining memberships, passes, and general gym policies 

• routing billing, freeze, cancellation, and account-change issues correctly 

• helping callers with basic GymMaster app and access questions 

• handling trainer and job inquiry calls correctly 

• documenting follow-up items clearly 

Phase 2 of the Role: Tailgating Review and Admin Review Work

If you perform well in the phone role, you will later be trained on back-office review work, including:

• reviewing tailgating camera footage 

• comparing footage against GymMaster account details 

• checking reports and spreadsheet filters 

• documenting what happened clearly 

• helping determine whether a case should be marked: 

o charge 

o do not charge 

o needs further review 

This part of the role requires:

• strong attention to detail 

• ability to follow a checklist exactly 

• ability to document findings clearly 

• ability to stay objective and not guess 

You may also later help with structured admin review tasks such as timesheet and form review.

You Are a Good Fit If You:

• have clear spoken English 

• have a minimal or neutral accent 

• are easy for U.S. callers to understand 

• can stay calm with upset or frustrated callers 

• can follow SOPs exactly 

• do not guess when unsure 

• are detail-oriented 

• are comfortable switching between calls and admin work 

• want a long-term role 

You Must Have

• excellent spoken and written English 

• a quiet work environment 

• stable internet 

• a good headset and microphone 

• a reliable computer 

• customer service, phone support, or virtual assistant experience 

• strong attention to detail 

• willingness to learn structured review work 

Important Rules of the Role

You will not be allowed to:

• take credit card, debit card, or bank details over the phone 

• promise refunds, credits, waivers, or exceptions 

• guess when unsure 

• improvise policies 

• ignore SOPs 

• make decisions outside the approved process 

What We Care About Most

We care most about:

• voice clarity 

• minimal accent 

• calm, professional communication 

• instruction-following 

• reliability 

• judgment 

• attention to detail 

This role is a mix of customer communication and structured review work.

If you are strong on the phone but weak with detail, this role will not be a fit. If you are detail-oriented but difficult to understand on calls, this role will not be a fit.

How to Apply

We will only review applications that follow every instruction exactly.

Step 1

Go to our Instagram 

Find the current follower count.

Step 2

In the subject line of your application, or in the first line if subject line is not available, write:

[FOLLOWER COUNT] - [YOUR FULL NAME]

Example:

12345 - Maria Santos

Step 3

In the second line of your application, write exactly:

CALM. CLEAR. DIRECT.

Step 4

Send all of the following:

1. A 60-second audio recording introducing yourself and explaining your customer service or phone support experience 

2. A 30-second audio recording reading this exact sentence:

“Thank you for calling Arsen’s Gym. I’d be happy to help you today. Let me guide you to the best next step.” 

3. A screenshot of your internet speed 

4. A screenshot or photo of your headset 

5. A screenshot of your computer specs 

6. Your current city and province 

7. Your available hours in EST 

8. A sentence confirming:

“I can work the full posted schedule.” 

9. A sentence confirming:

“I understand the base pay is $2.67 per hour, which equals $275 biweekly base pay, plus a $50 biweekly bonus.” 

Step 5

Answer these 5 questions in writing:

1. Why are you a good fit for a phone-based customer service role? 

2. What do you do when you are not sure of the answer on a call? 

3. How do you stay calm when a caller is upset? 

4. Why would you be good at reviewing details carefully in a spreadsheet or camera-footage workflow? 

5. Why are you looking for a long-term role? 

Important

Applications that do not follow the instructions exactly will be ignored.

Hiring Process

Candidates who pass the application filter will move to:

• a Zoom interview 

• a finalist practical video test 

Final Note

We are looking for someone who can do both:

• speak clearly and professionally on calls 

• handle structured, detail-heavy review work accurately 

If that sounds like you, apply exactly as instructed.

title: CRO Specialist & Landing Page Optimization Expert (Shopify, E-commerce)

title: Senior Shopify Developer
description:

title: Video Editor / Motion Graphics Artist
description:
About Sigil

Sigil Entertainment Group is a tabletop RPG and genre media studio. We create books, campaigns, stock art, and marketing assets for our in-house brands and for publishing partners. We work fast, stay organized, and deliver production-ready files for print and digital.



Role Overview

We are looking for a Video Editor / Motion Graphics Artist to create trailers, reels, and promo videos for TTRPG books, Kickstarter campaigns, podcasts, and social media. You will turn existing art, layouts, and text into tight, punchy video pieces that sell the product and fit each platform.



Key Responsibilities



Edit short and mid-form video content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and other platforms



Design and animate motion graphics and comics, lower thirds, logo stings, and text overlays



Cut and refine trailers and sizzle reels for books, campaigns, and crowdfunding launches



Create simple animated explainers or feature highlights using existing art and assets



Add basic sound design and music to support pacing and mood



Optimize aspect ratios, runtimes, and exports for different platforms and specs



Organize project files and follow Sigil naming and delivery standards



Collaborate with creative director, art directors, and marketing to refine concepts and scripts



Required Skills and Experience



Proven experience as a video editor with a strong motion graphics portfolio, motion comics are a plus



Advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects (or equivalent tools)



Ability to work with layered PSDs, vector art, and high-resolution stills



Strong sense of pacing, rhythm, and visual storytelling



Experience creating content for at least two of these: YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok,
, Kickstarter



Comfortable working with minimal supervision and hitting deadlines



Good written English and clear communication



Nice to Have



Interest in tabletop RPGs, comics, or genre entertainment



Experience cutting Kickstarter or crowdfunding videos



Experience with basic audio cleanup and mixing



Familiarity with Photoshop, or Illustrator



Ability to create simple storyboards or animatics from a script



What We Offer



Flexible remote work



Project-based or part-time ongoing engagement



Opportunity to work on multiple IPs and brands



Chance to help define Sigil’s visual language for trailers and motion content



How to Apply



A short introduction



Link to your reel and 3–5 specific examples that show motion graphics work



Your general availability



Optional: Mention any experience with TTRPGs or genre projects you have worked on.

title: Quality Assurance & Operations Administrator
description:
Position Summary

OPA Home Care operates a strict, gated Referral-to-Cash Operating System (v2.2) designed to

deliver consistent outcomes regardless of who executes the process. Every stage has one

owner, binary “done” definitions recorded in AxisCare, mandatory QA audits, and clear KPIs.

OPA has maintained a perfect shift coverage record – zero missed shifts since May 23, 2024.

As our Quality Assurance & Operations Administrator, you will execute daily audits, enforce

gate compliance, and produce reporting that keeps the pipeline running with discipline and

integrity. You will own the audit function across all active pipeline stages and escalate violations

without delay.



Important: This role involves reviewing client records that may contain Protected Health

Information (PHI). HIPAA training is required and must be completed before AxisCare

access is granted. No exceptions.



Key Responsibilities

Core QA & Audit Ownership



• Perform the full Stage 1 QA Audit within 24 hours of every Referral ? Intake completion

– verifying lead entry timestamps, contact cadence, SLA execution while client is on the

phone, deposit calculation and posting, gate integrity, referral source entry in both

required AxisCare locations, and Director of Operations start authorization.

• Expand QA audits to additional stages (Intake ? Care Plan, Staffing, Visit Completion,

Billing, and Recruiting pipeline) as those stages are finalized and directed.

• Track stage completion misses by employee and stage. Support corrective action by

reporting misses to the task owner and Director of Operations within 24 hours of

identification.

• Own the Exception Tracking Protocol: confirm every gate bypass is logged with all four

required fields (exception type, reason, approved-by, normalization deadline) and

normalized by the applicable deadline – 24 hours for emergency starts, 48 hours for gate

overrides. Escalate missed normalizations immediately.

• Run weekly cross-pipeline reviews and support root-cause analysis when lag KPIs fail.

• Deliver daily audit summaries and weekly pipeline reports to the Director of Operations,

CEO, and designated tea
mbers. Flag gate violations immediately – no batching of

critical issues.



Operations Support

• Monitor AxisCare continuously for gate integrity, status accuracy, medically fragile

designations, documentation compliance, and system rule adherence.

• Enforce core system rules without exception: one owner per stage, no downstream

action before gate confirmation, “if it is not logged in AxisCare, it did not happen,” and no

informal modifications.

• Support scheduling, intake, clinical, and billing teams with repeatable administrative and

auditing tasks as directed by the Director of Operations.



Compliance & Reporting

• Maintain strict HIPAA compliance in all work involving client data, at all times.

• Produce clear, accurate, and timely audit reports and documentation.

• Participate in process improvement as the company scales and additional OS stages are

activated.



Success Metrics

• 100% of assigned QA audits completed within required timeframes.

• 100% of exceptions normalized by deadline or escalated with documented reason

before deadline.

• Zero unaddressed critical issues in audit reports – all gate violations flagged same day.

• Reporting delivered on schedule with no gaps.

• Contribution to overall pipeline KPIs: conversion rates, shift coverage, collection rates.



Qualifications

• 2+ years of experience in quality assurance, process auditing, operations coordination,

or healthcare administration. Home care, BPO, or healthcare support experience is a

strong advantage.

• Demonstrated attention to detail and documented ability to enforce strict processes and

rules – including escalating when colleagues are non-compliant.

• Strong proficiency with EMR/EHR or care management systems. AxisCare experience is

highly preferred; fast independent learners will be considered.

• Excellent written and spoken English – clear, professional, and precise in all

communications.

• Reliable high-speed internet, power backup, and a quiet dedicated workspace for US

night-shift hours.

• Experience with HIPAA or equivalent data privacy standards. Candidates without prior

HIPAA experience must complete comprehensive training before system access is

granted.

• Comfortable working independently with a high degree of self-direction while

coordinating with a US-based team via Slack,
, and scheduled calls.



Preferred

• Background in home care, senior care, or healthcare BPO operations.

• Experience creating structured audit summaries and operational reports.

• Familiarity with US healthcare compliance environments or payer operations (VA,

Medicaid, private pay).



Compensation & Benefits

• Monthly salary: $1,200 – $1,400 USD depending on experience. Performance bonus

bridges toward higher earnings for strong and consistent performers.

• Paid training on OPA’s Operating System, AxisCare, and HIPAA – completed before

system access is granted.

• Opportunity to grow into expanded audit and operations scope as the company scales.



Why Join OPA?

You will play a foundational role in protecting a rigorous, systems-driven operation that delivers

exceptional reliability to clients and families. OPA has maintained zero missed shifts since May

23, 2024 – a record this role directly protects. If you are process-oriented, thrive on detail and

consistency, and want to contribute to a growing US home care company while working

remotely from the Philippines, this role is built for you.

title: Home Care Recruiter
description:
Home Care Recruiter — High Volume | Remote (Philippines) OPA Home Care & Skilled Nursing | Full-Time | Remote



What this role is?



OPA Home Care & Skilled Nursing is a fast-growing private home care company in the Atlanta metro area. We operate on one standard: zero missed shifts. Recruiting is what makes that possible.



This is a production role. You will own Stages 1 and 2 of our hiring pipeline — from first contact to behavioral screen — and you will be measured on daily output, not activity.



If you are looking for a sourcing or resume-review role, this is not it. If you move fast, follow a process without being told twice, and are comfortable disqualifying candidates who do not meet the bar, keep reading.



What you will do?



Monitor inbound applications from ZipRecruiter and Indeed. Every applicant receives a response the same business day — 48 hours is the ceiling, not the target. Contact sequence is non-negotiable: digital message, phone call (two attempts), follow-up
. Every action logged in AxisCare. If it is not in the system, it did not happen.



When you reach a candidate, you are not screening — you are recruiting. Lead with who OPA is and why it is a good opportunity. Then confirm licensure (CNA, HHA, PCA, LPN, Med Tech, or RN), schedule availability, ability to start within 7 days, and willingness to go through our on-call integration period. Candidates who do not answer the phone, do not respond within 48 hours, or do not meet the basic requirements are disqualified. No second chances, no exceptions.



Candidates who pass your call are directed to complete a behavioral phone screen as their next step. You track completion and process outcomes. Advancing candidates receive a call from you within two hours and a credentialing
 the same day.



You will report daily metrics to our operations coordinator and maintain accurate pipeline status in AxisCare at all times.



What we are looking for



You have at least two years of high-volume recruiting experience in home care, healthcare staffing, or a high-output BPO environment. You have made a lot of outbound calls and you are comfortable doing it. Your English is strong enough to represent OPA professionally on a live call. You have worked in a CRM or ATS and you understand that logging is not optional.



Experience recruiting U.S. caregivers specifically — CNA, HHA, PCA, LPN, or RN — is a strong advantage. Familiarity with ZipRecruiter and Indeed pipelines is preferred.



More important than any credential: you respond fast, you follow a process without drifting from it, you are comfortable saying no to candidates who do not qualify, and you take accountability for your numbers.



Include your resume when applying.

title: Quality Assurance (QA) Manager - Home Care Operations
description:
Job Title

Quality Assurance (QA) Manager – Home Care Operations



Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Company: OPA Home Care

Reports To: Director of Operations



Role Overview

OPA Home Care is seeking a Quality Assurance Manager responsible for ensuring operational accuracy across our core service workflows.



This role functions as the final quality gate before operational work reaches leadership.



The QA Manager will review operational outputs, identify process failures, and ensure that work produced by the operations tea
ets OPA’s standards for accuracy, completeness, and professionalism.



The position is process-oriented and requires strong attention to detail, structured thinking, and the ability to enforce standards consistently.



Core Responsibilities

The QA Manager is responsible for quality control across the following operational areas:



Referral and Intake

Review referral intake records for accuracy and completeness



Verify correct client demographic and service data



Ensure referral documentation is properly recorded in the system



Scheduling

Audit caregiver schedules for accuracy and coverage



Verify caregiver assignments match client care plans



Review missed-shift i
 and identify process failures



Documentation

Review caregiver visit notes for completeness and accuracy



Ensure documentation meets operational and compliance standards



Track missing or incomplete documentation



Billing Preparation

Verify visit data and documentation required for billing



Ensure service records are accurate before submission



Quality Reporting

Maintain a QA tracking system identifying recurring operational errors



Produce weekly quality reports for operations leadership



Recommend process improvements when errors repeat



Key Outcomes

The QA Manager is accountable for the following outcomes:



Metric Target

Operational documentation accuracy 100%

Referral intake accuracy 100%

Scheduling audit compliance 100%

Error detection before leadership review >95%

The QA Manager ensures work is correct before it reaches leadership review.



Required Qualifications

3+ years experience in quality assurance, auditing, or operational review



Experience reviewing administrative workflows or documentation



Strong attention to detail and ability to detect errors



Strong written English communication



Comfortable working with operational systems and spreadsheets



Experience with healthcare operations, BPO quality assurance, or administrative auditing preferred



Preferred Experience

Experience in one or more of the following areas is strongly preferred:



Home care or healthcare operations



Quality assurance in BPO environments



Medical documentation review



Operational compliance auditing



Skills Required

Structured thinking



High attention to detail



Ability to enforce operational standards



Strong organizational discipline



Ability to identify root causes of recurring operational errors



Work Style

This role requires someone who:



notices small inconsistencies others overlook



prefers structured processes and checklists



is comfortable enforcing quality standards



takes ownership of accuracy and process improvement



About OPA Home Care

OPA Home Care provides in-home care services to older adults and individuals who require assistance with daily living.



Our company is built around the following core values:



Attention to Detail



Reliability



Strong Work Ethic



Efficiency



Coachability



Self-Starter mindset



Lagniappe – delivering a little extra



We are building systems that ensure every client receives dependable, high-quality care.



Compensation

Compensation is competitive and based on experience.



Typical range for this role:



Location Monthly

Philippines $1,200 – $1,500 / month

Application Instructions

Applicants should submit:



Resume



Short description of prior QA or operational review experience



Example of a process or workflow they have improved



Hiring Filter (Important)

Candidates who succeed in this role typically demonstrate:



exceptional attention to detail



comfort identifying operational mistakes



discipline in following structured processes



This role is not a customer service position. It is a process accuracy and quality control role.



Optional Enhancement (Strongly Recommended)

Add a screening test to the job posting.



Example:



Give applicants a sample operational document with errors and ask them to identify mistakes.



This dramatically improves hiring quality for QA roles.

title: Paralegal/Attorney – Criminal Defense
description:
Position Overview:

We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Paralegal or Attorney to support our criminal defense practice. This role requires in-depth knowledge of criminal law, including motion preparation, legal research, and document management. The ideal candidate will be responsible for preparing motions, drafting legal documents, and ensuring compliance with legal procedures. They will work closely with attorneys to ensure the defense strategy is executed effectively, and help prepare cases for court. This is a remote position requiring exceptional written English, organizational skills, and a strong grasp of U.S. criminal law procedures fundamentals.



Key Responsibilities:



• Draft, review, and be prepared to file various legal documents including motions, briefs, and memoranda.

• Prepare appendices for motions, including organizing exhibits, declarations, and supporting documentation.

• Prepare the table of contents for legal filings, ensuring accuracy and compliance with court rules.

• Conduct in-depth legal research on complex criminal law issues and generate a research summary for the attorney.

• Analyze discovery materials to identify critical issues and inconsistencies.

• Prepare memoranda and case summaries to aid in litigation strategy.

• Assist in the preparation of motions for hearings, trials, and appeals, including motions to suppress evidence, dismiss charges, or modify bail.

• Manage case files, ensuring all relevant documents and evidence are properly documented and stored.

• Prepare discovery responses, subpoenas, and other legal documents as directed.

• Coordinate with clients, witnesses, and experts to gather information and evidence for cases.

• Maintain communication with the court, opposing counsel, and clients regarding motions, hearings, and court dates.

• Provide support during trial preparation, including organizing exhibits, trial briefs, and witness lists.

• Ensure all legal documents comply with applicable state and federal rules and deadlines.



Qualifications:



• Must be a Graduate of a law school (JD).

• Proven experience in criminal defense law, specifically in motion practice.

• Strong knowledge of court rules, procedures, and legal writing standards.

• Experience preparing appendices, tables of contents, and organizing large case files.

• Excellent research, analytical, and writing skills.

• Must have strong knowledge of legal citation

• Ability to manage multiple cases and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

• Strong communication skills and attention to detail.

• Experience with legal research tools (e.g.,Lexis/Nexis and Westlaw) and document management software, such as Clio CRM software.



Preferred:



• Prior experience in criminal defense law or litigation.

• Knowledge of specific motions in criminal defense, including motions to suppress, dismiss, and motions for bond 

        reductions.

• Familiarity with Nevada local court rules and procedures in criminal defense.



Application Process:



Interested candidates should submit the following:

• An updated resume.

• A cover letter detailing your experience with U.S. criminal law and Clio software.

• Two writing samples (legal motions or briefs preferred) with how long it required the applicant to finalize the presented 

        document (in hours) from the time the assignment was given to the document presented.

I am looking for a fast, reliable editor to handle daily production for a high-volume AI video project. I will provide the raw AI avatar videos (HeyGen) and the scripts. 

Your job is to generate the background B-roll images using Gemini Flow (Nano Banana 2) and assemble the final video in CapCut.



What You Will Do (Responsibilities)



High-Volume Production: Generate and edit 15 short-form videos per day using HeyGen AI avatars and our provided scripts.



AI Image Generation: Produce 9-12 realistic images per video that match the script's story.



Post-Production Magic: Add engaging captions, and cleanly remove the avatar's background so they sit naturally over the generated B-roll images.



Quality Control: Ensure the AI images look realistic (not cartoonish) and that captions are accurate to the script. Clean up any AI artifacts, adjust pacing, fix awkward pauses.



Workflow Management: Maintain a highly organized file system and consistently meet daily delivery deadlines.



Brand Consistency: Ensure all videos strictly align with our brand guidelines, colors, and visual style.



Who You Are (Requirements)



Proven Experience: Strong portfolio showcasing short-form video editing (preferably for TikTok/Reels/Shorts).



Tech Stack: Experience using AI image generation tools AND proficiency in professional editing software. Preferably CapCut PC



Speed & Efficiency: You have a streamlined workflow that allows you to comfortably handle 15 videos a day without sacrificing quality. (Note: We do NOT use music, zooms, or complex transitions—this is a high-speed, clean editing role).



Attention to Detail: You have a sharp eye for catching unnatural AI movements and audio-video syncing issues.



Tech Requirements: A fast, reliable computer and a strong, stable internet connection (minimum 25-50 Mbps) to handle heavy video rendering and uploading.



Language: Excellent written and spoken English.





How to Apply

Attention to detail is critical for this role. To prove you have read this entire job description, please include the word "AVATAR" in the subject line of your application message.



In your application, please include:



Your updated resume.



A link to your portfolio (please specifically point out any short-form content or AI-generated videos you have edited).



A brief, 2-3 sentence explanation of your current editing workflow and how you plan to efficiently tackle 15 videos a day.

title: Short Term Rental Specialist
description:
Short Term Rental Specialist | Assistant Property Manager



Endless Asset Management



About Us

Endless Asset Management operates premium vacation rental properties under the Endless Stays brand across 4 US markets (NJ, TN, FL, & VA). We own and operate our own portfolio while also co-hosting and property managing for other STR owners.



Our Core Values:



- World Class Hospitality to Every Guest and Owner – We go above and beyond from start to finish

- Fix Once, Fix Forever – We create lasting solutions that eliminate recurring issues

- Own the Outcome – We take responsibility, communicate proactively, and resolve issues quickly

- Systems Create Scale – Smart technology and structured processes amplify our human touch

- Bring Excitement, Passion, and Integrity Every Day – A positive attitude is contagious and essential



We're growing rapidly with an ambitious 10-year vision. This is a career opportunity, not just a job.



The Role

We're hiring one-two Short Term Rental Specialist to join our team as operational leaders. This is a fully remote position designed for someone who wants to grow into a leadership role within our organization.



Core Responsibilities:



End-to-end guest communication and experience management (inquiry through post-stay)

Complete reservation management across all platforms (Airbnb, VRBO, 
, direct)

Coordinate cleaning, maintenance, and service providers

Monitor property conditions and ensure quality standards

Handle problem-solving, troubleshooting, and service recovery

Maintain detailed documentation and execute company systems



Technology Stack You'll Use:

OwnerRez / Hospitable (PMS)

Breezeway (Operations)

OpenPhone (Communications)

Host Buddy, Stayfi, RankBreeze, Go High Level

Notion (Documentation)

Google Workspace





Required Qualifications

Must Have:



9/10 English Fluency with same for verbal and written (Non-negotiable - please do not apply if this is not you)

Previous experience managing short-term rentals or minimum in hospitality industry (required)

Quick learner who thrives in startup environments

Exceptional attention to detail and avid note-taker

Ownership mindset – you drive outcomes independently

Fantastic attitude and strong problem-solving abilities

Comfortable with technology and multiple software platforms

Weekend/evening availability for guest support (rotating basis)



Huge Plus:

Notion experience

OwnerRez/Hospitable experience

Familiarity with vacation rental technology platforms





What Makes This Different

Startup Environment: This is not a steady-state position. We're growing fast, building systems, and constantly evolving. If you're looking for routine, this isn't the role.

Career-Focused: We're hiring for one-two positions and currently have 1 VA. We will promote the right fit into a leadership role as we scale.

Systems + Human Touch: We leverage technology to automate processes, but we need someone who understands our systems, executes flawlessly, and monitors everything.

Real Impact: Your work directly affects guest satisfaction, property performance, and company growth.



Compensation



We offer:

Competitive salary based on experience

Performance-based bonuses tied to property metrics

Fully remote with flexible schedule (within operational requirements)

Clear advancement path to leadership with increased compensation



How to Apply

Submit:



Your resume

A brief 2-3 minute video displaying your verbal communication skills.



Tell us a little bit about yourself including an experience where you went above and beyond for your customer.



Important: To demonstrate your attention to detail (a critical skill for this role), please include the word "Jersey" in the Subject Line. Applications without this keyword will not be considered.



We're moving fast for the right candidates, so apply now if you're serious about taking your career to the next level and want to be excited to come to work every day.

title: Experienced Flutter App Developer
description:
Experienced Flutter Developer (Project Takeover & Cleanup)

Top 3 Skills Required:



Flutter Code Refactoring: Experience taking over and "tightening" existing codebases (specifically those built with AI/vibe coding tools).



Advanced 3rd-Party Integrations: Expert at implementing Vimeo, YouTube, Firebase Analytics, and WordPress REST APIs.



Clean Architecture & State Management: Moving logic out of the UI and into scalable, maintainable services (Singleton/Service patterns).



Role Overview:

I am the Product Strategist for an education organisation. We are a small, agile core team driving a well-established, 15+ year-old non-profit. I have been vibe coding our Flutter app using Cursor and Antigravity, but I am now stepping back as it took me way way too long and i'm falling behind in other areas of my job. I need a professional developer to take over the project, clean up the logic, and implement critical integrations, also to handle uploading to the stores, making up nicer previews etc.



You will work closely with our WordPress/Web Developer and Designer to ensure the app and website are perfectly synced.



Core Responsibilities:



Project Takeover: Audit, clean up, and refactor the existing Flutter code for stability and performance.



Integrations: Implement and optimize Vimeo and YouTube players, Firebase Analytics, and secure API connections to our WordPress/Kajabi backend.



Collaboration: Coordinate daily with our Web Designer to align endpoints and data structures.



Gamification (Advantage): Help us implement engagement features and gamified learning paths for our users.



Requirements:



Proven experience with flutter content apps, video, audio lessons - hundreds of episodes within series/categories etc - the app is working but new version has a few bugs and integrations that it needs before we can upload to stores. 



Strong background in media-focussed apps (vimeo api, youtibe api, audio on backend currenrly, audio/video persistence etc).



Gamification or game development experience is a major plus.



Proactive communicator who isn't afraid to ask questions to get things right the first time.



Required Application Questions:



Start your reply with "Audio". Explain in 3 simple steps how you ensure background audio persists cleanly when a user navigates between different screens.



Project Takeover: Have you ever taken over a project built by a non-coder or an AI-assisted "vibe coder"? What was your process for cleaning up the code?



Gamification: Do you have experience building gamified features or working with game logic? Please provide a brief example.



Role Comprehension: In your own words, what is the primary goal of this position?



Proof of Execution: Provide 2-3 links or screenshots of media-heavy apps you have built or managed.



Reliability: What city/region are you in? Name your specific backup hardware for power outages and your secondary ISP.



Working Hours: Can you align 2-4 hours of your workday with South African Standard Time (SAST) for our daily syncs?

title: Technical Content & Operations Assistant (IT/EA)
description:
Job Post 1: Technical Content & Operations Assistant (IT/EA)

Role Overview:

I am the Product Strategist for TheShmuz. We are a small, highly agile core team driving a well-established, 15+ year-old non-profit. Because we manage a massive library of audio and video content for a large audience, our technical infrastructure is complex, but our team culture remains tight-knit and fast-paced.



We are currently revamping our website, mobile app, and integrating Kajabi. I need a highly organized Technical EA to manage my daily workflow, consolidate documentation, ensure our content distribution is flawless, and ensure that we execute on our highest priorities.



Note : Strong IT management experience is an advantage.



Core Responsibilities:



Keep me focused on priority tasks, being eager to take over those tasks where you can handle most of them first time



Strong Organization skills - to get my files, folders and document content (technical and general management notes) consolidated and nicely organised.



Be happy to work with my ADD type personality/mind - ie help keep us focussed and making notes of all the itesm i need to get done, and often reminding me of most impoirtant prioritises to get back on track



Structure daily 10-20 minute pdaily and weekly planning sessions and prepare weekly accomplishment reports.



Audit content across Vimeo, YouTube, Spotify, and Instagram to ensure all content is on all platforms, then to load up missing/fix existing content and/or links  or work with person who does this for us to get it done.



Execute web ops or ensure tasks get done by hosting company (DNS updates, domain management,
 deliverability) and Kajabi/WordPress administrative tasks.



Interface with third-party online services to understand, troubleshoot, and implement improvements to our hosting and systems infrastructure.



Requirements:



Strong English to understand each other first time



Empathic and patient, but strong enough to suggest best way forward given priorities on documentation we will work on together.



Highly practical and collaborative.



Comfortable diving into third-party platforms to understand how they work and how to optimize our setup. Familiarity with Google Cloud / Firebase is preferable.



Proactive but strictly adheres to boundaries; must be comfortable asking questions.



Strong English communication for managing external business relationships.



WordPress/Kajabi experience is highly preferred.



Required Application Questions:



Start your reply with the word "Prioritize". Provide a simple 1-2-3 step example of how you would organize a busy IT Manager's scattered daily tasks.



Kajabi & WordPress Experience: Describe a specific instance where you managed a WordPress backend or worked within Kajabi. What were your responsibilities?



Infrastructure Problem Solving: Give an example of a time you had to log into a third-party service or hosting platform you weren't fully familiar with to fix or improve a system setup. How did you handle it?



Role Comprehension: In your own words, what is the primary goal of this position?



Proof of Execution: Provide 2-3 links or screenshots of previous projects.



Infrastructure (Personal): What city/region are you in? Detail your exact backup plan for power and internet (Hardware names + secondary ISP).



Working Hours: Ideally 2 to 4 hours aligned with South African Standard Time (SAST) for daily syncs?
