title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 1a
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 


/cro-shopify-web-developer/



CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

title: Final Spot Open, AI Video Editor for High-Converting Ads
description:
ABOUT US



We are a fast-growing e-commerce company specializing in high-converting video ads for direct-to-consumer brands across industries such as health, footwear, and lifestyle.



Our focus is on producing performance-driven creatives at scale, and we are continuing to grow.



We are now looking for one final AI Video Editor to complete our team, someone who can start immediately and join us within the week.





ABOUT THE ROLE



We are seeking an editor who can create highly realistic AI-generated ads that integrate seamlessly with real footage. This role is ideal for someone who can combine creativity with performance-driven thinking while consistently delivering a high volume of variations.



You will be producing short-form, direct-response ads optimized for paid social channels.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



~ Create 20 to 50 AI-generated video ads weekly across various brands

~ Produce AI avatars, UGC-style clips, and supporting visuals using modern AI tools

~ Edit all content in CapCut with strong attention to pacing, structure, and overall quality

~ Analyze competitor ads on platforms like Meta and Google to inspire new creative angles

~ Test different hooks, concepts, and messaging approaches to improve results

~ Make light adjustments to scripts or hooks when needed (scripts are usually provided)





REQUIREMENTS



~ Proven experience creating AI-generated ads for e-commerce brands

~ Hands-on experience with tools such as Higgsfield and ElevenLabs

~ Advanced editing skills in CapCut with a strong portfolio

~ Ability to generate realistic AI visuals such as people, environments, and product scenes

~ Solid understanding of direct-response marketing principles

~ Able to work independently while maintaining consistent output





PREFERRED EXPERIENCE



~ Familiarity with tools like Midjourney, Runway, Kling, or Sora

~ Experience using Meta Ads Library or similar tools for research

~ Background in creating UGC-style ads for paid campaigns





ROLE DETAILS



Commitment: Full-time, 40 hours per week

Salary: $1,400 per month

Schedule: Flexible, Monday to Saturday

Work setup: Fully remote

Hiring: 1 position open, final hire to complete the team, target onboarding this week





APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS

To confirm that you have read the full description, please start your application with:



AICreator492



Then answer the following:

1. Walk us through your step-by-step process for creating a fully AI-generated UGC-style ad, from receiving the script to delivering the final output in CapCut.

2. What tools do you currently use for AI video, image, and voice generation? Include your proficiency level such as beginner, intermediate, or advanced.

3. How do you ensure AI-generated people and scenes look realistic in ads? What techniques do you use to avoid common AI flaws or unnatural visuals?

4. When analyzing competitor ads, what specific elements or signals do you look at to identify strong performers?

5. On average, how long does it take you to produce a fully AI-generated 25-second ad?

6. Share links to your portfolio featuring realistic AI-generated e-commerce ads that demonstrate your ability to create high-performing content.



If you are passionate about pushing the boundaries of AI video and creating content that delivers measurable results, we would love to hear from you.

title: Visual Storytelling Video Editor (Typography-Focused)
description:
About the Role:

We’re looking for a visual-first Video Editor who can turn ideas into clear, compelling, authority-building short-form content.



This is not about flashy edits — it’s about communicating ideas visually. You’ll use typography, pacing, and structure to simplify complex concepts, highlight key insights, and keep viewers engaged from start to finish.



If you think in visual hierarchy, text rhythm, and clarity, this role is for you.

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



Key Responsibilities

• Review and cull raw footage, identifying the most insightful 
nts

• Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, Shorts) focused on education and authority

• Structure content for clarity and retention (hook ? insight ? reinforcement ? takeaway)

• Use typography as a primary storytelling tool — headlines, emphasis, pacing, and flow

• Design edits with strong visual hierarchy and readability

• Apply AI tools (e.g. Google Gemini, Google Flow) for enhancement and efficiency

• Refine pacing to ensure ideas land clearly and keep attention

• Enhance videos with intentional motion design, clean transitions, and minimal but effective effects

• Deliver content that is clear, sharp, and high-performing



_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



Output & Turnaround Expectations

• Produce approximately 40 short-form videos per month (10 reels per week)

• Typical turnaround: 1–2 days per video

• Maintain clarity and consistency at speed

• Stay responsive, communicative, and efficient with revisions

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



What We’re Looking For

• 2–5 years editing short-form educational or talking-head content

• Strong instinct for clarity, structure, and audience retention

• Excellent use of typography for emphasis, pacing, and storytelling

• Ability to simplify ideas through visual hierarchy and editing choices

• Solid fundamentals in color, sound, and clean editing

• Proficiency in CapCut, Premiere Pro, After Effects, or similar

• Strong communication in spoken and written English

• Reliable, independent, and fast-moving

• A thinking editor — someone who shapes the message, not just assembles clips



_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



Examples













***Only Apply if you can match this editing style with precision and consistency.

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



This Role May Not Be the Best Fit If…

• You rely heavily on templates without shaping the message

• You treat text as basic captions instead of a storytelling layer

• You prefer aesthetic edits over clear communication

• You need step-by-step direction for every edit

• Fast turnaround and feedback cycles feel overwhelming

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



How to Apply



Please send to 



Your portfolio / showreel (short-form content)

HIGHLIGHT 2–3 examples that demonstrate clear, engaging educational storytelling with showcasing strong typography use 



Feel free to include a short Loom video introducing your approach.

Shortlisted candidates will go through a short interview, followed by a paid trial work $20 usd / reel

description:

Looking For:

title: Content Production Coordinator (Social Media & Video)
description:
Studio Reeljoy is a Singapore based social media agency focused on crafting personal branding and producing engaging short-form videos for brands, with a strong focus on Singapore property and real estate content. We help property agents and brands create scroll-stopping videos that educate, engage, and convert.



As we grow, we’re looking for someone who can help manage our clients' content workflow, support content creation, and keep everything running smoothly behind the scenes.





About the Role

This is a hands-on execution role combining project coordination, content writing, and AI-assisted photo editing.



You’ll play a key role in making sure:

• Content gets produced on time

• Visual quality is consistent and high

• Posts are ready to go out consistently

If you enjoy structured work, clear tasks, and creative execution, this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Doing

1. Project Coordination 

• Track all ongoing content projects (reels, edits, posts)

• Follow up with editors to ensure deadlines are met

• Schedule content for review and posting

• Maintain and update the content calendar



2. Content Production & Execution

• Format and prepare content for posting

• Create simple static posts using Canva

• Do basic video edits (cutting clips, adding text/subtitles)



3. AI Photo Editing & Image Preparation 

• Use AI tools (e.g. Google Flow or similar) to remove clutter from property photos

• Enhance images with lighting, color correction, and minor touch-ups

• Ensure photos look clean, spacious, and market-ready

• Organize and prepare high-resolution image sets

• Maintain consistency in editing style across projects



4. Ad Campaign Execution

• Set up and run basic social media ad campaigns (Meta / Instagram)

• Prepare creatives and copy provided by strategist

• Monitor performance and report simple metrics

• Make basic optimizations based on guidance



**Important: Singapore Property Context**

You’ll be working with content related to:

• Property buying/selling in Singapore

• Real estate tips, trends, and insights



*You don’t need to be an expert but you should be:

• Be able to understand basic content context

• Follow provided direction accurately

• Be open to learning quickly



Who We’re Looking For

• Organized and detail-oriented

• Reliable and proactive

• Comfortable executing tasks independently

• Basic familiarity with social media tools and ads

• Quick to learn new tools and systems



How to Apply

Please send to 
 :

• A short intro about yourself 

• Any relevant experience (content, coordination, editing, or ads)

• 2–3 caption samples OR a short piece of content you’ve written

• One content idea for a Singapore property video



Feel free to include a short Loom to introduce yourself and your experience.

Shortlisted candidates will go through a short interview, followed by a paid work to assess fit.

title: Webshop Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
About the Role

We are hiring a Webshop Operations Assistant to support our Webshop Sales Manager across five brands. Your focus is simple: keep our webshops accurate, optimized, and running without issues. You will handle product listings, SEO outreach, and site maintenance while following SOPs closely and executing tasks with precision.

Who We Are

Roots & Branches is a remote-first e-commerce company in the wellness, sleep, and ergonomics space. We sell through our own webshops across the Dutch and European markets. We run lean and value clarity, speed, and clean execution.

What You’ll Do

Product Management

·       Listing Execution: Assist with product uploads, including variants, bundles, and accurate formatting across all brands.

·       Catalog Maintenance: Update product descriptions, images, tags, pricing, discounts, and SKUs as needed.

·       Inventory & Accuracy: Monitor stock levels and fix listing errors or inconsistencies.

·       Bulk Work: Handle bulk edits and product imports efficiently.

SEO, Outreach & Affiliates

·       SEO Updates: Assist with on-page SEO (meta titles, descriptions, internal links, alt text).

·       Backlink Outreach: Identify and reach out to potential partners for backlink opportunities to improve domain authority across our brands.

·       Affiliate Support: Help manage affiliate partner links and coordinate content updates for our affiliate network.

·       Content Management: Upload and format blog posts, podcasts, or content pieces per brand guidelines.

Conversion & Ads Support

·       Landing Page Creation: Build and optimize high-converting landing pages specifically for Google Ads and Meta Ads.

·       A/B Testing: Help set up and monitor A/B tests (changing headlines, CTAs, or layouts) to improve conversion rates.

·       Tracking: Ensure all tracking parameters (UTMs) are correctly implemented on new pages.

Website Maintenance

·       Routine Audits: Perform webshop checks across homepages and collections to ensure everything looks perfect.

·       Technical Fixes: Identify and fix broken links, missing images, and outdated content.

·       UX/UI Checks: Update banners and visual elements; test checkout functionality and support mobile optimization across all shops.

What We’re Looking For

Must-Haves

·       Experience as a VA or e-commerce assistant.

·       Hands-on experience with Shopify.

·       Strong attention to detail and comfort with spreadsheets.

·       Ability to follow SOPs step-by-step.

·       Fluent in English.

Mindset

·       Proactive: Takes initiative and stays a step ahead without needing constant direction.

·       Communicative: Comfortable asking questions to stay aligned and raising issues early.

·       Accountable: Takes full ownership of tasks through to completion.

Strong Advantages

·       Clear understanding of SEO and Backlinking.

·       Experience working across multiple brands or stores.

·       Experience building landing pages or content pages.

Offer & Conditions

·       Location: 100% Remote.

·       Hours: Full-time (40 hours per week).

·       Compensation: $650–$850 USD / month (based on experience).

·       Growth: Opportunity to grow into a CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) Specialist.



·       Bonus (13th month) in the end of the year based on performance and attitude

·       Healthcare & pension allowance of 5,000 PHP/month

How to Apply

To apply, please fill out the short application form:



Note: Applications will only be considered if the form is completed, fruit "Orange" mentioned AND the video is sent.

title: Sales Representative (Remote) - Moving Services Flex Moving Group
description:
Base $1,000/month + performance bonuses · Full-time · Entry-level, training provided



We're Flex Moving Group, a moving company owning different brands in 6 locations across the US that handles everything from local apartment moves to office relocations to long-distance jobs across the country. We're growing, and we're hiring our next sales rep - someone we'll train from the ground up.



About the role

You'll be the first voice customers hear when they're planning a move. Your job is to understand what they need, walk them through what we offer, and turn inquiries into booked jobs.



What you'll do

Respond to inbound leads by phone (mostly),
, and chat

Ask the right questions to understand each move and recommend the right service

Prepare quotes and follow up until the customer books

Keep your pipeline organized in our CRM

Work closely with the operations team so every booked move runs smoothly



Who we're looking for

Good level of English with no significant accent is crucial

Attentive to details. Organized and reliable, even on busy days

Confident on the phone and quick to build rapport

A good listener - moving is stressful, and customers want to feel taken care of

No prior sales experience needed; this is an entry-level role



Schedule

8 hours a day, 5 days a week

One of your working days will fall on a weekend (Saturday or Sunday — we can discuss which works best for you)

Our business hours run from 6am to 8pm Pacific Time

We're currently looking to fill a 9am–5pm PST shift, but we're open to shifting your hours within our operating window if you have a preference



What you get

$1,000 base salary per month. Payouts twice a month.

Small Bonuses based on performance.

Real training from people who've done the job. Takes 1-1.5 weeks, paid for based on hourly basis a few days after you finish the training and do the work.



How to apply

Send a 1-minute voice recording of you talking about your previous work experience, or about why this role interests you to 
 (
). We reply to every applicant within 3 days.

title: Corporate Research Analyst
description:
We are looking for a Corporate Research Analyst who loves "playing detective." You will be responsible for digging into companies and industries to tell us what is actually happening beneath the surface.



This isn't just about numbers; it's about understanding business models, identifying trends, and seeing how a company fits into the bigger picture. If you enjoy falling down "research rabbit holes" and can explain complex topics simply, we want to talk to you.

title: Operations Manager / Systems Architect for Virtual Assistant Team & Personal Workflow Optimization
description:
Summary



**Job Title:** Operations Manager / Systems Architect for Virtual Assistant Team & Personal Workflow Optimization



**Job Description:**



I’m looking for an experienced Operations Manager or Systems Architect to help me streamline and manage both my business and personal operations. This role will focus on overseeing a team of virtual assistants while designing and implementing efficient digital systems for task management, information flow, and overall productivity.



This is a long-term collaboration for someone who thrives on creating order, building scalable systems, and improving how work gets done.



**Key Responsibilities:**



* Manage and coordinate a team of virtual assistants (hiring, onboarding, training, and ongoing supervision)

* Design and implement efficient workflows for both business and personal tasks

* Build and optimize systems for task tracking, documentation, and information management

* Create clear SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) to ensure consistency and scalability

* Identify inefficiencies and proactively suggest improvements

* Ensure smooth communication and task flow across all areas of work

* Integrate and manage tools (e.g., project management software, automation tools, knowledge bases)



**Ideal Candidate:**



* Proven experience managing remote teams, especially virtual assistants

* Strong background in operations, systems design, or workflow optimization

* Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

* Skilled in tools like Notion, ClickUp, Asana, Airtable, Zapier, or similar platforms

* Excellent communication skills and ability to translate complexity into simple systems

* Comfortable working across both business and personal task management contexts

* Problem-solver with a systems-thinking mindset



**Nice to Have:**



* Experience supporting entrepreneurs or small business owners

* Familiarity with automation and AI tools

* Ability to balance structure with flexibility in dynamic environments



**Engagement Details:**



* Remote, flexible hours

* Ongoing / long-term opportunity

* Start with a trial period to ensure a strong fit



**To Apply:**

Please include:



1. A brief summary of your experience with similar roles

2. Examples of systems or workflows you’ve built

3. Tools you specialize in

4. How you approach managing and scaling a VA team



Looking forward to finding someone who can bring clarity, structure, and efficiency to both my business and personal operations.

title: SOCIAL MEDIA OPERATOR / CONTENT CREATOR (TRUCKING – B2B)
description:
About the Role

Fleetmule is a fast-growing startup helping small and mid-sized trucking carriers stay compliant with FMCSA and DOT regulations—without requiring a full-time compliance team. Backed by IT Park Ventures and international investors, we are building a product already gaining traction in the U.S. trucking market.

We are seeking a results-driven Social Media Marketing Specialist to lead and scale our digital presence. This role is ideal for someone who can take ownership of social media strategy, execute high-impact content, and drive measurable growth across platforms.



This is NOT a “post pretty graphics on Instagram” job.



We are looking for someone who can:

???? Get on camera

???? Break down complex trucking/compliance topics

???? Capture attention in the first 3 seconds

???? Turn content into inbound leads



If you are not comfortable speaking on camera or thinking like a marketer — do not apply.



Key Responsibilities

Develop and execute a comprehensive social media strategy aligned with business goals

Create, manage, and optimize content across LinkedIn, X 
), Instagram, and TikTok, targeting trucking owner-operators, fleet managers, and dispatchers

Research industry trends in trucking, logistics, and DOT compliance to produce timely and relevant content

Write clear, engaging, and conversion-focused captions, threads, and carousel copy that simplify complex topics

Design high-quality visual assets and short-form videos using tools such as Canva, CapCut, or similar platforms

Manage community engagement, including comments, messages, and mentions, while identifying potential leads and partnership opportunities

Track, analyze, and report on performance metrics (reach, engagement, growth), providing actionable insights and recommendations

title: PROVEN TRUCKING SAFETY SPECIALIST (U.S. COMPLIANCE) – DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE ENTRY LEVEL

We are hiring a real Safety Specialist who has personally handled compliance, violations, and audit pressure in U.S. trucking.



If you’ve never been responsible for keeping a carrier compliant — this is not for you.



ou will be responsible for keeping drivers and the company audit-ready at all times.



That means:

You know how to build and maintain clean DQ files

You don’t wait for problems — you prevent them



WHAT YOU MUST ALREADY KNOW (NO TRAINING PROVIDED):

Full DQ file structure (not just uploading docs — understanding compliance)

MVR + PSP review and risk evaluation

Drug & Alcohol Clearinghouse process

HOS / ELD violations and patterns

How to identify red flags BEFORE they become violations

Reject drivers who are not compliant

Catch missing or fake documentation

Keep the company ready for inspection ANY DAY

Communicate with drivers and enforce compliance (not just request nicely)

???? “I know what will fail a DOT audit”

Competitive pay for real professionals

title: Senior Video Ads Creative Designer
description:
We’re hiring an experienced, creative and performance-driven Senior Video Ads Designer who can produce high-converting ads (short-form videos, VSLs, GIFs) for social ad platforms such as Meta, Youtube, TikTok and Snapchat.

We want you if you are a designer who brings their own ideas and creativity to identify new ad angles, and consistently improve creatives based on performance.



What You’ll Do:

- Create short video ads (5–15 seconds) for various products that capture attention

- Create long-form video ads (30-60 seconds) and video sales letters for various products

- Create new ad concepts and variations based on the product landing page/advertorial

- Extensively use AI tools to create/edit/repurpose ad creatives that work

- Iterate fast based on ad performance results

Requirements:

, Instagram, TikTok, Youtube, etc)

- Reliability



What We Offer:

- Competitive pay based on output quality and performance

- Possibility to grow quickly with the company

Applications without this information will not be responded to. Optionally, please feel free to include your current CV, as well as examples of your portfolio (if any).

title: SEO Expert (AI-Driven Search & Content)
description:
We’re looking for a results-driven SEO Expert who understands both traditional search and the evolving AI-driven landscape. This role requires a balance of technical expertise, content strategy, and data analysis to drive measurable growth for our clients.



Responsibilities:



- Develop and execute comprehensive SEO strategies aligned with client business goals and KPIs

- Conduct keyword research and search intent analysis (including AI-generated search trends and zero-click SERPs)

- Optimize website structure, landing pages, and content for both search engines and user experience

- Perform technical SEO audits (site speed, indexing, crawlability, schema, Core Web Vitals) and implement fixes

- Manage on-page and off-page SEO, including internal linking, content optimization, and authority building

- Create and optimize high-quality content, including blog posts, landing pages, and service/location hubs

- Leverage AI tools (e.g., content generation, SERP analysis, automation) to improve efficiency while maintaining content quality

- Monitor rankings, traffic, and conversions; provide actionable insights and recommendations

- Track and report performance using clear monthly, quarterly, and 6-month deliverables

- Stay updated with algorithm changes, AI search developments, and SEO best practices



Requirements:



- 2+ years of hands-on SEO experience (agency experience preferred)

- Proven experience in both local and international SEO campaigns

- Strong understanding of modern search (Google updates, E-E-A-T, AI Overviews, semantic search)

- Experience with SEO tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, or similar

- Proficiency in Google Analytics (GA4), Google Search Console, and reporting dashboards

- Solid understanding of technical SEO and website platforms (WordPress, Shopify, etc.)

- Experience using AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Surfer, Clearscope, or similar) to support SEO workflows

- Strong analytical skills with the ability to translate data into strategy

- Excellent English writing and editing skills with attention to detail



Nice to have:

- Experience with programmatic SEO or scalable content strategies

- Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, or JavaScript for SEO implementation

- Familiarity with CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) principles

- Experience managing multiple client accounts in a fast-paced environment

/elivatedseo2026

title: Office Manager / Construction Administrator
description:
OFFICE MANAGER / CONSTRUCTION ADMINISTRATOR

Moritz Design and Construct



ABOUT THE COMPANY

Moritz Design and Construct based in the Riverland, South Australia delivers high-quality residential and commercial projects with a focus on detail, organisation, and getting projects delivered properly.

We’re a small, growing business. No corporate layers. No confusion about responsibility.

You’ll work directly with the director and be involved in real projects, not just admin tasks.

This is a long-term role for someone who wants to take ownership and grow with the business.



THE ROLE

This role is about keeping projects organised, controlled, and moving.

You’ll take ownership of the admin and financial side of each job — making sure documentation is accurate, costs are tracked, and nothing slips.

You’ll be responsible for:

• Managing contracts, variations, and project documentation

• Tracking costs, invoices, and budgets

• Keeping schedules updated and following up outstanding items

• Coordinating subcontractors, suppliers, and consultants

• Communicating clearly with clients and the project team

• Assisting with tender submissions and project setup

You’re not just supporting projects — you’re helping keep them on track.



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

You’ve worked in construction before and understand how jobs actually run.

You’re detail-focused and consistent. You don’t rush and miss things — you get it right.

You’re confident communicating in clear, professional English — both written and on calls.

You’re comfortable with:

• MYOB (or similar)

• Excel

• General construction documentation

You understand:

• Variations

• Invoicing

• Cost tracking

• Project flow

Most importantly:

• You take ownership

• You don’t need constant direction

• You keep things moving



WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU

• Flexible working hours

• Direct involvement in real projects

• A small team where your work actually matters

• Exposure to high-end residential projects

• Long-term role with growth as the business expands



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

• You need constant instruction

• You miss details or rush your work

• You’re not comfortable speaking with clients or trades

• You’re looking for a corporate environment



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF:

• You notice problems before others do

• You keep systems clean and organised

• You communicate clearly and professionally

• You want to be relied on



HOW TO APPLY

Send through:

• A short 2-3 minute video explaining your experience in construction admin and why this role suits you

• Your CV



Subject: Office Manager 

Only applicants with relevant construction experience will be considered.

A zoom interview will be offered to select candidates

?

title: Phone Sales Representative – Tree Care Services
description:
About Us

Save The Ash Tree Co. is a growing tree injection company based in Minnesota, specializing in protecting ash trees from the Emerald Ash Borer (EAB) — a invasive beetle that has devastated millions of ash trees across North America. We're expanding rapidly into Texas, Nebraska, South Dakota, and beyond, and we need sharp, driven people to help us grow.

This isn't just sales. You'll be helping homeowners and property owners save trees that have stood for decades. It's meaningful work, and we take it seriously — while having fun doing it.



The Role

You'll be the voice of Save The Ash Tree Co. — calling inbound leads who have already expressed interest in our services, following up on inquiries, and booking treatment appointments. This is a phone-first role: you'll spend most of your time in conversation, building rapport, answering questions, and closing bookings.

Hours: 3–4 hours per day, part-time

Schedule: To be coordinated based on U.S. Central Time business hours

Location: Remote – Philippines



What You'll Do

Call inbound leads who have inquired about ash tree treatment services

Conduct outbound follow-up calls to warm prospects

Educate potential customers on the Emerald Ash Borer threat and our injection treatment process

Answer questions clearly and confidently about our services, pricing, and process

Book service appointments and confirm scheduling details

Keep accurate notes in our CRM (Help Scout) after each call

Communicate any lead feedback or objections back to the team



What We're Looking For:

Excellent spoken and written English — you'll be speaking with American homeowners daily

Background in biology, environmental science, or a related field — or strong personal interest in plant health, ecology, or agriculture

Phone confidence — you genuinely enjoy talking to people and don't shy away from asking for the close

Self-motivated and reliable — you show up, hit your hours, and manage your time well working remotely

Coachable — you'll go through our training program and follow our call process



Bonus if you have:

Prior sales or customer service experience (phone-based preferred)

Experience with CRM tools

Knowledge of invasive species, tree care, or horticulture





Compensation

$4.00 USD per hour (part-time, approx. 3–4 hours/day)

$10.00 USD bonus per confirmed booking you close

Paid [weekly/biweekly — your preference]



This structure rewards closers. A rep booking 2–3 jobs per shift can meaningfully increase their take-home above the hourly base.



Training

Full training provided. You do not need prior tree care knowledge — we will teach you everything about EAB, our treatment process, and how to handle common customer questions and objections. What we can't teach is the drive to pick up the phone and close. That needs to come from you.



Duration

We only run for about 6 months of the year. 



To Apply

Please send the following to 



A short voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you're a good fit for this role

Your resume or work history

Your available hours (in Philippine Standard Time)



Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

title: Senior Executive Assistant to the CEO (Full-Time, Dedicated Role)
description:
BLUEFLOWER LTD.

Blueflower is a global travel design company crafting intelligent, highly personalized journeys. We design meaningful travel experiences with structure, precision, and care. Our team works remotely across countries and time zones, united by a commitment to excellence and elegant execution.



The Role

We are hiring a Senior Executive Assistant to the CEO. This is a full-time, exclusive role working directly with the CEO of an international company.



The role requires judgment, structure, and independence. You will act as a close partner to the CEO, ensuring priorities are managed, information is organized, and execution keeps pace with decision-making. Due to the level of trust required, this role demands full professional focus and availability.



This is not an administrative, VA, or task-only role.



Responsibilities

- Manage the CEO’s calendar across time zones and ensure meeting readiness

- Support executive decision-making through organization, tracking, and follow-through

- Own inbox outcomes by surfacing priorities and ensuring timely responses

- Act as a reminder and filter so key items do not fall through the cracks

- Manage executive workflows with clients, internal teams, and partners

- Own select internal projects and follow up on assigned action items

- Ensure internal standards and preparation requirements are met

- Oversee executive travel readiness with end-to-end ownership and foresight



Requirements

- 7–10 years of experience as an Executive Assistant, ideally supporting a C-level executive

- Direct experience supporting a non-Filipino executive in an international or multicultural environment

- Strong written and spoken English with a professional business tone

- Ability to manage senior-level priorities rather than task execution alone

- High level of discretion, reliability, and judgment

- Comfortable working with imperfect information and evolving priorities

- Proactive, calm, and highly organized

- Able to commit to a full-time role with no other concurrent jobs or long-term clients



Work Setup

Remote, full-time role (40+ hours per week)

Exclusive engagement. This role is not compatible with holding other jobs or freelance work

Long-term position

Work closely with a globally distributed team



How to Apply

Send your application with:

1. Personalized CV

2. Tailored cover letter

Before applying, review www.blueflower.la

In your cover letter, please answer the following:

- What stands out to you about Blueflower after reviewing our website

- Why you are specifically interested in this role

- The executive(s) you have supported and in what capacity



Incomplete or non-personalized applications will be automatically disqualified.

title: Structural Steel Detailer
description:
Job Title:

Structural Steel Detailer - Remote



Job Description:

Support the design and detailing of pre-engineered, prefabricated fabric-covered buildings. This role involves preparing accurate technical drawings, 3D models, and material takeoffs to support the engineering design and fabrication of steel structures.



Key Responsibilities:

-Prepare erection, engineering, manufacturing, and fabrication drawings using AutoCAD and Autodesk 3D Inventor

-Create detailed 3D models of steel structural components using Autodesk Inventor for fabrication purposes

-Develop 3D models of fabric-covered buildings for sales presentations and client visualization

-Prepare accurate Bill of Materials (BOM), Load Lists, or BOQ for procurement and material planning

-Review and update drawings based on markups, revisions, and project requirements

-Ensure accuracy and consistency of drawings and models

-Perform other tasks as required to support project delivery and business operations



Software Proficiencies:

-AutoCAD (strong proficiency required)

-Autodesk 3D Inventor (basic to intermediate 3D modeling)

-SketchUp (basic to intermediate 3D modeling)

-Tekla Structures (steel detailing-level proficiency preferred)

title: SEO Specialist & Strategist
description:
? Senior SEO Strategist – Local & Technical Focus

Location: Remote

Reports to: Operations Manager

Company: BodyShop Marketing



???? About BodyShop Marketing

We’re a fast-growing digital marketing agency built specifically for independent auto body shops. Our founder comes straight from the collision repair industry — and our mission is to help hardworking shop owners beat the big chains, stay booked out, and thrive.



We specialize in SEO, websites, Google Ads, social media, geofencing, and AI-powered content marketing. Our culture is built on integrity, grit, service, and partnership — and we’re looking for someone who shares those values.



???? About This Role

We’re looking for a senior-level SEO strategist who can take full ownership of the technical and local SEO strategy for our clients — with a strong focus on Google Business Profile optimization, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), and content that ranks.



You’ll work behind the scenes (not client-facing), partnering directly with our Operations Manager to deliver real results: higher local rankings, better map visibility, and content that drives traffic. If you live and breathe local SEO, love diving into audits, and can turn AI-generated drafts into polished, optimized content — this role is for you.



???? Responsibilities

•Own and execute technical SEO audits and implementations across multiple client accounts

•Lead local SEO strategy: Google Business Profile optimization, categories, Q&A, reviews, and posting

•Implement and manage schema markup and AEO best practices for AI search visibility

•Use Search Atlas to manage technical performance and local rankings

•Review, edit, format, and optimize AI-generated content (blogs, press releases, GBP content)

•Upload content to WordPress, Google Business Profiles, and Signal Genesys

•Ensure on-page SEO best practices using tools like Search Atlas.

•Conduct competitor research and link-building strategies as needed

•Track performance using Google Analytics and Google Search Console

•Communicate recommendations to internal team (not client-facing)



???? You’ll Excel in This Role If You Have…

•5+ years of SEO experience with a strong focus on local and technical SEO

•Deep understanding of Google Business Profiles, ranking factors, and local pack performance

•Familiarity with schema markup, featured snippets, and AI search behavior

•Excellent command of English writing/editing for web content

•Experience using or willingness to learn:



? Search Atlas

? Signal Genesys

? WordPress

? Google Analytics + Search Console

? Rank Math

? Custom GPTs for content generation



Detail-oriented mindset: you don’t miss broken links or meta errors

A proactive attitude: you spot opportunities and take action without waiting to be told

Ability to work independently while collaborating with our internal team



???? Work Details

Location: Remote

Schedule: Full-time; availability to collaborate during U.S. Central Time Zone business hours



?? Why Join Us

Work with a mission-driven team that supports small businesses

Join a company that lives and breathes SEO & marketing for auto body shops

Be part of a growth-focused, no-drama culture that values hard work, honesty, and results

Use cutting-edge tools, custom AI, and innovative strategies to stay ahead of the game

title: Senior Operations Executive (Live Music Agency)
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines Based) 

Compensation: 450 PHP per hour | Paid via Wise 

Schedule: 25 hours per week (Fixed 10 am – 3 pm UK Time) 

Reporting to: Agency Director

The Opportunity

We are a premier UK-based live music agency looking for a high-caliber Operations Executive to serve as the backbone of our business. This is not a task-based "assistant" role; it is a position for a seasoned professional who can manage complex workflows, liaise with senior stakeholders, and maintain operational excellence with minimal supervision.

We are looking for a "Right Hand" who can anticipate needs, manage the Director’s priorities, and ensure our events and finances are handled with surgical precision.

Critical Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

Experience: Minimum 5+ years of experience in Operations, Executive Support, or high-end BPO (Business Process Outsourcing) management roles.

Communication: Near-native English fluency (written and verbal). You must be confident representing the agency on video calls with UK clients and industry partners.

Tech Stack: Advanced proficiency with G-Suite, Notion (or other task management software such as Trello, or Monday,com) , and Xero (invoicing/reconciliation).

Niche Skill (Plus): Direct experience with Music Management software—specifically Bandpencil—is a significant advantage.

Mindset: A "results-over-hours" mentality. You are highly autonomous and comfortable working in a high-stakes environment.

Core Responsibilities

Operations Management: Lead the day-to-day logistics, coordinating between the Director, and Events Manager.

Client & Artist Relations: Act as a primary point of contact for enquiries, contract management, and logistics.

Financial Oversight: Manage all invoicing through Xero and ensure financial data is ready for the accountants.

Executive Inbox Management: Occasionally manage the Director’s
, triaging urgent matters and handling personal administrative tasks to a high standard.

Process Improvement: Identify bottlenecks in our current workflow and implement systems to solve them.

Benefits & Culture

Premium Pay: 450 PHP/hour reflects our commitment to hiring top-tier talent.

Direct Relationship: You will work directly with the business owner, not through a middle-man agency.

Flexibility: While the 10 am – 3 pm UK window is required for team syncs, we offer a high degree of autonomy and flexibility for the right person.



How to Apply (Strict Selection Process)

We are only looking for the top 1% of applicants. To be considered, please provide:

Video Assessment: A 2-minute video introduction (Loom or unlisted YouTube link). In this video, please detail your experience in high-end BPO or operational management and explain how you handle high-pressure deadlines. Applications without a video will be automatically disqualified.

Professional Summary: A brief overview of your experience with G-Suite, Notion, Xero, and/or music management software.

Stability: Confirmation that you have a stable, high-speed internet connection and a quiet environment for client video calls during UK business hours.
salary: 450 PHP per hour | Paid via Wise

title: Real Estates Sales Specialist
description:
OUR COMPANY:

We’re a high-performing U.S.-based real estate investment company that closes 100+ deals per year. We’re looking for a Real Estate Disposition Sales Specialist to help match our investment property inventory with active buyers. You’ll join a remote-first team that moves fast, celebrates wins, and offers long-term growth for the right individual.

This is a great fit for remote professionals or U.S. expats living abroad who want a full-time role with consistent deals, structured sales training, and a career pathway in the real estate industry.



We’re a real estate wholesaling company with main markets in GA & SC with a focus on acquiring deals from Real Estate Agents. We transact about 80-100 deals a year with gross revenue of $1.8M+/year. You can learn more about us and our model through these two podcast videos on Youtube:







Responsibilities

• Market off-market and exclusive investment properties to a curated list of investor-buyers

• Build and maintain strong relationships with new and existing buyers

• Negotiate sale prices, contract terms, and closing timelines with buyers

• Manage leads and daily outreach using CRM tools (40–50 contacts per day expected)

• Track activity, buyer feedback, and pipeline updates consistently

• Coordinate with internal teams to ensure clean and fast closings



Minimum Qualifications

• Fluent in English with minimal accent, capable of clear and effective communication.

• Must be able to work minimum 8-hour shift on US Eastern time zone (8-10 AM EST to 5-7 PM EST).

• 6+ months of experience in real estate sales (ideally with wholesaling companies)

• At least 2 monitors and modern computer (less than 5 years old)

• High-speed internet (20 mb/s upload & download speed minimum) 

• Proven experience with outbound communication (calls, texts,
s) at high volume

• Comfortable negotiating and closing deals over the phone

• Self-motivated and able to thrive in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment

• Strong communication, organizational, and follow-up skills

• Ability to work independently and efficiently in a remote environment.



Preferred Skills

• Familiarity with platforms like GoHighLevel, Investorbase, or InvestorLift

• Experience working with real estate investors and understanding investment buying criteria

• Experience in high ticket sales or negotiation against other parties to maximize profit

• Basic understanding of real estate contracts and deal structures



What We Offer

• Full-time, remote role with consistent deal flow

• Very competitive base pay + commission structure

• Structured training and mentorship to help you level up

• Work with an established real estate company doing 100+ deals per year with over $1.8M+ in annual revenue

• High-energy culture and room for advancement

• Room for career growth and higher earnings



TO APPLY:

Interested applicants need to do these steps to be considered: 

1. Fill in an application: 



If you are ready to embark on an exciting journey in real estate sales and make a significant impact, apply now to join our team. Grow your career while helping others achieve their real estate goals!

title: Staff Accountant (CPA)
description:
We are seeking an experienced and skilled Staff Accountant. The position involves a mix of tax preparation and audit support work, with responsibilities that flex based on seasonality. The Staff Accountant will work closely with the firm’s partner and existing onshore staff.



Key Responsibilities:

Prepare complex individual, corporate, and partnership tax returns.

Perform audit preparation and support work, including workpapers, reconciliations, and supporting schedules, and perform basic auditing procedures

Flex between tax and audit work based on the seasonal demands of the firm.

Follow established firm processes, and maintain strong attention to detail across all engagements.

Collaborate with partners and staff accountant via remote tools (remote desktop, video meetings, etc.)

Develop and maintain strong team relationships.

Stay current with U.S. tax law changes relevant to individual, corporate, and partnership returns





Required Qualifications:

CPA designation (active license required)

Minimum 2+ years of experience working with US-based tax returns in an accounting firm environment (experience may include a combination of public accounting firm and private company experience)

Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field

Exposure and solid technical foundation in US tax preparation and audit support processes

Comfortable switching between audit and tax work depending on the time of year

Strong attention to detail and ability to follow established firm workflows and processes

Excellent client service and communication skills

Good written and spoken English for effective communication with a US-based team





Preferred Qualifications:

Prior experience in a small public accounting firm where staff flex across multiple service lines

Familiarity with common tax preparation and audit software used in US public accounting, such as Lacerte or Ultratax

Experience supporting a US firm remotely with strong self-management and communication habits





Work Environment:

Full-time, remote 

Align to the organization’s Eastern time zone hours (8 AM - 5 PM EST) 8 hours per day, Monday through Friday. Tax season mid-January through mid-April will require mandatory 50 hours per week.

Candidate must agree to hold this role exclusively, with no other projects or clients, and that no sub-contracting of work will occur.

A laptop and two additional monitors will be provided, to be used exclusively for work purposes. 

Candidate must provide a backup device for temporary usage in case of a laptop or equipment failure.

Candidate must provide a backup internet connection (such as a secondary ISP or mobile hotspot) in case of an outage to ensure work continuity. 

Candidate must provide a backup power supply in case of outage to ensure work continuity.

Competitive Salary and Compensation Package





To Apply:

Please submit your resume, cover letter, and three professional references.

Include "Staff Accountant - [Your Name]" in the subject line of your submission.

We encourage early applications as interviews will be conducted on a rolling basis.
